Hi Friend, it's Chuck Grassley.

I need ONE MORE donor to reach my next goal. Will you be that donor? 2024 is our party's last chance to get things right, and my FIRST January deadline is approaching. [](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=f260cf9c7c0d4f25991d222086175f70&_e=3qOygRknJ8TAAcJ_Xzp67f-_-YLBNLmVrTeW44H9VnbHgvHT-cDDslYV7KzvS42fhlpl8bpEaAB8nU9Z6rxZZR6Pd9Q11YXfQKvG-1jemARqAOOwfcnOHsYc7N7-iDd6Db74TdaJk4MXk7kvKgW0FXRn7ZW8y3MashVtlDeToCW2Af7jEifa3gfrIZYksrOZARcoM4yeU0bZVLsgkppgAWKmbKyZAfQ94uziDiffoLsv4enuykwgECkihgjLXeDTSUhmDIRJWEJUBJ_SqotgLw0CKWjYZEeD61g79maRnac%3D)

name: Democracy Team @ Our Revolution
subject: INVITE: Fight the Filibuster Town Hall w/ Sen. Merkley, Barbara Lee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13140?source=email-20240105&t=1011&akid=5147%2E5885482%2EhtFi5j ]RSVP

Peter Willis, you’re
invited!

On Wednesday, Our Revolution will kick off the new year with our LIVE Call
to Fight the Filibuster and Save Democracy with Senator Jeff Merkley, U.S.
Rep. Barbara Lee, and progressive activists around the country!

Progressives are leading the fight for a government and an economy that
works for all of us — that means ending the racist relic of the filibuster
and delivering material change for people’s lives.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13140?source=email-20240105&t=1012&akid=5147%2E5885482%2EhtFi5j ]RSVP now and we’ll send you a Zoom link to join the conversation
directly with Sen. Merkley, Rep. Lee and other special guests starting at
5:30 pm PT/8:30 ET!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13140?source=email-20240105&t=1013&akid=5147%2E5885482%2EhtFi5j ][IMG]

Senator Merkley and Rep. Lee are both champions for peace who have called
for a Ceasefire in Israel/Gaza, and now they are joining us to organize
with us to save democracy here at home in America.

We will delve into Sen. Merkley’s new book “Filibustered: How to Fix the
Broken Senate and Save America” — and offer signed copies for purchase at
a special price!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13140?source=email-20240105&t=1014&akid=5147%2E5885482%2EhtFi5j ]Click here to make sure you get a reminder to tune in to the exciting
live event on Wednesday — and share it with your friends!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

body:
After the 2022 election, I had a hard decision to make.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76574224/447836029/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzUzMzdjMi0yOGFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s9fukc33mdys_wNByP5dt1SL8VxCXcfndrgq25tFmqg=&emci=9b6cfa87-1dac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e35337c2-28ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=19445147)

Hello,
After the 2022 election, I had a hard decision to make.
When I ran against Lauren Boebert in 2022, I knew we could win. No one believed me – not the Democratic party, not the Republican party, and certainly none of the political pundits.
Ultimately, though, after the recount, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country.
We were outspent heavily by Boebert and her allies. And the attacks and the vicious lies they told about me were really hard on my family – especially my two teenage children.
After we came so close to winning against Boebert, everyone expected me to run again in 2024. It seemed like a no-brainer. But it wasn’t an easy decision to put my family through what I knew was going to be an even nastier race than the last.
I spent a lot of time reaching out to supporters and donors like you, listening and getting their advice. And everyone promised me: They’d have my back. So I took a leap of faith.
Now, the Super PACs are already attacking me, and the smear campaign is beginning. I need your help if I’m going to have the resources it takes to win.
I made the decision to run again because I knew I could count on people like you to help me win, so it would mean so much to me if you could chip in to my campaign today:
[**Please, will you give $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford before midnight tonight – to help me hit my first fundraising goal of the year and replace Lauren Boebert in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76574226/447836031/1610638071?refcode=em20240105pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=e35337c2-28ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzUzMzdjMi0yOGFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s9fukc33mdys_wNByP5dt1SL8VxCXcfndrgq25tFmqg=)

I don’t have the national party throwing millions of dollars behind my race. What I have is something far stronger: You. I am so thankful for your support. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

The MAGA Republicans are hellbent on stripping away our rights, including access to abortion, marriage equality, voting rights, and more. The only way to stop them is by removing them from power.

But they won’t go without a fight. National Republicans, with the help of extremist Speaker Mike Johnson and far-right corporate PACs, will spend whatever it takes to keep Mike Lawler in power and hold on to their slim majority. I’m counting on this grassroots team to help me fight back.

[**Chip in whatever amount makes sense for you to help me start 2024 with the surge of momentum we need to defeat MAGA Mike Lawler and retake our House majority this year.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76574311/447841397/-460793036?refcode=em24_240105_elect_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240105_elect_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=29147fb5-2aac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTE0N2ZiNS0yYWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5g7Grt6TG0IY2FC7LL2jvrJEel8PZ2wIIMbzxOnhY6Y=)

Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bfcab2d2774a4b25afbce8d2b1c6f722&_e=qUOM1I1Sej36-jzdAXdN6cttwqyXyo_TVbPNgr0KvBerwSo8S_bAkQbOwdBhZXDaKIjhaevRawHPv7LYLtVvJbdrQJWIGmSEXhfCCtG-9RzV4aZfk3m3_SES0H9Ht-O1U1QHJLt-_F1_xTrgecJ4TBHdjaqVUUu9I8LbrkhP4dzMuepYG-01S0CCPU68gHvJ8sWsnTm6yWuWbpk3mFvxnBWW8vEFIUAWSDzUxNdqawK3ZwiyT_LlkDknY3Z104lVzmjiJEnV-ZxVJMWFYcrWZpVF5OwmaVC5rcWdpkdi95CrDg8pONRHECeIRxGaBEYAnkJQAiRzpjCzDukEIn4xja6VEEChmRusoniF2hY-mocJOWTbMgEFaFfOH5ypa6FA)

It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**

As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. **

name: Tom Fitton
subject: NEW Ashli Babbitt Lawsuit!
body:
Pursuing the Censorship Conspiracy

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH FILES $30 MILLION SUIT ON BEHALF OF ASHLI BABBITT’S
HUSBAND AND ESTATE

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66450&L=31016&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmlkZW9zL2ZpbGVkLWFzaGxpLWJhYmJpdHQtd3JvbmdmdWwtZGVhdGgtbGF3c3VpdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=656efcd3230006be8af5786d9ed969edfdf6cc2051131af2518cc91ba6044da5]
The only homicide on January 6 was the unlawful shooting death of
Ashli Babbitt. Her homicide by Lt. Michael Byrd is a scandal beyond
belief. We have filed a historic lawsuit seeking a measure of justice
and government accountability for Ashli’s death.

We filed the wrongful death suit against the U.S. Government on behalf
of Ashli’s family. She was a U.S. Air Force veteran who was shot and
killed inside the U.S. Capitol by then-Capitol Police Lt. Byrd on
January 6, 2021 (_Estate of Ashli Babbitt and Aaron Babbitt, et al. v.
United States of America_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66450&L=31015&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2VzdGF0ZS1vZi1hc2hsaS1iYWJiaXR0LWFuZC1hcnJvbi1iYWJiaXR0LWV0LWFsLXYtdS1zLWEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=3f8be2d18e75652be7156db169064f46f82feea9c5681837d885f5c69d1378f1]
(No. 3:24-cv-00033).

The lawsuit includes claims against the U.S. Government for wrongful
death, assault and battery, and various negligence issues.

Babbitt was a 35-year-old resident of San Diego, California, where she
owned and operated a successful pool business with her husband Aaron.
Ashli traveled alone from San Diego to Washington, DC, to attend the
Women for America First (aka Save America) rally on January 6, 2021,
at the Ellipse.

As the lawsuit details:

> Ashli loved her country and wanted to show her support for President
> Trump’s America First policies and to see and hear the president
> speak live while he remained in office. Ashli did not go to
> Washington as part of a group or for any unlawful or nefarious
> purpose. She was there to exercise what she believed were her
> God-given, American liberties and freedoms.
>
> After the rally, Ashli, like a great many other patriotic Americans
> attending the rally, walked to the Capitol peacefully, a distance of
> approximately 1.5 miles. Two undercover Metropolitan Police
> Department officers followed close behind Ashli as she climbed the
> stairs to the West Terrace. Ashli entered the Capitol on the Senate
> side long after others had done so. Once inside, Ashli encountered a
> female Capitol Police officer, who directed her to walk south toward
> the House side. Ashli complied, walking alone through the Capitol
> and ultimately arriving at the hallway outside the main door to the
> House chamber, where demonstrators had gathered. From there, Ashli
> walked by herself east, along the hallway outside the House chamber,
> then turned south, reaching the hallway outside the Speaker’s
> Lobby at the southeast corner of the Capitol.

***

> The shooting occurred at the east entrance to the Speaker’s Lobby.
> After demonstrators filled the hallway outside the lobby, two
> individuals in the crowded, tightly packed hallway struck and
> dislodged the glass panels in the lobby doors and the right door
> sidelight. Lt. Byrd, who is a USCP commander and was the incident
> commander for the House on January 6, 2021, shot Ashli on sight as
> she raised herself up into the opening of the right door sidelight.
> Lt. Byrd later confessed that he shot Ashli before seeing her hands
> or assessing her intentions or even identifying her as female. Ashli
> was unarmed. Her hands were up in the air, empty, and in plain view
> of Lt. Byrd and other officers in the lobby.

***

> The facts speak truth. Ashli was ambushed when she was shot by Lt.
> Byrd. Multiple witnesses at the scene yelled, “you just murdered
> her.”
>
> Lt. Byrd was never charged or otherwise punished or disciplined for
> Ashli’s homicide.
The lawsuit further states:

> Lt. Byrd, who is a USCP commander and was the incident commander for
> the House on January 6, 2021, shot Ashli as she raised herself up
> into the opening of the right door sidelight.... Not one member of
> Congress was in the lobby, which was guarded by multiple armed
> police officers. Additional armed police officers were in the
> hallway outside the lobby and/or on the adjoining stairway. Ashli
> could not have seen Lt. Byrd, who was positioned far to Ashli’s
> left and on the opposite side of the doors, near an opening to the
> Retiring Room, a distance of approximately 15 feet and an angle of
> approximately 160 degrees. Sgt. Timothy Lively, one of the armed
> officers guarding the lobby doors from the hallway, later told
> officials investigating the shooting, “I saw him . . . there was
> no way that woman would’ve seen that.” Lt. Byrd, who was not in
> uniform, did not identify himself as a police officer or otherwise
> make his presence known to Ashli. Lt. Byrd did not give Ashli any
> warnings or commands before shooting her dead.

***

> Ashli remained conscious for minutes or longer after being shot by
> Lt. Byrd. Ashli experienced extreme pain, suffering, mental anguish,
> and intense fear before slipping into pre-terminal unconsciousness.
> The autopsy report identified the cause of death as a “gunshot
> wound to left anterior shoulder” with an onset interval of
> “minutes.” The fact that Ashli was alive and conscious in
> extreme pain and suffering is documented in videos of the shooting.
> Furthermore, nothing about the wound track described in the autopsy
> report would be expected to result in immediate death or
> instantaneous loss of consciousness, and Ashli’s lungs contained
> blood, further confirming that she was alive and breathing after
> being shot. Ashli was pronounced dead at Washington Hospital Center
> at 3:15 p.m. The medical examiner determined that the manner of
> death was homicide.
The lawsuit argues that, based on prior incidents involving Lt. Byrd,
the Capitol Police, Capitol Police Board, and ultimately Congress, as
Lt. Byrd’s employer, “knew or should have known that Lt. Byrd was
prone to behave in a dangerous or otherwise incompetent manner:”

> Less than two years before January 6, 2021, on or about February 25,
> 2019, Lt. Byrd left his loaded Glock 22 – the same firearm he used
> to shoot and kill Ashli Babbitt – in a bathroom in the Capitol
> Visitor Center (CVC) complex. Lt. Byrd’s loaded Glock was
> discovered during a routine security sweep later the same day.
> Approximately 15,00 to 20,000 people pass through the CVC, which
> serves as the main entrance for visitors to the U.S. Capitol, daily
> during peak season (March-July). Lawmakers and staff charged with
> oversight of the USCP were not made aware of the incident until
> contacted by a reporter.

> Lt. Byrd’s police powers had been revoked on more than one
> occasion prior to January 6, 2021, for failing to meet or complete
> semiannual firearms qualification requirements. In fact, Lt. Byrd
> had a reputation among peers for not being a good shot. Under
> USCP’s range management system, an officer who fails to meet
> firearm qualification requirements is given one week of remedial
> training. If the officer still fails to qualify after remedial
> training, police powers are then revoked until the officer
> qualifies.
>
> Lt. Byrd’s police powers also were revoked for a prior off-duty
> shooting into a stolen, moving vehicle in which the occupants were
> teenagers or juveniles. The stolen vehicle was Lt. Byrd’s car. Lt.
> Byrd fired multiple shots at the fleeing vehicle in a suburban area.
> Stray bullets from Lt. Byrd’s firearm struck the sides of homes
> nearby. An official investigation found that Lt. Byrd’s use of
> force was not justified.
Plaintiffs seek “the full and just amount of Thirty Million Dollars
($30,000,000), plus costs and interest according to law, and any and
all further relief to which Plaintiffs may be justly entitled.”

The lawsuit was filed in the U.S. District Court Southern District of
California.

We and our supporters are honored to represent Ashli’s steadfast
widower Aaron Babbitt and her estate in this legal action. Ashli was
shot in cold blood and the rule of law requires justice for her.

We are extensively investigating the events of January 6.

In October, we announced
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66450&L=30448&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvamFudWFyeS02Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=a77953b8f6362a426fe92288d2bcedc210cb7e2efed6c897ce678d949b2e18ac]
that we received the court-ordered declaration
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66450&L=30428&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdXMtY2FwaXRvbC1wb2xpY2UtZGVjbGFyYXRpb24tamFtZXMtdy1qb3ljZS0wMDQwMS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=48268c79fb3ebf553b981bfa02ef3ab2fb0b9b8530a642d4293530034a35b709]
of James W. Joyce, senior counsel in the Office of the General Counsel
for the Capitol Police, in which he describes emails among senior
officials of the United States Capitol Police (USCP) in January 2021
that show warnings of possible January 6 protests that could lead to
serious disruptions at the U.S. Capitol.

In September, we received records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66450&L=30173&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvamFudWFyeS02LXByb3Rlc3RvcnMtdGFyZ2V0ZWQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=aea6cd69ab6202353613d55e61ca57aa6dbaea0fa7f6a9fb55670a0e84ce80bf]
from
the Executive Office for United States Attorneys, a component of the
Department of Justice, in a FOIA lawsuit that detail the extensive
apparatus the Biden Justice Department set up to investigate and
prosecute January 6 protestors.

A previous review of records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66450&L=27468&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9qLW1lbW8tZGVjbGluaW5nLWNyaW1pbmFsLXByb3NlY3V0aW9uLWZvci1hc2hsaS1iYWJiaXR0cy1zaG9vdGVyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=41ce3ea074016e98d598ba0001ebc54e5c81cca54c9c3874bf3d4ddf65491b70]
from that lawsuit highlighted the prosecution declination memorandum
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66450&L=30140&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWJhYml0dC1wcm9kLTItMDI0NjIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=92f9d59e1261fc13b96d50e275fa7ae31ff6d9158ba5f9188159ad638ff4987b]
justifying the decision not to prosecute U.S. Capitol Police Lt.
Michael Byrd for the shooting death of Babbitt.

In January 2023, documents
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66450&L=28679&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGF4cGF5ZXItZG9sbGFycy1zcGVudC10by1ob3VzZS1hc2hsaS1iYWJiaXR0LXNob290ZXIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=633cbe041dfc81b92901f0d684e447c18682527e5f55a00f44fee872d6dbc45c]
from the Department of the Air Force, Joint Base Andrews, MD, showed

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES BIDEN CENSORSHIP AGENCY

Judicial Watch and I have been censored again and again by the
government and Big Tech. And we are fighting back.

We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the
Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for failing to respond to an
October 11, 2023, FOIA request for all records regarding Judicial
Watch and me held by DHS’ Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security
Agency (CISA) (_Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland
Security_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66450&L=31012&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLWNpc2EtY29tcGxhaW50LTAwMDAzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=a9d7fee07b1e1dbc41e69a4e333f964cf4686dec54efc556ffef4ab0d6f50958]
(No. 1:24-cv-00003).

That we had to file a federal lawsuit to get basic information about
this targeting is another sure sign that CISA has been up to no good.

Our request specifically asked that the search for responsive records
include email accounts of CISA officials publicly implicated in
censorship operations.

On November 6, 2023, the House Judiciary Committee released a report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66450&L=30663&F=T&&hash=4d6264b028ca228bcd8382044a55869b032851684d54f56169b77394b0f8667f]
detailing “how the Department of Homeland Security’s (DHS)
Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) and the Global
Engagement Center (GEC, within the State Department) coordinated with
Stanford University and other entities to create the Election
Integrity Partnership to censor Americans’ speech in the lead-up to
the 2020 election.” I am listed as a target of this censorship
operation.

We have been in the forefront of uncovering government efforts to
censor free speech and suppress opposition.

On November 9, 2023, we reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66450&L=30685&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvMjAyMC1lbGVjdGlvbi1kaXNpbmZvcm1hdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=2562328abf89c31844e2dc1562a13597c1191d41bbde2c5c32afbb98b49970b0]

CONVICTIONS

They’re not sending us their best and brightest. Included with those
coming across our border are criminals and suspected terrorists, as
our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports

>

> enforcement arrests nearly doubled in a year in which thousands of
> criminals were apprehended including dozens of known or suspected

> Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) arrested 170,590 illegal

>
> Among the most pervasive criminal offenses were Driving Under the

> The law enforcement agency with a staff of around 20,000 also

clean_body: Pursuing the Censorship Conspiracy [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH FILES $30 MILLION SUIT ON BEHALF OF ASHLI BABBITT’S HUSBAND AND ESTATE [] The only homicide on January 6 was the unlawful shooting death of Ashli Babbitt. Her homicide by Lt. Michael Byrd is a scandal beyond belief. We have filed a historic lawsuit seeking a measure of justice and government accountability for Ashli’s death. We filed the wrongful death suit against the U.S. Government on behalf of Ashli’s family. She was a U.S. Air Force veteran who was shot and killed inside the U.S. Capitol by then-Capitol Police Lt. Byrd on January 6, 2021 (Estate of Ashli Babbitt and Aaron Babbitt, et al. v. United States of America [] (No. 3:24-cv-00033). The lawsuit includes claims against the U.S. Government for wrongful death, assault and battery, and various negligence issues. Babbitt was a 35-year-old resident of San Diego, California, where she owned and operated a successful pool business with her husband Aaron. Ashli traveled alone from San Diego to Washington, DC, to attend the Women for America First (aka Save America) rally on January 6, 2021, at the Ellipse. As the lawsuit details: Ashli loved her country and wanted to show her support for President Trump’s America First policies and to see and hear the president speak live while he remained in office. Ashli did not go to Washington as part of a group or for any unlawful or nefarious purpose. She was there to exercise what she believed were her God-given, American liberties and freedoms. After the rally, Ashli, like a great many other patriotic Americans attending the rally, walked to the Capitol peacefully, a distance of approximately 1.5 miles. Two undercover Metropolitan Police Department officers followed close behind Ashli as she climbed the stairs to the West Terrace. Ashli entered the Capitol on the Senate side long after others had done so. Once inside, Ashli encountered a female Capitol Police officer, who directed her to walk south toward the House side. Ashli complied, walking alone through the Capitol and ultimately arriving at the hallway outside the main door to the House chamber, where demonstrators had gathered. From there, Ashli walked by herself east, along the hallway outside the House chamber, then turned south, reaching the hallway outside the Speaker’s Lobby at the southeast corner of the Capitol. * The shooting occurred at the east entrance to the Speaker’s Lobby. After demonstrators filled the hallway outside the lobby, two individuals in the crowded, tightly packed hallway struck and dislodged the glass panels in the lobby doors and the right door sidelight. Lt. Byrd, who is a USCP commander and was the incident commander for the House on January 6, 2021, shot Ashli on sight as she raised herself up into the opening of the right door sidelight. Lt. Byrd later confessed that he shot Ashli before seeing her hands or assessing her intentions or even identifying her as female. Ashli was unarmed. Her hands were up in the air, empty, and in plain view of Lt. Byrd and other officers in the lobby. The facts speak truth. Ashli was ambushed when she was shot by Lt. Byrd. Multiple witnesses at the scene yelled, “you just murdered her.” Lt. Byrd was never charged or otherwise punished or disciplined for Ashli’s homicide. The lawsuit further states: Lt. Byrd, who is a USCP commander and was the incident commander for the House on January 6, 2021, shot Ashli as she raised herself up into the opening of the right door sidelight.... Not one member of Congress was in the lobby, which was guarded by multiple armed police officers. Additional armed police officers were in the hallway outside the lobby and/or on the adjoining stairway. Ashli could not have seen Lt. Byrd, who was positioned far to Ashli’s left and on the opposite side of the doors, near an opening to the Retiring Room, a distance of approximately 15 feet and an angle of approximately 160 degrees. Sgt. Timothy Lively, one of the armed officers guarding the lobby doors from the hallway, later told officials investigating the shooting, “I saw him . . . there was no way that woman would’ve seen that.” Lt. Byrd, who was not in uniform, did not identify himself as a police officer or otherwise make his presence known to Ashli. Lt. Byrd did not give Ashli any warnings or commands before shooting her dead. * Ashli remained conscious for minutes or longer after being shot by Lt. Byrd. Ashli experienced extreme pain, suffering, mental anguish, and intense fear before slipping into pre-terminal unconsciousness. The autopsy report identified the cause of death as a “gunshot wound to left anterior shoulder” with an onset interval of “minutes.” The fact that Ashli was alive and conscious in extreme pain and suffering is documented in videos of the shooting. Furthermore, nothing about the wound track described in the autopsy report would be expected to result in immediate death or instantaneous loss of consciousness, and Ashli’s lungs contained blood, further confirming that she was alive and breathing after being shot. Ashli was pronounced dead at Washington Hospital Center at 3:15 p.m. The medical examiner determined that the manner of death was homicide. The lawsuit argues that, based on prior incidents involving Lt. Byrd, the Capitol Police, Capitol Police Board, and ultimately Congress, as Lt. Byrd’s employer, “knew or should have known that Lt. Byrd was prone to behave in a dangerous or otherwise incompetent manner:” Less than two years before January 6, 2021, on or about February 25, 2019, Lt. Byrd left his loaded Glock 22 – the same firearm he used to shoot and kill Ashli Babbitt – in a bathroom in the Capitol Visitor Center (CVC) complex. Lt. Byrd’s loaded Glock was discovered during a routine security sweep later the same day. Approximately 15,00 to 20,000 people pass through the CVC, which serves as the main entrance for visitors to the U.S. Capitol, daily during peak season (March-July). Lawmakers and staff charged with oversight of the USCP were not made aware of the incident until contacted by a reporter. Lt. Byrd’s police powers had been revoked on more than one occasion prior to January 6, 2021, for failing to meet or complete semiannual firearms qualification requirements. In fact, Lt. Byrd had a reputation among peers for not being a good shot. Under USCP’s range management system, an officer who fails to meet firearm qualification requirements is given one week of remedial training. If the officer still fails to qualify after remedial training, police powers are then revoked until the officer qualifies. Lt. Byrd’s police powers also were revoked for a prior off-duty shooting into a stolen, moving vehicle in which the occupants were teenagers or juveniles. The stolen vehicle was Lt. Byrd’s car. Lt. Byrd fired multiple shots at the fleeing vehicle in a suburban area. Stray bullets from Lt. Byrd’s firearm struck the sides of homes nearby. An official investigation found that Lt. Byrd’s use of force was not justified. Plaintiffs seek “the full and just amount of Thirty Million Dollars ($30,000,000), plus costs and interest according to law, and any and all further relief to which Plaintiffs may be justly entitled.” The lawsuit was filed in the U.S. District Court Southern District of California. We and our supporters are honored to represent Ashli’s steadfast widower Aaron Babbitt and her estate in this legal action. Ashli was shot in cold blood and the rule of law requires justice for her. We are extensively investigating the events of January 6. In October, we announced [] that we received the court-ordered declaration [] of James W. Joyce, senior counsel in the Office of the General Counsel for the Capitol Police, in which he describes emails among senior officials of the United States Capitol Police (USCP) in January 2021 that show warnings of possible January 6 protests that could lead to serious disruptions at the U.S. Capitol. In September, we received records [] from the Executive Office for United States Attorneys, a component of the Department of Justice, in a FOIA lawsuit that detail the extensive apparatus the Biden Justice Department set up to investigate and prosecute January 6 protestors. A previous review of records [] from that lawsuit highlighted the prosecution declination memorandum [] justifying the decision not to prosecute U.S. Capitol Police Lt. Michael Byrd for the shooting death of Babbitt. In January 2023, documents [] from the Department of the Air Force, Joint Base Andrews, MD, showed U.S. Capitol Police Lieutenant Michael Byrd was housed at taxpayer expense at Joint Base Andrews after he shot and killed U.S. Air Force veteran Ashli Babbitt inside the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021. In November 2021, we released [] multiple audio [], visua [ [] and photo records [] from the DC Metropolitan Police Department about the shooting death of Babbitt on January 6, 2021, in the U.S. Capitol Building. The records included a cell phone video [] of the shooting and an audio of a brief police interview of the shooter, Byrd. In October 2021, United States Park Police records [] related to the January 6, 2021, demonstrations at the U.S. Capitol showed that on the day before the January 6 rally featuring President Trump, U.S. Park Police expected a “large portion” of the attendees to march to the U.S. Capitol and that the FBI was monitoring the January 6 demonstrations, including travel to the events by “subjects of interest.” JUDICIAL WATCH SUES BIDEN CENSORSHIP AGENCY Judicial Watch and I have been censored again and again by the government and Big Tech. And we are fighting back. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for failing to respond to an October 11, 2023, FOIA request for all records regarding Judicial Watch and me held by DHS’ Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [] (No. 1:24-cv-00003). That we had to file a federal lawsuit to get basic information about this targeting is another sure sign that CISA has been up to no good. Our request specifically asked that the search for responsive records include email accounts of CISA officials publicly implicated in censorship operations. On November 6, 2023, the House Judiciary Committee released a report [] detailing “how the Department of Homeland Security’s (DHS) Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) and the Global Engagement Center (GEC, within the State Department) coordinated with Stanford University and other entities to create the Election Integrity Partnership to censor Americans’ speech in the lead-up to the 2020 election.” I am listed as a target of this censorship operation. We have been in the forefront of uncovering government efforts to censor free speech and suppress opposition. On November 9, 2023, we reported [] that “CISA records show government involvement in the EIP [Election Integrity Partnership] pressure on Google, Twitter, Facebook, TikTok, Pinterest, Reddit and other platforms to censor ‘disinformation.’” In October 2023, we sued [] the Department of Justice (DOJ) for records of any payments made by the FBI to Twitter (now known as X). The payments were disclosed in internal Twitter documents (the “Twitter Files”) made available by Elon Musk to journalists. Also in October, we sued [] the U.S. Office of the Director of National Intelligence [] (ODNI) for records concerning censorship of social media users. In April 2023, we filed [] two lawsuits against the U.S. Department of Justice and other federal agencies for communications between the agencies and Facebook and Twitter regarding the government’s involvement in content moderation and censorship on the social media platforms. In a separate lawsuit file in June 2023, we sued [] DHS for all records of communications tied to the Election Integrity Partnership. Based on representations from the EIP (see here [] and here []), the federal government, social media companies, the EIP, the Center for Internet Security [] (a non-profit organization funded partly by DHS and the Defense Department []) and numerous other leftist groups communicated privately via the Jira [] software platform developed by Atlassian. In February 2023, we sued [] the DHS for records showing cooperation between CISA and social media platforms to censor and suppress free speech. In January 2023 we sued [] the DOJ for records of communications between the FBI and social media sites regarding foreign influence in elections, as well as the Hunter Biden laptop story. In September 2022, we sued [] the Secretary of State of the State of California for having YouTube censor a Judicial Watch election integrity video. In May 2022, YouTube censored a Judicial Watch video about Biden corruption and election integrity issues in the 2020 election. The video [], titled “Impeach? Biden Corruption Threatens National Security,” was falsely determined to be “election misinformation” and removed by YouTube, and Judicial Watch’s YouTube account was suspended for a week. The video featured an interview with me. Judicial Watch continues to post its video [] content on its Rumble channel (). In July 2021, we uncovered [] records from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), which revealed that Facebook coordinated closely with the CDC to control the Covid narrative and “misinformation” and that over $3.5 million in free advertising given to the CDC by social media companies. In May 2021, we revealed [] documents showing that Iowa state officials pressured social media companies Twitter and Facebook to censor posts about the 2020 election. In April 2021, we published [] documents revealing how California state officials pressured social media companies (Twitter, Facebook, Google (YouTube)) to censor posts about the 2020 election. We have produced a four-part documentary, “Censored and Controlled [ that details the coordinated effort by the FBI and other government agencies and Big Tech to censor and suppress information on topics such as Hunter Biden’s laptop, Covid-19, and election debates. NEARLY HALF OF ILLEGALS ARRESTED IN 2023 HAD MULTIPLE CHARGES, CONVICTIONS They’re not sending us their best and brightest. Included with those coming across our border are criminals and suspected terrorists, as our Corruption Chronicles blog reports []. As a result of the Biden administration’s reckless open border policies the federal agency charged with enforcing immigration laws inside the United States is getting slammed and discloses in its latest annual report [] that enforcement arrests nearly doubled in a year in which thousands of criminals were apprehended including dozens of known or suspected terrorists. In fiscal year 2023, which ended in September, Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) arrested 170,590 illegal immigrants inside the country, almost half of them with criminal records. The criminal aliens had an average of four charges and convictions each, including more than 33,209 charges or convictions for assault, 7,520 for weapons offenses, 1,713 for homicide-related crimes and 1,615 for kidnapping. Removals also included 3,406 known or suspected gang members, 139 known or suspected terrorists, seven human rights violators, and 108 foreign fugitives wanted by their government for crimes including homicide, rape, terrorism, and kidnapping. Among the most pervasive criminal offenses were Driving Under the Influence (DUI) and possession of serious drugs. Assault was also quite common among the undocumented perpetrators arrested last year and so were weapons offenses, sexual assault, and burglary. Thousands of the arrested migrants stole vehicles, were charged and/or convicted of fraudulent activities, robbery, forgery and property damage. More than 1,000 committed homicide and kidnapping and other types of threats not specified but considered serious enough by the government to be included in the year-end figures. “At-large arrests grew as broader migration trends contributed to an increase in unlawful entries to the Southwest border, driven by factors such as violence, food scarcity, severe poverty, unemployment, corruption, climate change, the ongoing impact of the COVID-19 pandemic, and dire economic conditions outside the United States,” the ICE report states. The law enforcement agency with a staff of around 20,000 also conducted more than 200,000 domestic transfers of illegal immigrants last year and managed a record number of migrants under a controversial Biden administration catch-and-release policy known as Parole Plus Alternative to Detention (Parole+ATD) that freed over a million illegal aliens in the U.S. in a year, supposedly tracking them with technology and other tools. ICE Health Service Corps also spent a whopping $352 million to provide medical, dental, and mental health services for illegal immigrants detained in facilities throughout the nation, according to figures included in the document. “Those in ICE custody speak dozens of languages, including rare indigenous dialects, and the population includes individuals with a wide range of health statuses and unique physical and mental healthcare requirements — including some who receive comprehensive medical care for the first time after they are booked into detention,” the report says. ICE’s Homeland Security Investigations (HSI) division conducted an unprecedented number of investigations last year and executed 14,000 “noncitizen apprehensions,” seized an astounding 1.2 million pounds of narcotics, confiscated $5 million in assets and property, identified 1,806 victims of child exploitation, helped 731 victims of human trafficking, seized $949 million in criminally derived assets and more than $148 million in virtual currency from criminal elements. In cases involving drug cartels—officially known as Transnational Criminal Organizations (TCO)—that smuggle humans, narcotics, and money, HSI seized 69 firearms, 14,182 rounds of ammunition, 4,846 pounds of illicit drugs, and over $383,446 in currency. In one program alone, known as Operation Blue Lotus, HSI partnered with Customs and Border Protection (CBP), the frontline Homeland Security agency, to seize more than 8,200 pounds of fentanyl. The distressing figures in the new ICE report are hardly surprising considering that 2023 was a record-breaker for illegal immigration with a ghastly 2.48 million foreigners entering the U.S. through the southern border, surpassing what was previously a historical high of 2.38 million in 2022. The last month of the fiscal year (September), federal agents encountered an unbelievable 269,735 illegal aliens constituting an all-time high for a single month and a substantial increase over August. The crisis is only worsening with time. This week a mainstream media outlet reports that there were 302,000 migrant encounters [ the southwest border in December, marking the highest monthly total ever recorded. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: An honest update on this race:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I need your help [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Friends, I've run a lot of tough races in my life, but this race is certain to be my toughest yet. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
CNN says I'm one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot. Politico says Ohio could decide Senate control. A Trump-allied dark money group is already running attack ads against me. And now, my wealthy GOP opponents are holding country club fundraisers and writing their campaigns multimillion dollar checks to try and buy this seat.
Without critical grassroots support from folks like you, I simply cannot fight back and compete. That's why I've set an ambitious $100,000 mid-month fundraising goal and have to ask you to split $5 or more right now between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand's to help me get there. Please, will you donate now? [http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_sherrodbrown?refcode=jtk4225-bu-text&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250]
Friends, I'm fighting everyday in the Senate for the Dignity of Work – all work. Whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or work for tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I'm fighting for you.
Meanwhile, my millionaire GOP opponents have spent their lives profiting off of a system that too often puts the bottom line over the actual needs of workers and their families. That's not what Ohioans, or Americans, deserve.
I know we can defend this seat and keep making meaningful progress together – so please, friend : Will you split a donation between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand's before the crucial mid-month deadline tonight at midnight? Every dollar goes a long way toward winning in Ohio and keeping the Senate blue. [http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_sherrodbrown?refcode=jtk4225-bu-text&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250]
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_sherrodbrown?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_sherrodbrown?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_sherrodbrown?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_sherrodbrown?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
I can't thank you enough for your support.
Sherrod

name: Robert Garcia
subject: The American people deserve better than a fraudster President.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76574828/447852459/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjhkNmU3ZS0yZWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2HMkhTo4Mbp2fzELSv_mxbGjrpJx1hyh1ZK3dBGfm9g=)
Friend,
Yesterday, I joined Congressman Jaime Raskin and Congresswoman Jasmine Crockett of the House Oversight Committee to release a damning report of the illegal gifts and payments that the Trump family received from foreign governments while Trump was in office.
**While in office, Trump’s businesses received at least $7.8 million from 20 foreign governments.**
Hear what I have to say about the report here:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76574829/447852460/-615761990?refcode=em240105-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjhkNmU3ZS0yZWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2HMkhTo4Mbp2fzELSv_mxbGjrpJx1hyh1ZK3dBGfm9g=&emci=57611de8-2bac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=ef8d6e7e-2eac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=16877361)
Donald Trump declared he would be the first to make money off the presidency. Now, we’ve found the evidence to prove he did. He and his family illegally took millions from foreign governments — payments and bribes that are a clear violation of the Constitution.
The millions in receipts and documents represent just the tip of the iceberg. The nearly $8 million found is from only four properties owned by Trump out of his hundreds of properties and businesses around the world. We do not doubt for a second that his crimes go deeper than what we have found. The Trump family needs to be held accountable.
But, of course, the Republican chair of the Oversight Committee halted the investigation as soon as he could, all while the GOP continued pushing their failed year long search to find incriminating evidence against President Biden.
The GOP continues to prioritize their political interests over accountability.
But as long as I am in Congress, I will continue my fight to hold criminals like Trump accountable publicly, because the American people deserve better than a fraudster President.
**[If you are with me, please contribute $3 or whatever you can afford to my reelection campaign for Congress so I can continue to fight for the accountability of lawmakers.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76574830/447852461/-1908375242?refcode2=ef8d6e7e-2eac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&refcode=em240105-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjhkNmU3ZS0yZWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2HMkhTo4Mbp2fzELSv_mxbGjrpJx1hyh1ZK3dBGfm9g=)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76574831/447852462/-1908375242?refcode2=ef8d6e7e-2eac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&refcode=em240105-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjhkNmU3ZS0yZWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2HMkhTo4Mbp2fzELSv_mxbGjrpJx1hyh1ZK3dBGfm9g=)**
Thank you for standing by my side,
Robert Garcia

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76574957/447853547/1072501871?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2NhMjM2ZWEtMmVhYy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gMe_3-fyi8VedC9ClyC9h4nboWKLOWiHgcxUDMy4fpI=)

Team — I can’t thank you enough for your support.

The path to the Senate majority runs right through Montana. 2. I’m one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators. Political experts are saying my seat is one of the most likely to flip red unless folks like you help us. 3. Over $70 MILLION was spent in 2018. So we’re gearing up for the most expensive and competitive race Montana has ever seen. Look, I know the election might seem far away, but the GOP has already launched vicious attack ads against me and I need your immediate help to fight back. Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cb7f5ff36ad2419d84702c635466dd76&_e=dksA7WP8-pubry9ASx-gNrEM2qAqgkrgYTWmf-QEobw_kD4SdHsOD-u9ubWGEeqZJIOFyRDye8KiydRqwVGpwVNsilOZZiNAioMsdmuCKpmL8RF0YlwE1CvEuFeUKDox3TBOqEBUKGjGicrlvVrRB8N_BgmmqlcrXLxXBCBwIcSew56qQkoe7xxhYm4aALRXIF9SbRvJoi8fl3n8RqSOW0L-i2yuHmua9IVYmVLzXnxnQNKF-uebj2G-7nUeQrNv9YOkRgFmsNJ0MXe8HjOyMFgv9iNi3inEQ4QV-z1jMht5afj48tNcec1VKqtLLm50QWANUzk12CD6eeDXCNK5lwP2OrPorExQ4Au2iGIWGSaA8kLLdZLvaLlSCdNv0GSEi3bOum6BvDhOYr7oi6Mx8Q%3D%3D)
The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

[**So please help me out this one time, Friend:**](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cb7f5ff36ad2419d84702c635466dd76&_e=dksA7WP8-pubry9ASx-gNrEM2qAqgkrgYTWmf-QEobw_kD4SdHsOD-u9ubWGEeqZJIOFyRDye8KiydRqwVGpwVNsilOZZiNAioMsdmuCKpmL8RF0YlwE1CvEuFeUKDox3TBOqEBUKGjGicrlvVrRB8N_BgmmqlcrXLxXBCBwIcSew56qQkoe7xxhYm4aALRXIF9SbRvJoi8fl3n8RqSOW0L-i2yuHmua9IVYmVLzXnxnQNKF-uebj2G-7nUeQrNvUit3CPx2ryrikvtM1-47mUrEECdB7GTqbjnQGYHkslNy09u2DS_Axuf3ocycj0XBxOB9JgUeGPhDso4ar5H2fq_8w3LOQ_4AkfzcdaLruKbNL7O7YOnuAPuk9FbZEIH1KjZwI9xkZuo-8YRLBymYbw%3D%3D)

Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today.

I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals.

I intend to make you proud.

God Bless,

Jim Banks

clean_body: Friend... | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today. I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Tom Suozzi
subject: Our first big test of 2024

body:
the NY-03 special is key
| Hi there, it’s Tom Suozzi. I’m the Democratic nominee in NY-03 to replace the expelled George Santos, and we have a special election coming up on February 13.

Team, the implications of this election in just a few weeks are huge. There’s so much at stake for Nassau, Queens, and the whole country. Everyone is watching to see if we can finally break through the partisan gridlock in Congress to get things done and solve the critical problems our country faces. With George Santos gone, we have a chance to do just that.

**In short, team, we have to win. This special election will set the tone for all of 2024–including the general election in November.**

[_So, team, I’m asking if you’ll split a contribution between the Voter Protection Project and I so we can win NY-03, finally get to solving the problems our country faces, and start off 2024 with a big win?_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59193?t=6&akid=12337%2E878179%2EdUXZFL) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Tom Suozzi and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59194?t=7&akid=12337%2E878179%2EdUXZFL)

| | Patriot,

---
Just a few short hours ago, in one of the most ridiculous speeches I’ve ever heard, Crooked Joe Biden likened himself to _George_ _Washington_ ...
---
...And likened his reelection campaign to the war for freedom that Washington led to secure our independence.
---
_This is the very same Joe Biden, who is actively attempting to_** _ERASE_** _your sacred right to vote by having my name_ _**_REMOVED_**_ _from the 2024 ballot..._
---
_The same man who had his leading political opponent (yours truly) unlawfully**ARRESTED** FOUR TIMES, and is trying to jail me for life as an innocent man... _
---
_And the same Crook who had his Department of “Justice” gag and censor me!_
---
Does that sound like our nation’s hero – George Washington – to you?
---
Today, Biden even declared that _“_ _America made a vow — never again would we bow down to a king.”_
---
And yet, on this very day, I look at the Crook currently occupying the White House and see no difference between Joe Biden and a Marxist Third World Dictator desperate to remain in power.
---
**Crooked Joe is the TRUE threat to democracy.**
---
He is the man actively trying to destroy our once great country from within... _A man who is more than happy to NULLIFY the votes of a_ __majority__ _of Americans before they even have the chance to cast a ballot!_
---
But worst of all, Crooked Joe didn’t _just_ falsely praise himself in his absurd speech...
---
**He attacked**** _OUR_****movement – he attacked** _**YOU**_**.**
---
_And right now, you can PROVE to Crooked Joe and the Radical Democrats that the very same Americans he _attacks are_ the *_REAL*_ saviors of our country._
---
_Because patriots like YOU will_** _NEVER, EVER SURRENDER_** _to his Third World tyranny!_
---

If you want to ensure our emails always go to your inbox, please add [contact@support.donaldjtrump.com](mailto:contact@support.donaldjtrump.com) to your address book.
Thank you for joining Team Trump. It’s because of grassroots supporters like YOU that we’ve been able to consistently call out the Fake News media EVERY SINGLE TIME they try to spread misinformation or outright LIES about the important work President Trump is doing to SAVE AMERICA. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.
**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.
It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. clean_body: The same Crooked Joe who’s tearing our Free Republic to shreds.| | | | | Patriot, Just a few short hours ago, in one of the most ridiculous speeches I’ve ever heard, Crooked Joe Biden likened himself to George Washington ... ...And likened his reelection campaign to the war for freedom that Washington led to secure our independence. This is the very same Joe Biden, who is actively attempting to ERASE your sacred right to vote by having my name REMOVED from the 2024 ballot... The same man who had his leading political opponent (yours truly) unlawfullyARRESTED FOUR TIMES, and is trying to jail me for life as an innocent man... And the same Crook who had his Department of “Justice” gag and censor me! Does that sound like our nation’s hero – George Washington – to you? Today, Biden even declared that “ America made a vow — never again would we bow down to a king.” And yet, on this very day, I look at the Crook currently occupying the White House and see no difference between Joe Biden and a Marxist Third World Dictator desperate to remain in power. Crooked Joe is the TRUE threat to democracy. He is the man actively trying to destroy our once great country from within... A man who is more than happy to NULLIFY the votes of a majority of Americans before they even have the chance to cast a ballot! But worst of all, Crooked Joe didn’t just falsely praise himself in his absurd speech... He attacked OURmovement – he attacked YOU. And right now, you can PROVE to Crooked Joe and the Radical Democrats that the very same Americans he attacks are the REAL saviors of our country. Because patriots like YOU will NEVER, EVER SURRENDER to his Third World tyranny! | | Thank you, God bless you, and God bless America! Donald J. Trump45th (and Future 47th President) of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Adam
subject: Breaking News: Supreme Court to hear case on Trump’s disqualification
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4985%2E5257348%2EJYY2Wd)
Derek — I just hopped off the air on _MSNBC_ with Joy Reid.
Before I share what we discussed, can you chip in to my campaign? Californians start voting in just a few weeks, and I need your support now more than ever. You can pitch in here: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/jan2024_abs_em](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240105_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4985%2E5257348%2EJYY2Wd)**
Tomorrow marks a somber anniversary in our country’s history — January 6, the horrific insurrection on the United States Capitol.
And the Supreme Court just agreed to hear the case on whether Trump’s role in inciting that attack should disqualify him from appearing on the ballot.
I spoke with Joy Reid about it and the clear language of Section 3 of the 14th Amendment which disqualifies someone from the ballot after engaging in insurrection.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240105_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4985%2E5257348%2EJYY2Wd)
I also talked about how Justice Clarence Thomas has a clear conflict of interest and should recuse himself from participating in this case, given his wife’s role in the events leading up to January 6.
But I also expressed the view that I am skeptical that this partisan and reactionary Supreme Court will follow the Constitution. It is my expectation that we will have to defeat Trump at the ballot box again to save our democracy.
**Derek, I am doing everything I can to hold Trump to account for what he did on January 6, 2021. That’s why he fears what will happen if I make it to the U.S. Senate — and why he continues to attack me at his campaign rallies.**
**Please help me defend our Constitution and the rule of law. You can chip in here:[secure.actblue.com/donate/jan2024_abs_em](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240105_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4985%2E5257348%2EJYY2Wd)**
Thank you,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240105_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=4985%2E5257348%2EJYY2Wd)

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: We don’t want to wake up on March 6 wondering what else we could have done.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We’re just two months out from our crucial primary election on March 5.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=35990%2E3422442%2EDlrCPF)
Derek, Katie has spent her career taking on special interests and delivering for working people. But if she loses our March 5 primary, we lose her voice in Congress for good.
**That’s right, there are just TWO months until our primary election and ONE month until ballots are mailed to voters.**
We’re running against a candidate who has an unprecedented **$35 million in the bank.** And remember—Katie is the only candidate who doesn’t accept corporate PAC or federal lobbyist money.
**We don’t want to wake up on March 6 wondering what else we could have done to elect Katie to the Senate.** If you’ve been waiting for the best time to make your first contribution, this is it.
**[Will you contribute $5 right now—with exactly 61 days until the primary—to help us reach the voters who will decide the outcome of the primary election on March 5? Your contribution today couldn’t be more important.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240105-2?refcode=EMAP24_2_TWO_20240105_V1_F&refcode2=35990_3422442_DlrCPF&akid=35990%2E3422442%2EDlrCPF)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240105-2?refcode=EMAP24_2_TWO_20240105_V1_F&refcode2=35990_3422442_DlrCPF&akid=35990%2E3422442%2EDlrCPF)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240105-2?refcode=EMAP24_2_TWO_20240105_V1_F&refcode2=35990_3422442_DlrCPF&akid=35990%2E3422442%2EDlrCPF)
Nearly 1/3 of California voters are still undecided about who they will vote for in the primary election on March 5. We know that Katie can win but we’re going to need the full strength of this movement to ensure we can reach these undecided voters.
We’re so grateful for your support,
-KPHQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAP24_2_TWO_20240105_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=35990_3422442_DlrCPF&akid=35990%2E3422442%2EDlrCPF)**

Peter — Lucas Kunce is the born-and-raised Missourian, 13-year Marine veteran, antitrust expert, and Democrat on a mission to flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat and fundamentally change who has power in our country.
Josh Hawley is the corrupt politician who’s obsessed with controlling people’s lives. He’s made it his personal mission to ban abortion access in all 50 states. And last year, he even published a whole creepy book about “manhood.”

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=956ff79ca17a41f8897f905d880839f9&_e=SJx_n2Yo5aYyOzkL5wFVX02Da3Ju7dtx3mbgKolGCHgRsyiddTwNffUkME3cOXx3Jt-bmk4tUTEfTVGz23ccBz6X4u1lQgXKRJxQaBuFTB4ctDsFYdUtPemapwcnvu6KlhiYEI-oZCC1t6-DBTlB-Wf1Z5MmakZ0rA2ZjBX6Hy0mUhATprtL4cwmramOn9j-QDwRN-7ZpYSO49KPBNkCs1TC06CNU1MYQf71kSFupwTjp0rjsSOFCKBnWvQP1faktmyOCheGLRG3MMP1dUElvvFPEcpA3lFxRFpuVvHd7UeXwpZgCblaIK_LEb9BC42vUxsc072ZWBZR8AVQtmnMacVEk1q86BL9EzqxDUhpGyX4DD5BACo3I3u0ra7zkPwQpNyVfLIXZNRHAjj8aNBq2Mj5aOfOn7QwJsTnUBHo_xRZdqqKTRRN79-8ctBaXXDvQqDCFHtCcxJZTqc1lmwZVg%3D%3D)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=956ff79ca17a41f8897f905d880839f9&_e=SJx_n2Yo5aYyOzkL5wFVX02Da3Ju7dtx3mbgKolGCHgRsyiddTwNffUkME3cOXx3Jt-bmk4tUTEfTVGz23ccBz6X4u1lQgXKRJxQaBuFTB4ctDsFYdUtPemapwcnvu6KlhiYEI-oZCC1t6-DBTlB-Wf1Z5MmakZ0rA2ZjBX6Hy0mUhATprtL4cwmramOn9j-QDwRN-7ZpYSO49KPBNkCs1TC06CNU1MYQf71kSFupwTjp0rjsSOFCKBnWvQP1faktmyOCheGLRG3MMP1dUElvvFPEcpA3lFxRFpuVvHd7UczjtXw_3YiHTtJfViT5g0mA5yD1uraQsaHrbSgqKeIfkT9m0r9T2SJItjkfc7jrhg8fS_z9VPrxn0b_2hyUFYxAfgadxDnauu5YqcT0s4H4yULRbAunAX9swZ___STqQUCQIdcokkrw2fsA8XrmANIwwEiddIvmKpuQHKixVtm0A%3D%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

The California Democratic Party’s Organizing Department is excited to highlight the stories of our staff members who are passionate about making a difference throughout our state.
From leading our organizing efforts to connecting with local community leaders, our organizing team is working in every corner of California to ensure we continue to elect Democrats up and down the ballot.

“There’s no re-election of President Biden and Vice President Harris without Latinos."
ICYMI: Voter turnout took center stage at our most recent Cafecito VOTA. CADEM is proud to be making historic investments in outreach to Latino voters in the Central Valley and across the state. The House majority runs through California. ¡Vamos a votar!

Congressional District 41 Candidate Will Rollins Meet & Greet
Endorsed Democrat Will Rollins, along with the slate of down-ballot Democrats and partners working hand-in-hand, are fighting to bring better representation to families in Palm Springs, Corona, La Quinta, and beyond!
Activists in congressional district 41 have hit the ground running, knocking doors and spreading the word about the upcoming election.

The California Democratic Party is a volunteer based organization! Our community activists are committed year-round to work with our organizing team to get out the vote and protect our democracy. CADEM is thrilled to highlight our local volunteers who continue to do their part in the Forever Organizing work.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/41516C68594F7632742B3462464A412F52623465634C6D4A386967336B52702B576E415A734B573754727A367363416A5331795337514763627843566E457269/editor_images/IMG_1978.jpg] cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction]
Karla Orosco
Kings County Democratic Central Committee
Hailing from Hanford, California, Karla Orosco is a proud Democrat and Union Member. Growing up, Karla took pride in being part of a Union family, as her father served as a teamster in the creamery business, and her mother worked at a local refinery and later with the IRS. In school, Karla and her brother excelled both academically and in sports, thanks to the coaching from their dad and support from their mother.
Active in both the marching band and a championship softball team as the pitcher, Karla graduated at the top of her class. She pursued her undergraduate studies at UC Berkeley and earned her teaching credential from CSU Sacramento. In the three decades since, Karla has dedicated herself to education as a middle school math and science teacher, while also coaching sports, teaching migrant pre-school, summer school, and adult education.
As a proud union member and education leader, Karla has actively participated at all levels of the National Education Association, California Teachers Association, and her local union. Serving on CTA's State Legislation Committee at the state level, she has been deeply involved in making change for working families in California. Karla has a passion for community service, volunteering with the Kings County Democratic Central Committee and the Jimmy Carter Club.
Raised in a Democratic household, Karla carries forward her family's commitment to community service and participation in the democratic process. In spite of living in one of the most conservative counties in California, she works to address the challenges of voter education, mobilization, and voter apathy.
In addition to being a teacher and elderly caregiver, Karla works tirelessly to reach voters, and urges her fellow Democrats to activate Gen-Z and young voters in particular, especially when it comes to local elections.
Karla volunteers at the Kings County Democratic Central Committee booth at the Hanford Marketplace every Thursday evening May through October, along with every other opportunity she finds to reach voters in her community. Karla says that she wants others in Kings County know that voting for Democrats is something to take pride in, and that nobody should be afraid to say how they vote.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/635A6877724445364E5733476A453038336A6E4B344D6D364B364438586C2B754C33516239543947597A665243507573756A79726B745359424C4B387A655266/editor_images/ForeverOrganizing%20%284%29.png]
We're exactly two months away from our March 5 primary election! Now more than ever, taking action with our Forever Organizing department will directly impact turnout in the most competitive regions in California.
Whether you're interested in calling voters, knocking on doors, hosting organizing actions with your Democratic club or group, or registering first time voters on college campuses, we're thrilled to be doing the good work with you.
Can we count on you to join us for an organizing action this month? Your efforts could mean the difference between winning and losing battleground congressional districts this year.
Statewide Organizing Actions → [cadem.org/takeaction]

You can join our organizing actions from anywhere, taking action to win targeted districts from the comfort of your own home, or you can take action in person at our canvass events!
By adopting a targeted district, you will mobilize and energize voters in neighborhoods with the biggest impact on taking back our House majority next year.
