clean_body: cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction] The California Democratic Party’s Organizing Department is excited to highlight the stories of our staff members who are passionate about making a difference throughout our state. From leading our organizing efforts to connecting with local community leaders, our organizing team is working in every corner of California to ensure we continue to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction] VOTA Program in the News “There’s no re-election of President Biden and Vice President Harris without Latinos." ICYMI: Voter turnout took center stage at our most recent Cafecito VOTA. CADEM is proud to be making historic investments in outreach to Latino voters in the Central Valley and across the state. The House majority runs through California. ¡Vamos a votar! [] Congressional District 3 Candidate Jessica Morse Meet & Greet Democrats across Placer County gathered to meet in Roseville with endorsed candidate and champion for change Jessica Morse! Forever Organizer Sue is building a movement in congressional district 3, with voters more excited than ever to bring better representation to Northern California. [] cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction] [] Congressional District 13 Candidate Adam Gray Meet & Greet Thank you! to the young and first time voters who joined us for our congressional district 13 candidate meet and greet. Endorsed candidate Adam Gray, along with the newly formed Madera Young Democrats chapter, are more excited than ever to be registering, educating, and mobilizing young and Latino voters in the North Valley! [] [] Congressional District 22 Candidate Rudy Salas Meet & Greet Activists and organizers across the South Central Valley joined endorsed candidate Rudy Salas during meet and greets throughout Kings and Kern Counties! With the help of our fired up organizers, and our wonderful coalition of partners, we're building up steam to send Rudy Salas to Washington, delivering better representation for neighborhoods in the Valley. [] cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction] [] Congressional District 27 Candidate George Whitesides Meet & Greet We were proud to host two successful meet and greets for George Whitesides, firing up activists and organizers in North Los Angeles county! Thank you! to our partners who joined us in Santa Clarita, including the Santa Clarita Valley Dems, Grassroots Dem. HQ, the LACDP, and Swing Left SFV. And much appreciation to our wonderful partners who joined us in Antelope Valley, including the Democratic Club of the High Desert, Indivisible Antelope Valley, LACDP, Swing Left West Valley, Grassroots Democrats HQ, Antelope Valley Democrats for Change, and Acton & Agua Dulce Democratic Club. [] [] Congressional District 41 Candidate Will Rollins Meet & Greet Endorsed Democrat Will Rollins, along with the slate of down-ballot Democrats and partners working hand-in-hand, are fighting to bring better representation to families in Palm Springs, Corona, La Quinta, and beyond! Activists in congressional district 41 have hit the ground running, knocking doors and spreading the word about the upcoming election. [] [] The California Democratic Party is a volunteer based organization! Our community activists are committed year-round to work with our organizing team to get out the vote and protect our democracy. CADEM is thrilled to highlight our local volunteers who continue to do their part in the Forever Organizing work. [] cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction] Karla Orosco Kings County Democratic Central Committee Hailing from Hanford, California, Karla Orosco is a proud Democrat and Union Member. Growing up, Karla took pride in being part of a Union family, as her father served as a teamster in the creamery business, and her mother worked at a local refinery and later with the IRS. In school, Karla and her brother excelled both academically and in sports, thanks to the coaching from their dad and support from their mother. Active in both the marching band and a championship softball team as the pitcher, Karla graduated at the top of her class. She pursued her undergraduate studies at UC Berkeley and earned her teaching credential from CSU Sacramento. In the three decades since, Karla has dedicated herself to education as a middle school math and science teacher, while also coaching sports, teaching migrant pre-school, summer school, and adult education. As a proud union member and education leader, Karla has actively participated at all levels of the National Education Association, California Teachers Association, and her local union. Serving on CTA's State Legislation Committee at the state level, she has been deeply involved in making change for working families in California. Karla has a passion for community service, volunteering with the Kings County Democratic Central Committee and the Jimmy Carter Club. Raised in a Democratic household, Karla carries forward her family's commitment to community service and participation in the democratic process. In spite of living in one of the most conservative counties in California, she works to address the challenges of voter education, mobilization, and voter apathy. In addition to being a teacher and elderly caregiver, Karla works tirelessly to reach voters, and urges her fellow Democrats to activate Gen-Z and young voters in particular, especially when it comes to local elections. Karla volunteers at the Kings County Democratic Central Committee booth at the Hanford Marketplace every Thursday evening May through October, along with every other opportunity she finds to reach voters in her community. Karla says that she wants others in Kings County know that voting for Democrats is something to take pride in, and that nobody should be afraid to say how they vote. [] We're exactly two months away from our March 5 primary election! Now more than ever, taking action with our Forever Organizing department will directly impact turnout in the most competitive regions in California. Whether you're interested in calling voters, knocking on doors, hosting organizing actions with your Democratic club or group, or registering first time voters on college campuses, we're thrilled to be doing the good work with you. **Look, we need you to be as _MAD_ as we are:** | **_IN 2016:_** Donald Trump won the Presidency despite losing the popular vote – this flies in the face of basic rules of Democracy!

**_IN 2020:_** Donald Trump LOST – the popular vote AND the Electoral College – and set his sights on overturning the election results.

**_NOW, IN 2024:_** Donald Trump is trying to coast into the presidency AGAIN using the Electoral College – **he could become president AGAIN without ever winning the popular vote!**

### Dom Jones for Assembly 2024

# A Momentous Endorsement for Dom Jones Campaign!
---
| |
# We are thrilled to announce a significant endorsement for the Dom Jones Campaign for California State Assembly in 2024!
---
| | The Center for Biological Diversity Action Fundhas officially endorsed Dom Jones as a candidate for California State Assembly District 72.This endorsement holds incredible meaning due to Dom Jones' unwavering dedication and commitment to environmental sustainability.
---
| |
# [What is The Center for Biological Diversity Action Fund?](https://www.domjones.org/so/13OpSzzWO/c?w=d1T9Ci7pP7JBXDoPfdO0752rW7m0fn74wo1-8wY2ZRE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9jZW50ZXJhY3Rpb25mdW5kLm9yZyIsInIiOiJmMDFhMDFiMC1jM2ViLTQ5MmUtOTg2OS1mOGViMDNkODU0MjYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI1MWJiMTc0NC0yYTkzLTQzMGMtOGM0Ny0wODA2ODA2ZGQxYzIifQ)
---
| | [](https://www.domjones.org/so/13OpSzzWO/c?w=Hg40ORYtj5Dqh_GQQ_mSjQPxbY0T40opx7xNw9xegQM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9jZW50ZXJhY3Rpb25mdW5kLm9yZyIsInIiOiJkZWYzYTllMi1mN2I0LTQ0MjgtOTgyYi00OTQyZjgyNDYxM2YiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI1MWJiMTc0NC0yYTkzLTQzMGMtOGM0Ny0wODA2ODA2ZGQxYzIifQ)
---
| | The Center for Biological Diversity Action Fund is an organization that strives to strengthen our core environmental laws and support lawmakers from all political parties who believe in creating a healthier environment for future generations.
---
| |
# Why is this endorsement significant?
---
| | This endorsement is a testament to Dom Jones' long-standing advocacy for environmental sustainability and her commitment to effecting positive change. With the support of The Center for Biological Diversity Action Fund, the Dom Jones Campaign for California State Assembly becomes even stronger in its mission to enact legislation that protects our natural resources and promotes sustainability. Additionally, this endorsement firmly aligns with our future Assemblywoman being a candidate of all no matter what political party anyone identifies with. For, The Center for Biological Diversity Action Fund, holds all leaders accountable and is not partisan rather seeks to protect our environment, no matter what. Dom knows that the enviornment is not partisan and hence, this endorsement speaks to how Dom crosses the political divide to do what she does best: UNITE US ALL.
---
| |
# Join us in celebrating this achievement!
---
| | We invite you to join us in celebrating this momentous endorsement. Together, we can make a difference in creating a brighter and greener future for California. Stay tuned for upcoming events and opportunities to get involved in the campaign!
---
| |

The Genesis 123 Foundation is a US based non-profit. Our mission is to bless Israelis of all backgrounds and build bridges between Jews and Christians with Israel in ways that are new, unique, and meaningful. name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: a trend (not an anomaly)
body:
re... idaho take back |
---
| | In 2022, Idaho didn't just change the game – it rewrote the whole playbook, smashing records by kicking out a slew of incumbents in the statewide election.

This wasn't just a shake-up - it was a conservative earthquake.

And what does the establishment think?

The good old boys club is shaking in their boots, dismissing this as "just an anomaly."

How clueless can they be?

Take a look at Nampa last night – over 200 patriots rallied together, a living, breathing testament to the conservative tsunami sweeping through our state. This isn't a one-off event; **_it's the new normal.

_**

So, be encouraged...

Conservatives are rising up to reclaim Idaho from the clutches of out-of-touch establishment cronies.

But make no mistake, Idaho is teetering on the edge.

We're at a crossroads of destiny.

**_And now is our moment to grab the reins and steer Idaho back to greatness._**

So, no... this is no time for complacency.

(Sitting back isn't an option when the future of our state is at stake)

Instead?

Now's the time to jump into the fray with all we've got.

Your support has been the fuel to this firestorm of change.

For that, I'm eternally thankful.

Cheers,

Brian

**P.S.**

The battle resumes Monday with the legislative session. Get in the loop and join the frontline on Twitter (X): [https://twitter.com/brian_lenney](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=b27cfbe9e7&e=dea908e0fe "follow Lenney on Twitter")

Patriot, it’s been our honor.
And we want to thank you.
For standing with President Trump in his darkest hour.
For defending America from the radical-left when they tell you to hate our country.
For holding the line against Marxism that is plaguing our classrooms.

name: Your America
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38702%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5Tzsfe%2fS6VGMezOm%2bW27ZQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” **
Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38703%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cXIDTaaxdLssNFIktFa%2fdA&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38704%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uSndFqze2wsJztwQGEOrdg&sysid=1)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America News
---

name: American Briefing
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7a7o3pjup2rvn883puaddrqu9of16g1bfkv9e3g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clj61p74sph2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmn0i4tt0gclurl80vspagl8g56ccdbql10c3io0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clj61p74sph2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8vhsqiqt805j37fubglvbt476h2onil6hg86f38_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clj61p74sph2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Please allow me to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
I promise I won’t take up much of your time.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7s54o9n6oi3c20cbsta3276a4nvekllhtchkj38_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clj61o76c3h2bs "Tuttle Twins")

Friend,

I promise I won't take up much of your time.

My name is Connor Boyack, the author of the Tuttle Twins. The Tuttle Twins books teach children the values of liberty, American history, free markets, and limited government.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsumul11abuoeq4h8aihdqiam95nveo8otmvpqag_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clj61o76c3h2bs)

Today, especially in the next sixty minutes, I want to reach as many people as I can with this request. I set a goal to raise $20,000 before the end of the month. Every $10 we raise allows us to send a copy of a Tuttle Twins book to a school, library, or family.

**If that is all you need to hear, please contribute $10 or whatever you can afford using this button:**

[Donate Now](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8dj4vslo60kjuc1e6c7gfun3i5v1dfvlk3uevt8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clj61o76c3h2bs)

**Otherwise, let me explain why I am asking you to donate at least $10:**

$10 because every book that finds its way into a public school provides an alternative to woke indoctrination.

$10 because the Tuttle Twins books inspired Jaiden, the kid in Colorado who was kicked out of class for wearing a Gadsden flag patch on his backpack, to stand up for his beliefs.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqge7gf6gpb88qqc2kjck17vo2ivvoet5e6ghho0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clj61o76c3h2bs)
$10 because these books are creating a new generation of kids who are excited about the values of free markets, individual rights, liberty, true history, and personal responsibility.

[$10 because we can distribute a total of 1 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins books this year!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9g56g54dk6vbmq1q1b0t4pi78iqcqgcqkl9q788_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clj61o76c3h2bs)

Donations from people like you make it possible. And when you start seeing children in your city reading and talking about the Tuttle Twins books, know it was your support today that made a difference!

**Can I count on you to contribute $10, or whatever you can afford today, to help us distribute copies of the Tuttle Twins books to more children? Click any button below to give today.**

[Donate $10 = 1 Book Distributed >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgor00ain8g7nr80ioegk521drl0tdllpc70u7k0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clj61o76c3h2bs)

[Donate $20 = 2 Books Distributed >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgmhnpckbf3jno50b851il0n4avmmshe28rl6je8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clj61o76c3h2bs)

[Donate $50 = 5 Books Distributed >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3m9c71k7jpjgi38tnos4cbvnq2c3eq3pg8ahmq0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clj61o76c3h2bs)

[Donate $100 = 10 Books Distributed >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp171rte0vin8bj6s5qkkio5r2t8mck1i5f3gbpg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clj61o76c3h2bs)

[Donate $200 = 20 Books Distributed >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z03a4tp7ooir9hf7qqb74rfndksevbfmukqeef1g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clj61o76c3h2bs)

[Donate $500 = 50 Books Distributed >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrselj3l85ge292b6n7f4e0gisg8n6vfk7m2nuo8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clj61o76c3h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 = 100 Books Distributed >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5fmb61dvpllm0pfh0bf6re3aa0e3oaolelk9r6o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clj61o76c3h2bs)

Thank you for your support!

Connor Boyack
President, Libertas Institute
Author, Tuttle Twins

P.S. If you're still reading this email, but I haven't convinced you to give at least $10 today, I want you to think about what children _**aren 't**_ learning in public schools.
* Free markets
* Individual rights
* Personal responsibility
* Patriotism
* Limited government

Our founding fathers said we needed an educated populace to keep our Republic. We could lose it all soon if we don't teach these values to the next generation.

**But for just $10, you can send a Tuttle Twins book to a school, library, or family and inspire a child to believe in the ideas of liberty. Please click below to save our country, one child at a time.**

[Donate](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0rbl3r637d3rh6gk58039kq90bspkb1s8b57nv8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clj61o76c3h2bs)

Paid for by Libertas Institute

Trump Train News

It is here! Election year 2024. Lets breakdown the top races and see how much the Republicans need to do to flip the Senate this fall. The Senate is vital to a republican presidency. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: BREAKING - SkyTree Book Fairs challenges Scholastic’s monopoly
body:
Here’s what we’re up against.

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38711%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=58ZNuyIOQ7hiKy%2brUSFEAg&sysid=1 "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children’s schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here’s what we’re up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from “Welcome to St. Hell,” a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We’ve censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38712%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lHrs9IguwvOdxwhCoeHaxA&sysid=1)[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38712%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lHrs9IguwvOdxwhCoeHaxA&sysid=1)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here’s how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38713%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Dd8XjxbOjUPz7dMH5zqHqA&sysid=1)

[Donate](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38714%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zn2xmaByd64ZGRQGW2sIFA&sysid=1)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children’s book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here’s the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it’s working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

[Donate $10 >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38725%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TtFBxcXNiVKHkecULtP0Qg&sysid=1)

[Donate $35 >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38726%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=H4ceopudK%2bGfHXTP%2bEY4JA&sysid=1)

[Donate $50 >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38727%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y8xKGdDZ7A68Ecg3UhYRwQ&sysid=1)

[Donate $100 >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38728%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=G1KLVIiuzzxKFHzDrztmFA&sysid=1)

[Donate $250 >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38729%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XgB7g8j6OoPsV7Sm%2fCEyuw&sysid=1)

[Donate $500 >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38720%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mbMpEER%2bayI3jRwk1CdJBg&sysid=1)

[Donate $1,000 >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38721%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7FD7TYcypF6wST4HTkQqyQ&sysid=1)

[Donate Any Amount >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38722%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UmhvYKuBaLFPlHcv0F%2bifw&sysid=1)

Let’s bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

It’s not complicated! It’s what you and I grew up with.

Thank you for helping us offer schools an alternative to Scholastic!

God bless,

Kirk Cameron

P.S. Scholastic’s monopoly on school book fairs has ushered in woke and inappropriate books to kids across the nation.

I’ve partnered with SkyTree Book Fairs to give schools a positive alternative to scholastic.

[Help us raise $100,000 to fund book fairs this spring semester at schools. Click here to donate >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38723%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=p9jgz4xSHRFtyW4rtBljHA&sysid=1)

A reminder of what we’re up against:

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38724%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bps3m2wglAa6U%2bgPplKFXQ&sysid=1)

It's time to fight back.

You and I cannot afford to do nothing and let the woke mob indoctrinate millions of children.

[Click here to donate and help SkyTree change the world.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38735%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0LzpD40bZuNHPr8tmoUALQ&sysid=1)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Food shortages are coming
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd1gg8v586okjsiqdoa5o3n7i4knf5fhossrjulg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clgm4ob6c9h2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4ecvn4nko2r1dqggauonr3n9ertt9sp7b1fn1e0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clgm4ob6c9h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfnotot6l49n37su442aq6554n77m0urcdpqcc28_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clgm4ob6c9h2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zif01dr9ps1344vd0jelh3u7nhphqpro8ihrbsj8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clgm4ob7c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” **
Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmkgp3gsq8of1098q90h7i7tjqd7lgjml7qtcgr8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clgm4ob7c5h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2g33645mimj0qhnd1g3s83bvnmige90nv3likio_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clgm4ob7c5h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Your America
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38748%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0gGuWyjwttJpHCkbQ85SBQ&sysid=1). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38749%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4T8LOIXEUSEXxuDc%2fw7pKQ&sysid=1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38740%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EfR4ZG81jUt49dclMRavDA&sysid=1) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Please allow me to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
I promise I won’t take up much of your time.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znpr86oco4aj1trsp6assneoiqr42dfaqds5cud8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clgm6o33cjh2bs "Tuttle Twins")

Friend,

I promise I won't take up much of your time.

My name is Connor Boyack, the author of the Tuttle Twins. The Tuttle Twins books teach children the values of liberty, American history, free markets, and limited government.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmdph5640meabn8n79uleq8jn9faur6gmlkdq09g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clgm6o33cjh2bs)

Today, especially in the next sixty minutes, I want to reach as many people as I can with this request. I set a goal to raise $20,000 before the end of the month. Every $10 we raise allows us to send a copy of a Tuttle Twins book to a school, library, or family.

**If that is all you need to hear, please contribute $10 or whatever you can afford using this button:**

[Donate Now](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zla9bafmdb85te72511mi5upqfmfjp8gpkbkc8f0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clgm6o33cjh2bs)

**Otherwise, let me explain why I am asking you to donate at least $10:**

$10 because every book that finds its way into a public school provides an alternative to woke indoctrination.

$10 because the Tuttle Twins books inspired Jaiden, the kid in Colorado who was kicked out of class for wearing a Gadsden flag patch on his backpack, to stand up for his beliefs.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgt754b12c0p4m2npgdi5d92f10oirmtht9fc6ng_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clgm6o33cjh2bs)
$10 because these books are creating a new generation of kids who are excited about the values of free markets, individual rights, liberty, true history, and personal responsibility.

[$10 because we can distribute a total of 1 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins books this year!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrunf2246rem2s2fj3pm51mb2lick24p7p5c4kng_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clgm6o33cjh2bs)

Donations from people like you make it possible. And when you start seeing children in your city reading and talking about the Tuttle Twins books, know it was your support today that made a difference!

**Can I count on you to contribute $10, or whatever you can afford today, to help us distribute copies of the Tuttle Twins books to more children? Click any button below to give today.**

[Donate $10 = 1 Book Distributed >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmf06jog718htra3q34kbt1bb2s6m5ht9g79phr8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clgm6o33cjh2bs)

[Donate $20 = 2 Books Distributed >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9lnim383jpvvk1thtq191afomj8gmjap670864o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clgm6o33cjh2bs)

[Donate $50 = 5 Books Distributed >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zstd3nogp5k78gj79nepjsg75iv0u6eqsvno81k8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clgm6o33cjh2bs)

[Donate $100 = 10 Books Distributed >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z25l2rng8fdl6coeo66n9efq76iuto6okqmuct90_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clgm6o33cjh2bs)

[Donate $200 = 20 Books Distributed >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpus06dsrkaahb154mtj7c8j1hn123mdi8vaafrg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clgm6o33cjh2bs)

[Donate $500 = 50 Books Distributed >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgqdrhobebpc2j0l5c0n9a2ro26vfsv4l1vlqfkg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clgm6o33cjh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 = 100 Books Distributed >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl61p3c12g67jnoboen8sbfs90o1tb1l1iolb4p8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clgm6o33cjh2bs)

Thank you for your support!

Connor Boyack
President, Libertas Institute
Author, Tuttle Twins

P.S. If you're still reading this email, but I haven't convinced you to give at least $10 today, I want you to think about what children _**aren 't**_ learning in public schools.
* Free markets
* Individual rights
* Personal responsibility
* Patriotism
* Limited government

Our founding fathers said we needed an educated populace to keep our Republic. We could lose it all soon if we don't teach these values to the next generation.

**But for just $10, you can send a Tuttle Twins book to a school, library, or family and inspire a child to believe in the ideas of liberty. Please click below to save our country, one child at a time.**

[Donate](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zelvbg0fna3njk32c365jnab7tgtplphrlvg5g7o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clgm6o33cjh2bs)

It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. on these survival food kits while you can. Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: American Action News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh9itsp2pelphfmrjqp8ampoc9ci02ni583vgbjo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clgm6o37cth2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” **
Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcv73t8q4fg11uihj66edpej20e11pfbqc5arrvg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clgm6o37cth2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z98gq37srjt0bdrhiahfl7ult0ui1e12u3k87eug_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clgm6o37cth2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Maria Montero
subject: Happy New Year: Campaign Updates January 6!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MARIA MONTERO
body:
ICYMI
| | | |
---
---
| Maria's Community Champions
---
|
---
| Earning the confidence and support of community members, leaders, and business people is what distinguishes Maria Montero--she reflects the people, values, and work ethic of the 7th Congressional District in Pennsylvania.
This week we would are pleased to share the first of our Pennsylvania U.S. Congressional delegation endorsements, U.S. Representative Dan Meuser, from Pennsylvania's 9th Congressional District. Representative Meuser was first elected in 2018 representing portions of Northeastern PA (which formerly included Carbon County, which is now in PA-7). Dan is a conservative business leader who brings his experience as a proven job creator to Congress. He knows what it takes to win and is working overtime to grow our Republican majority in the U.S. Congress. It is why Dan is endorsing Maria-- she is the only candidate who can beat Susan Wild.
Congressman Meuser and Maria served together on Governor Tom Corbett's leadership team. Dan, as the Secretary of Revenue, and Maria, as the Executive Director of the PA Commission for Women and thereafter as the Executive Director of the Latino Commission. They worked together to promote economic development polices and small business growth opportunities to these key constituencies.
Why PA-7 is a Battleground Seat
Pennsylvania has 17 U.S. Congressional seats. Nine (9) of those seats are held by Democrats and eight (8) of the seats are represented by Republicans.
Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District, out of all the 435 U.S. congressional districts in the United States, is the top battleground seat where it is predicted that the right candidate can beat Susan Wild.
PA-7 is an R+2 district (a Republican leaning seat) because nearly 20% of PA-7's voters are registered Independents and nearly 55,000 voters in the district are Spanish speakers whose values are conservative.
It makes sense, Maria can win PA-7: Maria reflects the people, values, and work ethic of the 7th Congressional District. Most importantly, her humble upbringing in Summit Hill and the barrios of Allentown, is a constant reminder for her to fight for our freedom, those who are suffering because of rising crime, the economic crisis, and crippling inflation which have left many destitute. Maria is the one we need in Washington D.C. to fight to restore the American Dream!
"Freedom is a fragile thing and is never more than one generation away from extinction. It is not ours by inheritance, it must be fought for and defended constantly by each generation, for it comes only once to a people. Those who have known freedom and then lost it have never known it again." -Ronald Reagan
---
---

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic " Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." Through "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry," you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

## Chief of NRA Resigns
Wayne LaPierre has announced [he is stepping down as CEO of the National Rifle Association](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2O6yAQxfGnwR0WDF9JQXEbd7ntltbEjJNZERwBG8tvv8pqy-1-0mmO_h-X-YKcudz-44NiX7cZl84vmrX0EuxshxRXIiAzUNRBWecUeDfco1YqOKc1erySRhWMcRRSUu6cwF7NwBEUWKWV18oFOI-okzol1LSezsF7EFZR4r7V8XPj0u-05mN7UR2X7THkeO_92YT5J2ASMO37PpbrUmhv713A9KaA6avJX-14FJIZn0y1kqzU-FaaLBVlJkxUZcKjydaxdrnwi7PslTHLuhTUBpwzQ43puXPO3HwQVt0eyPnnT_8rzncAAAD__6wiZrA) after 30+ years in the role. The 74-year old has spent the majority of his career lobbying for 2nd Amendment rights, and he leaves the role saying, "_My passion for our cause burns as deeply as ever_." The announcement comes days before he [goes on trial](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwyAURp_G3oj4Nx4YumRL147WDVySWxGwAMXK21fJ3PH7znJ0fi7bBShTuX3DA_1IdYMw6ImbYJZJvek5-oQoUc3oxcK1MVxaM9-9MAEdV1EliRAhXDFYBdxcjbgKqdaZvORSc8Gt4GaR6wlE5C6CwOTWxVo5aY6RRm2n30pl3DHlV31iO4X6mLO_j7H3SX1N8jzJM-wFj_5G79EGhYyTPJcGrMCgWiCzRikjg95roM_HDngVZBl2wtaQNex0K53BElKI2qRgNLfB2SScTZqrCE45vc7Nx_2gnKnbZdL89gDKH63xX6O_AAAA__80BmiJ) in civilian court for misusing funds from the non-profit organization. Along with other current and former NRA leaders, the lawsuit alleges LaPierre illegally diverted millions to fund a lavish lifestyle.
## NY AG Requests Fine, Ban for Donald Trump
New York Attorney General Letitia James is calling for a [$370 million fine and a lifetime ban](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvgzAQRn-N2YzOh4F4YOjClq4d0YHPyVXGRuAE5d9XadfO36enp_d1na4kUdLtk1YeSsgTLUWePBndabSTrfwQmJGbigfTg21bwK6t7oMPTM4xI8Fsg5mhASTn-tldnG9NqGRAQAsGOgNtj64m4-HiyXC4uL7rUFlgLyXv9XeWVO4c4is_ea-XvFZxuJeyHar5UDgqHM_zrNO8JD6P965w3HKUIsuhcPQ5UfS67I91Uziml6abXijGQzc96FVilJx0kMR_Jx0lcJGV9UxJ70xR81GosJbkH0fZX3pfEpkGWwvVPvjtfDOOrlcWbitJ_JUs_xX7CQAA__9dJ27i) from real estate dealings in the state for former President Trump. This comes as a post-trial motion in Trump's fraud case which found him, along with other top executives, liable for inflating financial gains to acquire better loans. Trump has repeatedly called the trial a "[witch hunt](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAUheGnwRsW3AB2BoYubOna0aJwiW-KTYRxrLx95c7dP-kc_V-36eYp03r_9AvalsrkQ6MXTpIbDmpSXbQJEfDSoZWDUFoLMLqbbbiMRscAkLSWYwrfYVAgEwCMMFxD6MiCACWkMFLoAa69l1GM0UtM43UwBpgSGKmV2j8KrW3GlN_lhbUPZemynVt7buzywcAxcMdx9G3G--5rJL-ehoHbN77isTFw5xYD9_ArAyc0A9fqvjx5oBdlnqrf40n5u9QfnrFRI88ffsGtqzY-D8qZNjMwJe6Lp_z3of0X5DcAAP__giBhVw)" and plans to appeal. Meanwhile, his attorneys filed a motion Friday claiming that the case against Trump lacks proper evidence. Trump's sons, Donald Jr. and Eric, along with CFO Allen Howard Weisselberg and former executive Jeff McConney, were also included in the motion with calls for similar real estate bans.
## Airstrike Kills Militia Leader in Baghdad
[The U.S. has claimed responsibility for an airstrike](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFy6yAQQNGvgQ4PLEjgguI16vzalBosFmvjlVEQccZ_n0nq1HfmFuftMl8SMT1u_9OGsZc6p6XTE2ejRgVudjLHgghoJUbjtRsGDeMg12gzpMF6X3wyJlxtxiu4UBZb0AWNV0kRNDht9Gj04OF8SibrkJPBEs5-HEE4jZl6baf3So--YuFXfWI7LXWTHNfe90PYfwImAVNfcSXmnyZg2ivT8hIwZSz4OFDA5Gw462AUtfShPg919EZ3VHdixqw2YuqUFGPK2ARMssW8fxEzHaMXTt-2RL932f9i-A4AAP__NNVeOQ) that killed Mushtaq Taleb al-Saidi, a Hezbollah militia leader based in Baghdad, Iraq. Maj. General Pat Ryan said the airstrike was an act of self-defense for U.S. military personnel in the region, as they have been targeted by Iranian-backed militia in Iraq with increased frequency since the start of the Israel-Hamas war. Iraqi officials denounced [the attack](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFvgzAQBeBfY7ZDh2NMGBi6sKVrR3ThDrjG4Mg4Qf33FZ27vqcnfXpft-FGGnSbP2mVLk9xoDHrW4YKPFg3uIK7ScTKpZCuatDVNVpfF0tH5O_t2F4Ya0tj413NyE5obFpPV3SFdhatwwp9hXVj25IqxitTJdO1bby3xqGw5pjK76hbXmQKP_EtqRzjWoRuyfm5m8uHsb2x_XEcZZJXlrSf_ZnEFNjYflXmICC0Z2P7vCQR0EQb3Gl8CMOqQbMSTDov5xweGoIw3GlemBg4xU1gz0kfAnt8pVF2OOmAFaAzti9Sx89DQ9DdN8bhvJKGP2X-77LfAAAA__-Ewm45) and claimed it escalated tensions in the region, especially given the attack was near a security headquarters, as they claim. U.S. officials said the strike hit a vehicle carrying the militia leader (and others) but insisted that no civilians were harmed in the attack.

clean_body: Wayne LaPierre has announced after 30+ years in the role. | | | | | | Saturday, January 6th, 2024 ---|--- Welcome to the weekend! On this day in 2001, a joint session of Congress certified George W. Bush as the winner of the 2000 presidential election. Vice President Al Gore, the election's loser, presided over . Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . Today's edition is brought to you by . Editor's note: If you like The Flyover and want to keep up with news in Texas, you should try out The Texas Flyover, launching January 9th. | Chief of NRA Resigns Wayne LaPierre has announced after 30+ years in the role. The 74-year old has spent the majority of his career lobbying for 2nd Amendment rights, and he leaves the role saying, "My passion for our cause burns as deeply as ever." The announcement comes days before he in civilian court for misusing funds from the non-profit organization. Along with other current and former NRA leaders, the lawsuit alleges LaPierre illegally diverted millions to fund a lavish lifestyle. NY AG Requests Fine, Ban for Donald Trump New York Attorney General Letitia James is calling for a from real estate dealings in the state for former President Trump. This comes as a post-trial motion in Trump's fraud case which found him, along with other top executives, liable for inflating financial gains to acquire better loans. Trump has repeatedly called the trial a "" and plans to appeal. Meanwhile, his attorneys filed a motion Friday claiming that the case against Trump lacks proper evidence. Trump's sons, Donald Jr. and Eric, along with CFO Allen Howard Weisselberg and former executive Jeff McConney, were also included in the motion with calls for similar real estate bans. Airstrike Kills Militia Leader in Baghdad that killed Mushtaq Taleb al-Saidi, a Hezbollah militia leader based in Baghdad, Iraq. Maj. General Pat Ryan said the airstrike was an act of self-defense for U.S. military personnel in the region, as they have been targeted by Iranian-backed militia in Iraq with increased frequency since the start of the Israel-Hamas war. Iraqi officials denounced and claimed it escalated tensions in the region, especially given the attack was near a security headquarters, as they claim. U.S. officials said the strike hit a vehicle carrying the militia leader (and others) but insisted that no civilians were harmed in the attack. name: Conservatives Give
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b3514892bc9d4cf7ac8c5ae62dfe436d&_e=phyT3qyiYsS2TQrOIY8XeV5GoSy9_dOld6oBLgE634P0Ps8RXKzCx5HGdrr2GvVuNyJ60mhVooGqbqnPWhPNZmGvkvhBovFYtFqqrFqZBV4RvA4a0u2DiIiDlKVurg51xwZDeGcWMIuRZ8VN4DuaZ3pRrlA-uQpKCAHcZr1XTSQ1Au58eQ3xi0T2d2GPOwUO2Kn4GDMGH2vW8sTq0bIh2I8aZhlFT-KbBwEIaBTtiLZzkhplSx-dYklu-5991v7_QMUgx7KNN2pfrSxW0u0Ijc_aNpiyqsAzvDTHqD6C-OGaWXajChl4IIHUynN_Pqnk). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b3514892bc9d4cf7ac8c5ae62dfe436d&_e=phyT3qyiYsS2TQrOIY8XeV5GoSy9_dOld6oBLgE634P0Ps8RXKzCx5HGdrr2GvVuNyJ60mhVooGqbqnPWhPNZmGvkvhBovFYtFqqrFqZBV4RvA4a0u2DiIiDlKVurg51xwZDeGcWMIuRZ8VN4DuaZwcUY7-VyobkljGG76aLLkR1sTTT4C_zA6YyhhzEDfEN9ZRf8jTsWtv1yFotEQer_YhvTqLl_EYxlXKad-3iUTn54X81DZkhcMgpLL0hQ9_OZLZ2Ydskmu3okTeZvwKIFHzafLGg1_Rucs7n1tgrqfJYLeZjqeKSQnEPgQQyzdPI) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b3514892bc9d4cf7ac8c5ae62dfe436d&_e=phyT3qyiYsS2TQrOIY8XeV5GoSy9_dOld6oBLgE634P0Ps8RXKzCx5HGdrr2GvVuNyJ60mhVooGqbqnPWhPNZmGvkvhBovFYtFqqrFqZBV4RvA4a0u2DiIiDlKVurg51xwZDeGcWMIuRZ8VN4DuaZ6UBuqhZdkZGxZUr-RCpycatg9yKS3AOFAnparmnRmiyo7Lm0-CUqVd-fnKlib6rFZBRjQN7AlM2hlgCjoCf0Ta7gvVdLj1bJ2W7toyGWcwQgCxQLeHwwNEjH58fY4sNyVU4LGZ5LSQ3_z19XI5nKBjFHD04oD4LWk-j3h5Y1Fqy) on these survival food kits while you can.

As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling . When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. on these survival food kits while you can. Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c67fb5f485f54ffd81e6d2f434952f3b&_e=-6U8lqRtgq06KRHtxf8mpywJq44smCEGIRKHBmw4OceevbNsO2yJxHL_p8HemtuOXFaWPfg7L8J4hDi4x38RyEdEKHcbtUerOqA-dLmC3Xcs0VIF7GjQqadLCb0Y-s-8sFZA3VOU_LslrC7CRz-ZYKutyFP1nckfamf58_8lP38TuUHiyFL3IUWiiyvo8iNIbdkSHc-DrqDSvpAUc3HiY1xQdcAneH7QbHAnpwexOcwMCqCuMIHkD1_J6sPwjRsuoa9LLD4qG1gQjADW8uqTKDqtzLmJgZEIGbsPdEnZUVi4gpw1722FBz8bK9We66IjI-6aLqyyWUHi_spKpfqY-DG3zM5-yoSeENCT-cp0ndJ0NNgOrte4GFzqPXWTVSp9h3clNg1Ao5gZRRdBozp2YfXp4NPX7oEkUPqT7vv20dQ%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2254e8b67f464412a290f75e3c5506ee&_e=qCIDGgCpTSSY8XE5aXPShktp-twjTjVuDfsZt4LyUXDP9NgFSycC8Hx4gwRrlAWUinxhcLVtQR7w72RW8kHkGRju3cg9nkaprG86gxA-BCK-nJIg-g-WUVdY8IThn13CA921bePIg0ukbOhK3gIppxEamlWUUbkQpbLe6ye41APX18tUq-ZFS_PJjfIbQ9OvPzM0VQu4jEQhIT1MOPiMDY4oi3xGKfgjRzm9DiXYkv2WXgd76AhtNgHwuQzUzcPVcsmLg_UVmqYE-o32n37ILDfmB1LUpjSiq27lmm5WzjU_RNFRH9iEo_Bmyc15trPeaU8h4iXhIDr3ViC6ZlgWod8G_HxkAJDfgofhvSFwdRgO9-5V6fBwrFCfOIiPXDK2ZepkhQKITMp1EHLJxw7y-M_r-iP01lwHNglFBt57OIk%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2254e8b67f464412a290f75e3c5506ee&_e=qCIDGgCpTSSY8XE5aXPShktp-twjTjVuDfsZt4LyUXDP9NgFSycC8Hx4gwRrlAWUinxhcLVtQR7w72RW8kHkGRju3cg9nkaprG86gxA-BCK-nJIg-g-WUVdY8IThn13CA921bePIg0ukbOhK3gIppxEamlWUUbkQpbLe6ye41APX18tUq-ZFS_PJjfIbQ9OvPzM0VQu4jEQhIT1MOPiMDY4oi3xGKfgjRzm9DiXYkv2WXgd76AhtNgHwuQzUzcPVQbninghorTB--HvtMfLjhZht7oGSqaVyoG2GvZLPw5y6UmWI9QMzT83kMrqcgAtqaic_Ll3n_HJqx2cST8H29OArr2BV16yHGCfmB9ns40kN5BnapYFxAl_-s2LmKn24Uqzo82lFkNTX9Hyylf-Yutgz7IYGaYprxDaxRjJtXwo%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2254e8b67f464412a290f75e3c5506ee&_e=qCIDGgCpTSSY8XE5aXPShktp-twjTjVuDfsZt4LyUXDP9NgFSycC8Hx4gwRrlAWUinxhcLVtQR7w72RW8kHkGRju3cg9nkaprG86gxA-BCK-nJIg-g-WUVdY8IThn13CA921bePIg0ukbOhK3gIppxEamlWUUbkQpbLe6ye41APX18tUq-ZFS_PJjfIbQ9OvPzM0VQu4jEQhIT1MOPiMDY4oi3xGKfgjRzm9DiXYkv2WXgd76AhtNgHwuQzUzcPV07axhoLRzryGd8c07uo6r-HXrlSupvGfQuuFKm4dvyn0WukDRoGc7-xUC6LsJwnhNeJLWSrLay15VXuIDW4pqw0-byQjasHM55MNnAeArsrnXcczn_PmfN1qoLzb3JcwSSorkvXUa63i_rANqcUXuGHNuV1xkKXnbeHc6S4sgdE%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Jerrad Christian
subject: Today, I’m thinking about freedom and democracy
body:
The problem is with the culture that accepts Trump and the GOP’s obvious lies.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ptYlYxji2c659U22EtOJ9YiKZ1mTWFG_uCaexyibwmkg7HNjbAyEXRW6m8UOHOEnOiR0BMYma1blNviK9xAyJB2YxaPaJ4tjmxw3LhzPWhodyWip_jVgENyqrGSajm8zE_IdTGUZtxzScciNqm1xSZL03bnoNHQwPUe1A16OE6SrshoBbD6B_fdA3Uso1vXjRU-mtJ-L8CabS9F4xD_mA3zEZC_I-kFB&c=D_erJVnaN7UBmkRHJqYUqr90IAybppKoJxyVt9DCU8dBtrFN2Uowzg==&ch=Hi7OKBIs-jxDUj4Beyxqfc_NuIQofkypTT1jJR1VCCAb1EB2qnjQtg==)
---

Friend,
Today marks three years since the insurrection at the U.S. Capitol when a violent mob attacked Capitol Police and D.C. metro police officers to forcefully break into the Capitol--all to do Trump's bidding: stop the certification of the 2020 election.
As a Navy veteran, nothing makes me more unnerved than when our freedom, democracy, and the peaceful rule of law is directly attacked or undermined here at home. Those who have served in the armed forces have seen it all across the globe, from the most repressive fascism to galling political corruption that keeps societies with unlimited potential impoverished so the few that call the shots can gain.
I'll just be honest here: the January 6 Capitol riot not only infuriated me--it scared me.
The idea that this could happen here is frightening. The fact that the President of the United States was directly involved and encouraged it in real time by begrudgingly telling the rioters to "go home" and calling them "very special" while eagerly watching the riot unfold on TV at the White House.
The problem, in my opinion, is with the culture that accepts Trump and the GOP's obvious lies. Whether tacit or explicit--promoting baseless allegations that your political opponents somehow stole a national election occurring across dozens of competitive state-run voting processes is just as unforgivable as using an American flag to beat and subdue a police officer to gain entry to the Capitol.
Accountability is what we need, but not just legal accountability, political too. That's why I am running against a Trump ally here in Ohio: undoing the damage that he and others in Trump's Republican Party have done to our democracy and our government is going to take all of us coming together.
I truly appreciate all of your support as I meet my voters face to face and run this campaign the way it should be, leading by example as I was taught in the Navy.
[If you can help support my work, I greatly appreciate anything you can give:](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ptYlYxji2c659U22EtOJ9YiKZ1mTWFG_uCaexyibwmkg7HNjbAyEXRW6m8UOHOEnOfnY5gtM8OHpmALLe10XokvfJ2R5mSMPoXrnT4f26HDdfa4nwg5t5b-R4-uB43zwNYE84r-uLT8eTSakwfq7jYXceXb-NOB4z0Xhl5f2L3ReGNyRmxN9DaMzw_ObnZJihpeHbvDBe0ZBSBq3tKL0uQ==&c=D_erJVnaN7UBmkRHJqYUqr90IAybppKoJxyVt9DCU8dBtrFN2Uowzg==&ch=Hi7OKBIs-jxDUj4Beyxqfc_NuIQofkypTT1jJR1VCCAb1EB2qnjQtg==)

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xiJMvw3vm3znCDdohlsDHA~~/AARclAA~/RgRne-~)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xiJMvw3vm3znCDdohlsDHA~~/AARclAA~/RgRne-~)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xiJMvw3vm3znCDdohlsDHA~~/AARclAA~/RgRne-~)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4cd48ac23f0b4c8790d4d9747d95c628&_e=V5IVShTUYpslw0Gh29e8yAE9ex7Dr_yMkpptu33hgGaICDLfVYMh5UlEML05GjJ6uNBnGM8pim2wgs57KAmt3Hxz6wgkzLGUDnaEUPQKQ9EtspOsOLzWrAr7BzLW1e7KtJaVQWpW64hEASQfR9AZzqAjnE1eZsI8uYfuSiN526G_eFdCnHpcMUFJNGdgWowU7QVtF7r8juMJu_Ruy0zJjei6kiz-CG_Hjgk3d6pOI87ZsTTwey6K_Rb1bmuHHB7vxAXVtefYYqwIeyC35ve-ibic_RqQaY7NyoHVhXIkAyzFysGEPg6FMeFMekZh6cW_). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4cd48ac23f0b4c8790d4d9747d95c628&_e=V5IVShTUYpslw0Gh29e8yAE9ex7Dr_yMkpptu33hgGaICDLfVYMh5UlEML05GjJ6uNBnGM8pim2wgs57KAmt3Hxz6wgkzLGUDnaEUPQKQ9EtspOsOLzWrAr7BzLW1e7KtJaVQWpW64hEASQfR9AZzgXKSa70kTiYfvwTvLQZzS9g7gS5GmYTqYxTZolQIBpUol_EAGLZMOjI46MgJjfsfnKGEXzXbakID3Gbc4KeJUsf41VIXSL8jRCAuZ06gnDkisVT7H80VVG7O5TEIivN8Kj5WU-3GZQX2tu44hFwpEoyxHY22jhgm3ATgcmfzhwz) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4cd48ac23f0b4c8790d4d9747d95c628&_e=V5IVShTUYpslw0Gh29e8yAE9ex7Dr_yMkpptu33hgGaICDLfVYMh5UlEML05GjJ6uNBnGM8pim2wgs57KAmt3Hxz6wgkzLGUDnaEUPQKQ9EtspOsOLzWrAr7BzLW1e7KtJaVQWpW64hEASQfR9AZzrAIhcHCmX7zdtr_vZlMhcnfXVTm5EtDaCUaOlyBOiwqTMG2ybRKJr9l8_LdSCrrG7Q1fuaZMx2g38SI6tcRVIskQ08S3symNJmmDuUMXOTlgjnNzkh7MNoZDiLdKGZjMho5WgBg1nDuAfQaQrIag41a_o6rTpGaAdZ8jN8eSywD) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Andy Kim
subject: I found this suit on the sale rack
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb200ab4f-88d0-4d3e-85a3-01af974a8a7b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Believe it or not, I found this suit on the sale rack at J. Crew, not long after the 2020 election. I liked the bold blue color and thought I might wear it to the inauguration a few weeks later. When I donated it to the Smithsonian, the knees were dusted with dirt from the night I spent cleaning trash off of the Capitol’s rotunda floor on January 6. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcdc285e6-24d0-47dd-89d3-b5e07f7120d3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Holding my bright blue suit, perhaps for the last time, before I donated it to the Smithsonian._ Honestly, I had seriously considered throwing the suit away until the Smithsonian called. That day still brings such terrible memories for me; I knew I‘d never wear it again. **But the story of January 6 isn’t just about violence, insurrection, and trauma.** Like our country’s story, that day ended full of hope, resilience, civility, and service. Even the simple step I took to help clean up that trash the insurrectionists left behind sparked something much more significant. In the weeks that followed, I received thousands of cards and letters from folks across the country who were inspired or comforted by what they saw. I still cherish every single one. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T82b822bb-d21f-4b49-98c9-dfcf3fef0b26/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _I never imagined that something as simple and reflexive as cleaning up a mess I saw could become inspirational to those like the artist who sent me this wonderful illustration. _ Those cards remind me how strong this country is, and how strong we can be when we come together. Right now, our partisan divide can seem so deep that it threatens to tear us apart. We saw it on full display on January 6, and we must ensure nothing like that ever happens again. That means working with Congress to protect our Capitol, but it also means all of us working together to find common ground. **That common ground is closer than you might realize, Peter.** I can clearly see the disconnect between the partisan wars being waged in DC, the in-fighting within the GOP’s own party, and the priorities of my friends and neighbors in New Jersey. We are honestly all just exhausted by the endless cycles of misinformation and outrage. It’s a mess, for sure -- and it’s all of ours to clean up together. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4601d416-8e0b-424a-bf8c-3d1dfa261b48/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’m raising my two Jersey boys in the same community that welcomed my parents from South Korea. Everything I have done in Congress is to keep the promise I made to help build them a better world than the one we inherited — **and now, I am running for U.S. Senate to bring that same integrity and an emphasis on putting people first.** That’s why the movement we’re building is focused on civility and service, starting in the same New Jersey community that raised me and stretching out to every corner of our country. [**I’m ready to help bring our country together and fix what’s broken. That’s why I’m running for Senate to restore integrity and honor to our government and I’m humbly asking you to join me in this cause. Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T13d8acc0-24e3-4031-acbf-6fcc1c6c347d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) More soon, _Andy_

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do!
