name: American Action News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4aeepct99fsumd0pvq2omng8f97e2l7ngbl4avo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clhm0pr1c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmd4rf6l1ndent3erjahlt2860fkiaa42rf6qt5o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clhm0pr1c5h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3459qagdps7gc0ljlqjd03cj7nmk5aqem5t79g0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31clhm0pr1c5h2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b37c178ffe334790a0b51b4c1f5ea6bf&_e=xjZe7XgpEaN3Q1L2fxR7YrT3tzw2sHeG_VWgOIDHEeAH7eP61629YebXF0hNA1wN1CILreBTNCN2YM-3D8ey9vNyMZ3-oN1Eme2dYRPEM7b_lgPOq7JQmdP3j1QsU3FYUCO63Hofo6BWOKcz_kWW-LjHrVkNNtvjiJ38sdB0aAb6qYpwb3R3kUyVx7MbK99Kl3hqQ2DXoex6HN0B7ki3LoiQTdnzbzf0bhzMxAL8RW_O6MkG9ZYD1A9Iggid-69y6dUVTCytylazgI3pq5MBpYj0slJTDOGBGuYALQFWVCZcO9lF2lyg9dmC151-giiv). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b37c178ffe334790a0b51b4c1f5ea6bf&_e=xjZe7XgpEaN3Q1L2fxR7YrT3tzw2sHeG_VWgOIDHEeAH7eP61629YebXF0hNA1wN1CILreBTNCN2YM-3D8ey9vNyMZ3-oN1Eme2dYRPEM7b_lgPOq7JQmdP3j1QsU3FYUCO63Hofo6BWOKcz_kWW-PrhLbVI4EYvUs9bsju-zmQJWUO8vhiEz6ikzWws6Vovna73Der0wqipd-_XKlGPU9XiCH55Xa1eHWwJJoUAxAO5xsMpa_JLprRlbbvx0aV7DkVPHICBM0dk_5aX_S3TqchDyJ8LkE4gef5faTBBwDczTahCRBu8jOlNxXULCfGB) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b37c178ffe334790a0b51b4c1f5ea6bf&_e=xjZe7XgpEaN3Q1L2fxR7YrT3tzw2sHeG_VWgOIDHEeAH7eP61629YebXF0hNA1wN1CILreBTNCN2YM-3D8ey9vNyMZ3-oN1Eme2dYRPEM7b_lgPOq7JQmdP3j1QsU3FYUCO63Hofo6BWOKcz_kWW-KkG4Gupwf9xc4vmQJnlt5LJjyttR9_GPhGwf6PL8GFy9uOdlZ0Vg-jB7FcZO-5E13WJ0C5bOYmPMZf9NwZ2D5ijQkW_EbU_C18fAHW6jvX4X4D4D_wXA15y3T2cEVRostjGB3i5wNfIo_hEfXO2eac9B75fzb4Kas0vR4J4Lneh) on these survival food kits while you can.

When Ron DeSantis stands in front of Americans and makes promises, he always delivers; no excuses. That's why we can't let this momentum go to waste. Now that we're under 100 days out from the biggest campaign test we'll face, it's critical that we don't lose this pace. Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=41284ea143ab27d1e86d1a02d3349ca60121bf340fa3862e6ed6d18c408676cd8e6349310ee68871f341d5fd65d179b13bfafa9862750a63

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=41284ea143ab27d1e86d1a02d3349ca60121bf340fa3862e6ed6d18c408676cd8e6349310ee68871f341d5fd65d179b13bfafa9862750a63

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Friend, This is incredible. After a show-stopping town hall with CNN on Thursday, our team came forward in DROVES to show support. Our momentum is erupting because Americans everywhere are tired of watching their leaders fail them and are standing up to support the one man who has proven that he will always get the job done. The support that's poured in after the CNN town hall has been inspiring. The DeSantis donor team is making it CLEAR that we will not slow Ron DeSantis down, but we can't stop now. We're looking for just 200 more supporters to step up TODAY to ride out the momentum from the town hall and show the nation what a fighting force our team is. CHIP IN $10 NOW CHIP IN $24 NOW CHIP IN $47 NOW When Ron DeSantis stands in front of Americans and makes promises, he always delivers; no excuses. That's why we can't let this momentum go to waste. Now that we're under 100 days out from the biggest campaign test we'll face, it's critical that we don't lose this pace. Please, help us out today by being 1 of 200 more supporters to STEP UP before the weekend is out. Help out Ron DeSantis by sending in any amount. In Freedom, Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead. If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win. Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Promoting prosperity in Mississippi – update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/successsequence-11571562?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**Governor Tate Reeves spoke at the Mississippi Economic Council this week about promoting prosperity in our state.** He talked about the importance of our state’s per capita income as a benchmark of success.
---
|
---
| The good news is that Mississippi has seen strong income growth per person. **Mississippians today are twice as rich as they were in 2002, with growth especially strong since 2018.**
---
|
---
_Mississippi: doubling prosperity in two decades_
| According to US Census Bureau data, in 2022 per person income in our state was $46,370. Ten years previously in 2012, it was a mere $33,441 (in current prices). In other words, there was a 38% increase in a decade. A decade before that, in 2002, per person income was only half what it is today, at $23,202 (in current prices).

**So strong has Mississippi per capita income growth been that in 2023, the state overtook my own native Britain for the first time.** (When I pointed this out in a recent article in _The Atlantic_ , not every Brit appreciated it!).

Even better news for us, a dollar in our state will generally go further than a dollar in most other states (albeit that thanks to Joe Biden’s inflationary policies, a dollar does not go as far as it did).

This so-called Purchasing Power Parity means that what you could purchase for a mere $86 in Mississippi would require you to spend $90 in Tennessee, $98 dollars in Texas, or a whopping $111 in California.

Here’s another interesting fact about Mississippi. **Contrary to what you might think, Mississippi has been the third fastest growing state in terms of per capita personal income since 1960.**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=9083e7e98c&e=5703353baa)
---
_Per capita growth has seen fast_
| While Mississippi has had annual personal income growth of 2.6 percent since 1959, some decades have seen growth dip to just above 1 percent. These small changes in annual growth might not sound like much, but as economists Russell Sobel and Brandon Bolen at Mississippi State University have noted, seemingly miniscule changes in annual growth rates can have big cumulative effects over time.

**Nudging Mississippi’s growth rate up, even a half a percentage point or two, is the key to producing future prosperity.**

Here at the Mississippi Center for Public Policy, we promote polices that produce more growth by increasing economic freedom in our state.

**Cutting taxes today might not instantaneously produce more growth, but the evidence shows overwhelmingly that states with lower tax burdens outperform states with a high tax burden** (compare Texas and California, or Florida and Illinois for details).

Reducing the size of the state government, and winding down bureaucracy, might not result in overnight investment. **Over time, however, less regulation frees businesses, large and small, to do things that red tape would overwise inhibit.**

Giving every family in our state control over their child’s tax dollars might not immediately result in economic growth. Applying choice and competition to the education sector, will raise standards, do more for work force development than any state agency could ever do and produce a future work force better able to participate in the labor market.

**Eliminating legal restrictions that prevent new healthcare providers operating would boost the state’s health economy.** This would not only improve healthcare, but with healthcare an increasingly important economic activity, help growth.

**If we want Mississippi to become more prosperous, we need to make Mississippi more free.**

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=70ee3f53fe&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| PS. Did you know how widely read this newsletter is? Today approximately 20,000 other people in Mississippi will be reading it, too. **Thank you for being one of them!**
---
|
---
|
---

So strong has Mississippi per capita income growth been that in 2023, the state overtook my own native Britain for the first time. (When I pointed this out in a recent article in The Atlantic , not every Brit appreciated it!). Even better news for us, a dollar in our state will generally go further than a dollar in most other states (albeit that thanks to Joe Biden’s inflationary policies, a dollar does not go as far as it did). This so-called Purchasing Power Parity means that what you could purchase for a mere $86 in Mississippi would require you to spend $90 in Tennessee, $98 dollars in Texas, or a whopping $111 in California. Here’s another interesting fact about Mississippi. Contrary to what you might think, Mississippi has been the third fastest growing state in terms of per capita personal income since 1960. | Per capita growth has seen fast | While Mississippi has had annual personal income growth of 2.6 percent since 1959, some decades have seen growth dip to just above 1 percent. These small changes in annual growth might not sound like much, but as economists Russell Sobel and Brandon Bolen at Mississippi State University have noted, seemingly miniscule changes in annual growth rates can have big cumulative effects over time. Nudging Mississippi’s growth rate up, even a half a percentage point or two, is the key to producing future prosperity. Here at the Mississippi Center for Public Policy, we promote polices that produce more growth by increasing economic freedom in our state. Cutting taxes today might not instantaneously produce more growth, but the evidence shows overwhelmingly that states with lower tax burdens outperform states with a high tax burden (compare Texas and California, or Florida and Illinois for details). Reducing the size of the state government, and winding down bureaucracy, might not result in overnight investment. Over time, however, less regulation frees businesses, large and small, to do things that red tape would overwise inhibit. Giving every family in our state control over their child’s tax dollars might not immediately result in economic growth. Applying choice and competition to the education sector, will raise standards, do more for work force development than any state agency could ever do and produce a future work force better able to participate in the labor market. Eliminating legal restrictions that prevent new healthcare providers operating would boost the state’s health economy. This would not only improve healthcare, but with healthcare an increasingly important economic activity, help growth. If we want Mississippi to become more prosperous, we need to make Mississippi more free. Have a wonderful weekend! | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | PS. Did you know how widely read this newsletter is? Today approximately 20,000 other people in Mississippi will be reading it, too. Thank you for being one of them! | | | |

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Food shortages are coming
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=def55c741281476eacfc8e838c7fd3b1&_e=DaDihQTdMXm5LPntDDRuKb0ml26mGtWCoH9O7vxjg47xU-sKThCorumYmz5QtSLfdikKUM_w2fvtkx995wfUWG7_PBSAkfqYmG32d6yx10zqygbEphukXXeV-YDLgRRlxXIocdXePG7VPfLAKgf8RjCcm9plQxTtbUWGs_P7c_wieS5eBrO_TDlEdX2rMPrBpLvjP4ljbmSjzyBjBRGs-HbKCslyndtxj-7RHZe4TMC_8WyfckI-ptx1fGfNvKfbygIxYmMuU8Zm-Kir-rhJ5NYKijXLC64cB7-OS-vhin2vkX4LLLqCoX-IIYVtHiMx). You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. | | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1a86339f-3536-4bad-82ee-c6042972d2d3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T69f1bdd0-ca6a-41b5-899a-b0d52f588039/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I thought my days of putting people on the ground were over when I left the NFL. Then January 6th happened. I was on the House floor when rioters breached the Capitol, and I remember hearing the glass break and the shouts coming closer. As they pounded on the doors, I texted my wife Aly, who was seven months pregnant with our second son: “Whatever happens, I love you.” I took off my jacket and got ready to fight anyone who came through the door. Thankfully, it never came to that. And while I was barricaded on the House floor with my colleagues and our gas masks in hand, Ted Cruz – who had cheered on the mob earlier that day – hid in a supply closet. Ted Cruz’s false claims about the 2020 election helped incite the insurrection. That's Ted for you: All hat, no cattle. That day is one of many, many reasons I know Ted Cruz has got to go. People lost their lives, and our government came the closest it ever has to crumbling. His MAGA extremism is bad for Texas and our country, and it’s time to hold him accountable. [I’m running to replace Ted Cruz and give Texans the senator we deserve, and I hope you’ll help me do it, Peter. Will you donate now to me and Blue Amp Actin to help build our grassroots movement and defeat Ted Cruz once and for all? Any amount you can spare is truly appreciated. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcddc1e30-ff90-4d5c-9761-465d7a4dad72/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T30d2509b-42a3-47fe-92eb-f34fd76a6938/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: Reflecting on January 6th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
Chaos from the GOP has persisted since the January 6th insurrection, bringing dysfunction in Washington to an all-time high.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76586605/447876565/2125913804?refcode=BLU_EM_VFC_2024-01-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGU2Y2RjNC05OWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dY60-9r4PAM2Gtgoa2kNdLGm2BoiDh8OmcogFC6aTpg=)
---
| Peter,

Three years ago, we witnessed Republicans cheering on a violent insurrection and actively seeking to overturn the election. **Chaos from the GOP has persisted since the January 6th insurrection,_bringing dysfunction in Washington to an all-time high._**

In my time in Congress, I have been steadfast in my commitment to protecting our voting rights and defending democracy. As we gear up for the 2024 election, it's crucial that I have your support to ensure I can maintain my efforts in Congress and help Democrats take back the House.

While the GOP continues to undermine our democratic system, my fellow Democrats and I are dedicated to keeping our government running smoothly. [_**As we reflect on the havoc caused by the GOP on January 6th, I am reaching out to ask for your support. clean_body: Chaos from the GOP has persisted since the January 6th insurrection, bringing dysfunction in Washington to an all-time high. | = | Peter, Three years ago, we witnessed Republicans cheering on a violent insurrection and actively seeking to overturn the election. Chaos from the GOP has persisted since the January 6th insurrection,bringing dysfunction in Washington to an all-time high. In my time in Congress, I have been steadfast in my commitment to protecting our voting rights and defending democracy. As we gear up for the 2024 election, it's crucial that I have your support to ensure I can maintain my efforts in Congress and help Democrats take back the House. While the GOP continues to undermine our democratic system, my fellow Democrats and I are dedicated to keeping our government running smoothly. = | = | = | = | = | = We're stronger together, Valerie Foushee * | | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States | | ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. name: Dean Phillips
subject: January 6th and a Vision for a Stronger Democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dean 24
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dean24-email?refcode=1.6.2024.hope&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dean24-email?refcode=1.6.2024.hope&amount=10]
Hi Friend,
On this solemn anniversary of the Capitol Riot - January 6th, 2021, it is necessary to reflect on the events of that fateful day, their impact on all of us, and ensure that our democracy stays safe for generations to come.
Remembering the breach of our Capitol – the breaking glass, the chaos, the fear – it's etched in my mind. The fear of not seeing our loved ones again, the desperate search for something to defend ourselves – these are experiences that will forever remain with those of us on the floor that fateful day. The vulnerability we felt in those moments and the fear of not seeing our loved ones again are experiences that transcended party lines and highlighted our shared humanity.
Like many Americans, I look for the positive, something to reflect on, grow, and help make the world a better place. It is that same reflection on why I ran for office in the first place. Waking up the morning after the 2016 election, I saw fear in my daughters’ eyes. I promised them I would do something and I ran for Congress. January 6th wasn't just a dark day — it highlighted the urgent need for leadership that puts unity and empathy above all. We can't risk letting demagogues take the reins and threaten our democracy again.
That’s why I’m running today, not for Congress, but for President. A campaign that is about getting people to work together. I’m listening to rank and file Democrats, Republicans, and Independents. We all want the same thing. We want to be safe. We want to have security, both economic and otherwise, we want opportunity, and we want unity. Serving our country and Congress has been a joy. We need leaders committed to justice, integrity, and the well-being of all Americans. Our democracy deserves nothing less.
I believe we should learn from January 6th and work towards a future where events like that are just a dark chapter in our past. As a candidate for President, I'm all in on that vision – one where we heal divisions and strengthen the fabric of our democracy.
Take care and stay hopeful,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/103532/images/Signature.png] Volunteer [https://www.dean24.com/volunteer]
- Dean Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dean24-email?refcode=1.6.2024.hope&amount=10]

name: Nikki Haley
subject: A moment to thank you
body:
Together, we've achieved incredible things
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| |
---
| | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_1x93SVVz7gWfuZrkk6f9w~~/AARclAA~)
---

Friend,

I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your support.

Traveling the country, hearing your stories, and feeling the momentum swell up on the ground is incredible. We have a country to save and it's clear people like you are ready to help me win this race and right this ship.

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_1x93SVVz7gWfuZrkk6f9w~~/AARclAA~)
---

_Together, we've achieved incredible things:_
* Hosted more than 180 town halls across the country, bringing our message directly to the people.
* Soared to second place in New Hampshire, Iowa, and South Carolina!
* Soared to second place in national polls, showing our momentum is undeniable.
* Launched our initial ad buy across Iowa and New Hampshire.
* Earned the endorsement of New Hampshire Governor Chris Sununu, adding to our growing list of supporters.

Our grassroots movement is surging, and with your continued support, our momentum will be unstoppable as we head into **the crucial Iowa caucuses in less than three weeks, and the New Hampshire primary just 8 days after that.**

_But there is still much to do._ We need to keep hunkering down, outworking our opponents, and building the unstoppable momentum to get us one step closer to victory.

**[Would you consider joining our team with a ONE-TIME donation of $10 or more? Your support will help us reach more voters, spread our message, and build the momentum we need to win.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_1x93SVVz7gWfuZrkk6f9w~~/AARclAA~ "Would you consider joining our team with a ONE-TIME donation of $10 or more? Your support will help us reach more voters, spread our message, and build the momentum we need to win.")**

---
My very best,
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_1x93SVVz7gWfuZrkk6f9w~~/AARclAA~)
---
Nikki Haley

---
| | [DONATE](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_1x93SVVz7gWfuZrkk6f9w~~/AARclAA~)

| | | | |

---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/F5zJVkQwwv_DZSa4uiJWpA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnfAkEP4RlAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY__UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/F5zJVkQwwv_DZSa4uiJWpA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnfAkEP4RlAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY__UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

Our grassroots movement is surging, and with your continued support, our momentum will be unstoppable as we head into the crucial Iowa caucuses in less than three weeks, and the New Hampshire primary just 8 days after that. But there is still much to do. We need to keep hunkering down, outworking our opponents, and building the unstoppable momentum to get us one step closer to victory. "Would you consider joining our team with a ONE-TIME donation of $10 or more? Your support will help us reach more voters, spread our message, and build the momentum we need to win." My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | ~ "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | ~ "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | ~~ "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. ~~ "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | ~~ "DONATE" | | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. ~ By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. ~~ and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . ~~. Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492 Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~_

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=903e64d2ac4b41cf8343c4caf330970d&_e=Rn6cg4XEdqHjPT_XM9flig13P-MrcdMKemr7qLdDofzSxWuDUrMc0AriqSKBfTr3DRss5atJ3NR8oKLfbPqmuyEcBv5NsqBnxVQevXbzSx3iX4zn4CmPqK5XTb7VWVzy_SuRCnj54nuFzvVeeAXFGyFyOykpwTpA8rPXH1vTXVmagEzGt2DAbhuOO3Q1d_Jxogt8N5zLSHCrlpsfC4UFy78FVs79ycK6sou4vAmPM6oTQ2SXuhQiod5tvVVRLHd6dXO_l9-uGziVmmlC1-zHchKciDgWBKBHt3RKiAbKbdra3bCBVokUEhHBX8u0fjEQe13bvrRiWMoOZevLNQho-_6IZ3TGlCaqJsbgRk25e8kE8HWl0Gr9zlARmcDTt7bzkW_3AYHv6v9-2Qc5EAzTtfLSO85NKtOc9bLQbS5Uuwc%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=903e64d2ac4b41cf8343c4caf330970d&_e=Rn6cg4XEdqHjPT_XM9flig13P-MrcdMKemr7qLdDofzSxWuDUrMc0AriqSKBfTr3DRss5atJ3NR8oKLfbPqmuyEcBv5NsqBnxVQevXbzSx3iX4zn4CmPqK5XTb7VWVzy_SuRCnj54nuFzvVeeAXFGyFyOykpwTpA8rPXH1vTXVmagEzGt2DAbhuOO3Q1d_Jxogt8N5zLSHCrlpsfC4UFy78FVs79ycK6sou4vAmPM6oTQ2SXuhQiod5tvVVRLHd67s_VVB62ujrNwiIzugNSrzL0xC1KVWmbhDp9kQqaaDEYzlo3Lx8qzSqJxIrOHn77sXtRyHfmTsZSalmMbND7k1XQJjGcQvedOqiZZim-l1lT0z5Ii-XsGcDnwRTPs4243zhodXCOqNlt-AJn9KJiIOa47uscjMCbNDQSWvAuO3s%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=903e64d2ac4b41cf8343c4caf330970d&_e=Rn6cg4XEdqHjPT_XM9flig13P-MrcdMKemr7qLdDofzSxWuDUrMc0AriqSKBfTr3DRss5atJ3NR8oKLfbPqmuyEcBv5NsqBnxVQevXbzSx3iX4zn4CmPqK5XTb7VWVzy_SuRCnj54nuFzvVeeAXFGyFyOykpwTpA8rPXH1vTXVmagEzGt2DAbhuOO3Q1d_Jxogt8N5zLSHCrlpsfC4UFy78FVs79ycK6sou4vAmPM6oTQ2SXuhQiod5tvVVRLHd6EZmi5vRsN4wwHvPL2Uc4D39kwD9dp5exz6lVKs3U_VssdNiXPkpoj4cTWgXbyyfkeduvO86J6QZ0Q2tQ9tTwJsUK94PnEg5TQGKuU70G-KF9F2z8ztQCCpEc663rT112_kuM-0Bv3MCOuZUDVSAGuOzBUlO5-c3tRLq4KYe2SiE%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Team Sarah McBride
subject: On this day in 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sarah McBride
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76588537/447880725/1954656641?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20240106_na_insurrection_cand_kw_act_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjFiNDk2Yy05Y2FjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lgpB40tBzDVav67SnilfkRH2Rdmt4sItpVywFQJSZLs=)
---
Hello — **Three years ago today, the heart of our democracy came under attack. A violent mob of insurrectionists stormed the U.S. Capitol building to overturn the results of a fair and free election.** I’m haunted by the images of rioters screaming outright threats at lawmakers and police officers, leading to the death of five Americans. **Since then, the attacks on our fundamental freedoms have only risen.** I learned at an early age that patriotism is an act of putting our country before self interest. In the years since January 6, 2021, we’ve learned more details about how those at the top did everything they could to subvert the will of the people so they could remain in power. Radicalized by the former president and widespread disinformation online, we’ve seen that when public trust is undermined, our democracy finds itself at risk – and potentially under attack. For democracy to persist, truth and justice must prevail. It’s why in the legislature I’ve brought together Democrats and Republicans to combat disinformation with the nation’s first K-12 media literacy and digital citizenship education standards. It’s why I’ve worked to hold the powerful to account by passing the country’s most robust laws combating abuse of power by government officials. And it’s why I’m working so hard to get to Washington to deliver for Delaware and to defend our democracy. Because, from the presidency on down, that’s what’s at stake this November: the ability of our democracy to deliver and survive. Three years later, this January 6th, I know I’m not alone in my commitment to come together to fight with everything we have to defend our country. Thanks to you, I have hope in our future. Yours truly, Sarah McBride | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76588538/447880726/1954656641?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20240106_na_insurrection_cand_kw_act_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjFiNDk2Yy05Y2FjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lgpB40tBzDVav67SnilfkRH2Rdmt4sItpVywFQJSZLs=)

subject: A simple contrast
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress

Ashley defended our democracy on the battlefield. Hi teammates, **3 years ago, Donald Trump stood by while violent protestors attacked our nation’s Capitol in an attempt to overthrow the results of a free and fair election.** Mobs busted down the doors to the sacred halls of our democracy, calling for the heads of our elected leaders. 174 police officers were injured, with one losing his life the following day. Four died by suicide within months after the attack. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76588804/447881620/-394196604?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240106_fr_jan6_team_mf_30da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTk3NDhiMi05Y2FjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tNZcJrQoDhEbQZfrWN0ekNoNcRhzkZPrRGR8QCLTyj8=)

_Officer Hodges crushed in a doorway at the Capitol_
How did Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick respond to all of this?
First, Fitzpatrick voted to let Trump off the hook for the violence on January 6th. Then, Fitzpatrick voted for one of the key architects of Trump's plan to overthrow the election results – MAGA Mike Johnson – to be _Speaker of the House._
It is only now that Trump is finally facing some consequences. He's been indicted on 4 felony charges for the insurrection. Colorado and Maine have moved to bar Trump from appearing on their ballots for his role.
**But still, Trump is the Republican frontrunner for president. And it's because Brian Fitzpatrick joined with MAGA Republicans and refuses to hold Trump accountable.**
Ashley can be trusted to defend our democracy, our freedom to vote, and all that we hold dear as Americans – because that's exactly what she did on the battlefield as an Army helicopter pilot.
Now, she's running to put that same courage to work for us in the halls of Congress. But she can't get there without our help.
[Please pitch in your first donation of $10 or more to support Ashley. This year, it's not just about keeping Trump out of the White House. It's about making sure everyone who supports MAGA violence is kept far away from the levers of power.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76588805/447881621/-394196604?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240106_fr_jan6_team_mf_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTk3NDhiMi05Y2FjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tNZcJrQoDhEbQZfrWN0ekNoNcRhzkZPrRGR8QCLTyj8=)

subject: I’m proud of this

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76588911/447881687/1231903508?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240106_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA5MWI0OTZjLTljYWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FPOWSfNDN7eudFGcFcrDOJOdJ10feF9JLcLMrar5RCI=)
Peter, can I explain something?
I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents.
In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate — **as a farmer.**
Every spring, I spend a lot of weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive.
I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand.
The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy — but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded.
**And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with Republican special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do.**
[_**That’s why I’m personally asking you to join my reelection team and split $3 between Upset the Setup and my campaign today to help us block Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate. Anything you can give makes a difference.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76588914/447881690/1231903508?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240106_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA5MWI0OTZjLTljYWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FPOWSfNDN7eudFGcFcrDOJOdJ10feF9JLcLMrar5RCI=)

clean_body: = Peter, can I explain something? I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents. In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate — as a farmer. Every spring, I spend a lot of weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive. I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand. The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy — but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded. And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with Republican special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Thank you so much for sticking by me. I promise to spend every ounce of time fighting for you and your families (when I’m not out in the field, of course). — Jon | | Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC (www.upsetsetup.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 600 Pennsylvania Ave. SE #15180, Washington, DC 20003 Upset The Setup is working everyday to elect young, diverse, progressive Democrats to critical local offices so we can build up our communities, increase opportunity, and eliminate poverty. name: BC4S
subject: The threat we face here in PA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1603%2E552475%2E-E8Kd6)
Peter —
Three years ago today, on January 6th, 2021, violent insurrectionists stormed the U.S. Capitol in an attempt to overturn the results of a free and fair election. This was one of the darkest days in our Nation’s history and a direct result of baseless conspiracy theories spread by former President Donald Trump.
Since then, national Republicans have continued to undermine our elections — from unprecedented voter suppression measures to election officials across the Nation embracing Trump’s Big Lie.
**And the threat we still face here in Pennsylvania is very real. Bob’s opponent, David McCormick, has been endorsed by a number of these election deniers and insurrectionists. He even had Trump’s fake electors on his campaign payroll, and one is running his PAC.**
If David McCormick succeeds in flipping this seat, Democrats will lose the Senate, handing control over to Mitch McConnell and far-right Republicans who will work to undermine our elections and our democratic principles.
[**The state of our democracy is at risk, so please, if you can, pitch in $5 or more to help re-elect Bob and keep our Senate in Democratic hands.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240106-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20230106-1&refcode2=1603_552475_-E8Kd6&akid=1603%2E552475%2E-E8Kd6)

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: I was wrong
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT, A PROJECT OF DEFENDING DEMOCRACY TOGETHER
body:
Trump and the GOP want to move on from the constitutional chaos they created on Jan 6. The Republican Accountability Project won’t let them.
|
---
Friend,

We can never forget what happened three years ago. A violent mob, under the orders of Donald Trump, stormed our nation's capital to stop the peaceful transition of power. The attack lasted for hours, and 140 police officers were assaulted. I thought Americans might finally unite, and do what was needed to protect our institutions and defend the rule of law. I thought Republicans and Democrats would come together and call out January 6th for what it was: an attempted insurrection and an attack on American democracy. **I was wrong.** Elected Republicans went from telling the truth about January 6 and Trump’s role in the attack, to calling the people who stormed our nation's capital “ patriots,” “peaceful protesters,” or “tourists.” Pursuing accountability for their lies is the very reason the Republican Accountability Project exists. Liz Cheney said that, “Republicans cannot both be loyal to Donald Trump and loyal to the Constitution.” And her words still ring true. Trump and the GOP want to move on from the constitutional crisis they created that day. The Republican Accountability Project won’t let them. Sarah Longwell
Executive Director, Republican Accountability Project
---

Trump and the GOP want to move on from the constitutional crisis they created that day. The Republican Accountability Project won’t let them. Sarah Longwell Executive Director, Republican Accountability Project | | | | | | | | Republican Accountability, 1100 Vermont Ave. NW, Tenth Floor, Washington, DC 20005 PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT, A PROJECT OF DEFENDING DEMOCRACY TOGETHER. body:
We must recommit ourselves to safeguarding the freedom to vote across the country. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76590662/447886760/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20240106_f_jan6note_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTc4MDZmNy05ZGFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mXlvYwzFlvc1r46mVWL9ZwWTUV4vp1V2FMHpRKU3s44=&emci=61868b67-f6ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=b97806f7-9dac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=1037277)

| | Three years ago today, anti-democratic conspiracy theorists attempted to overthrow American democracy, fueled by the Big Lie and a desire to silence the voices of voters of color and other Americans they deemed unworthy of the constitutional right to vote. **The deadly attack on the U.S. Capitol hurt all Americans, and exposed a deeper illness in our society that we must work to alleviate together.** The January 6 attack was no doubt a backlash to the political power demonstrated by Black and brown voters, who turned out in historic numbers to restore democratic ideals to the halls of government. The ongoing effects of that backlash continue to affect our democracy to this day, as election workers across the country face ongoing threats and harassment, and as anti-voter legislators continue to introduce hundreds of anti-voter bills at the state level. Anti-voter politicians continue to promote and spread the Big Lie and utilize Jim Crow tactics in order to silence and invalidate voters of color, portraying them as illegitimate or undeserving of American democracy. **So on this solemn anniversary, we must recommit ourselves to safeguarding the freedom to vote across the country. At Fair Fight Action, with your support, we’ll keep working to strengthen the voting power of communities of color, ensure equal access to the ballot box, and promote free and fair elections where the will of the people is respected, not challenged or overturned.** —The Fair Fight Action Team | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76590665/447886763/1026367988?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20240106_f_jan6note_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTc4MDZmNy05ZGFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mXlvYwzFlvc1r46mVWL9ZwWTUV4vp1V2FMHpRKU3s44=)

clean_body: We must recommit ourselves to safeguarding the freedom to vote across the country. | | | Three years ago today, anti-democratic conspiracy theorists attempted to overthrow American democracy, fueled by the Big Lie and a desire to silence the voices of voters of color and other Americans they deemed unworthy of the constitutional right to vote. The deadly attack on the U.S. Capitol hurt all Americans, and exposed a deeper illness in our society that we must work to alleviate together. The January 6 attack was no doubt a backlash to the political power demonstrated by Black and brown voters, who turned out in historic numbers to restore democratic ideals to the halls of government. The ongoing effects of that backlash continue to affect our democracy to this day, as election workers across the country face ongoing threats and harassment, and as anti-voter legislators continue to introduce hundreds of anti-voter bills at the state level. Anti-voter politicians continue to promote and spread the Big Lie and utilize Jim Crow tactics in order to silence and invalidate voters of color, portraying them as illegitimate or undeserving of American democracy. So on this solemn anniversary, we must recommit ourselves to safeguarding the freedom to vote across the country. At Fair Fight Action, with your support, we’ll keep working to strengthen the voting power of communities of color, ensure equal access to the ballot box, and promote free and fair elections where the will of the people is respected, not challenged or overturned. —The Fair Fight Action Team | = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. name: Elizabeth "Liz" Johnson
subject: My Story
body:
Welcome to my newsletter! I am Elizabeth "Liz" Johnson, and I am looking forward to serving as your Congresswoman from Georgia’s
12th district.

[https://email.email.talkswithliz.com/c/eJxskU2r1TAQhn9Ns7slSfO5yELUCsKF60JEN4dpJm3jTU9iE0_RXy89INzF2Q4vz7wzj79EdD-_HbbYz_bLR_08vJ_o10_1B0FnqAGvSHBMUyEl1UqTsEFMl_anBOdhKxCX65vZCVPSWjHPE5dGgqTzxMXMjLFkdRMPFhmC8YbBPIEXBriyTDGNqFGT6DjlgjKqmGCWq37glBlEmAUTNMy-E_S-rW-QXusR25ri397njSS3tlZqN7zr-Njxsba8wxL6JeclBSixnrGOj1td6hX3jo9DFvgBDl2f1--_Xl6G28jbGQgYoeOjktZIL82AQjDJqJ9RDlKFvlwXkvL9c48QZAttzeigRLI7LEdMKValO0GXe_ezbs2_dx_c_ZinWG9PR95fw06aO8kPsc35vF0eumoutMt_H_8CAAD__2JCln8]

> Hey Peter,
>
> Welcome to my newsletter! I am Elizabeth "Liz" Johnson, and I am looking forward to serving as your Congresswoman from Georgia’s
> 12th district.
>
> Things may appear smooth and easy; however, my journey has been far from smooth and easy. In fact, as a woman, wife, and mother,
> I just may have often walked in your shoes. Here’s the start of my story. A story that until recently, I wasn’t comfortable
> sharing.
>
> It was my youngest son who once said, "Mom, your story is not for you, so get over it! It's for those who can relate to it and
> inspire them. Those words from him took a moment to register because his thoughts were being spoken as an adult. Now I share my
> story to hopefully inspire you.
>
> As with any typical life-changing story, my story starts with love. I was married to my high school sweetheart, and considered
> it the perfect love story at the time. I was head over heels in love with my husband and our beautiful children, but my world
> crumbled around me after 20 years of marriage. It was then that I found myself divorced, depressed and a struggling single mom.
> I began to pray to God for a bigger purpose so I could keep my focus off of my personal circumstances.
>
> Sometimes we give great advice, yet we don't always listen to our own advice. I remember listening to my colleagues in the
> insurance industry complain. I constantly asked them “instead of complaining, why not do something to change what you’re
> complaining about? One night, I found myself complaining about my life then asked myself, "Liz, what are you going to do to
> change what you’re unhappy about?" Soon after, I got the idea to run for Insurance Commissioner of Florida. I always considered
> myself a parent and student advocate later evolving into becoming a community advocate. However, there was one small problem; I
> didn't know much about politics nor running for office. I pursued the idea anyway.
>
> I soon realized, being an unknown in the then political circle; that I couldn’t raise enough money to pay the qualifying fee
> necessary to appear on the ballot by the deadline. However, I still traveled to the Florida Department of State Division of
> Elections, intending to somehow qualify as a candidate.
>
> Guess what? I accomplished my goal as a write-in candidate! I didn't win, of course, but I was told I received the most known
> votes as a Florida write-in candidate! That campaign lit a fire within me, yet I still had to deal with my personal life.
>
> As a newly divorced single mom with then only my nine-year-old son at home, my daily living became a struggle. Eventually, I
> relocated to Georgia with my son living in a mobile home park with my sister's family. After two months of moping around, the
> fire reignited within me again! After submitting eight resumes, I received four offers and accepted a job with the largest
> insurance agency in the area. Within three months, I was able to move my youngest son and me to our new home.
>
> Remember earlier in this email me mentioning that I may have often walked in your shoes. Well, none of my journeys has ever been
> easy. Yet, it’s incredible what you can achieve with plenty of heart, desire and determination.
>
> That's all for now! Please keep your eyes open for tomorrow's email, where I discuss how campaigning has also been an uphill
> battle. See you tomorrow!
>
> With much gratitude,
>
> Elizabeth "Liz" Johnson
>

clean_body: Welcome to my newsletter! I am Elizabeth "Liz" Johnson, and I am looking forward to serving as your Congresswoman from Georgia’s 12th district. [] Hey Peter, Welcome to my newsletter! I am Elizabeth "Liz" Johnson, and I am looking forward to serving as your Congresswoman from Georgia’s 12th district. Things may appear smooth and easy; however, my journey has been far from smooth and easy. In fact, as a woman, wife, and mother, I just may have often walked in your shoes. Here’s the start of my story. A story that until recently, I wasn’t comfortable sharing. It was my youngest son who once said, "Mom, your story is not for you, so get over it! It's for those who can relate to it and inspire them. Those words from him took a moment to register because his thoughts were being spoken as an adult. Now I share my story to hopefully inspire you. As with any typical life-changing story, my story starts with love. I was married to my high school sweetheart, and considered it the perfect love story at the time. I was head over heels in love with my husband and our beautiful children, but my world crumbled around me after 20 years of marriage. It was then that I found myself divorced, depressed and a struggling single mom. I began to pray to God for a bigger purpose so I could keep my focus off of my personal circumstances. Sometimes we give great advice, yet we don't always listen to our own advice. I remember listening to my colleagues in the insurance industry complain. I constantly asked them “instead of complaining, why not do something to change what you’re complaining about? One night, I found myself complaining about my life then asked myself, "Liz, what are you going to do to change what you’re unhappy about?" Soon after, I got the idea to run for Insurance Commissioner of Florida. I always considered myself a parent and student advocate later evolving into becoming a community advocate. However, there was one small problem; I didn't know much about politics nor running for office. I pursued the idea anyway. I soon realized, being an unknown in the then political circle; that I couldn’t raise enough money to pay the qualifying fee necessary to appear on the ballot by the deadline. However, I still traveled to the Florida Department of State Division of Elections, intending to somehow qualify as a candidate. Guess what? I accomplished my goal as a write-in candidate! I didn't win, of course, but I was told I received the most known votes as a Florida write-in candidate! That campaign lit a fire within me, yet I still had to deal with my personal life. As a newly divorced single mom with then only my nine-year-old son at home, my daily living became a struggle. Eventually, I relocated to Georgia with my son living in a mobile home park with my sister's family. After two months of moping around, the fire reignited within me again! After submitting eight resumes, I received four offers and accepted a job with the largest insurance agency in the area. Within three months, I was able to move my youngest son and me to our new home. Remember earlier in this email me mentioning that I may have often walked in your shoes. Well, none of my journeys has ever been easy. Yet, it’s incredible what you can achieve with plenty of heart, desire and determination. That's all for now! Please keep your eyes open for tomorrow's email, where I discuss how campaigning has also been an uphill battle. See you tomorrow! With much gratitude, Elizabeth "Liz" Johnson Lizjohnsonforus.com [] $25 [] $50 [] $100 [] $250 [] $300 [] Other [] YOUR VOICE, YOUR SUPPORT, AND OUR FUTURES MATTER! THANK YOU IN ADVANCE FOR YOUR EARLY SUPPORT! [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [ ] Liz Johnson for Us 2024 P.O. BOX 1404 Statesboro, GA 30459 United States Want to change how you receive these emails? You can update your preferences [] or unsubscribe from this list []. [] []

body:

**Former Navy SEAL Reveals NEW King of All Flashlights!** [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj7FOwzAQhp_msiU6nx07GTIUogBCggUJmCrXjlvTmKSOS9S3R6mAifH-_9PddzpMg3eXBtQNEB28nYEI-AaITu9LiOeP8HiXL8-v-Uk-hXIt6RaI0mXq_8ifJUUftB_WVLWZbbizKLK-YQpFWTJeqezQaGuVUaVy3LHeWdtbhUwJro2umcE68w0hCWQomaBaYIGurOxOCFUx2VfGgMDrnUKHPnqj2ZwWHeM4hsKMIRuaQ0rTfBXrgDoxpXhkcu2AOjN4cwTepfjlLfCWcbF-JDfdQ7uOWJdAUju3nc-7Nag45r9C-YzIDBICyXMKW6PDpP3-E3h7__aS_89msbHT4ofBz1KBwP3V3YzhOwAA__-vt2yb) **Demand Is Surging – 428,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...** The secret is out... Police officers, emergency responders, everyday civilians... They're all raving about THIS breakthrough 9-in-1 tactical **"King of Flashlights"** that's powered by the sun. This super-survival "bad-a**" flashlight is unlike anything you've ever seen, and it's so versatile, you'll literally find a use for it every day AND during emergencies. It's super bright and solar-powered **(so it doesn't need batteries – ever).** And it can power your cellphone or tablet right up, keeping a vital lifeline of communication open when you need it most. It's water-resistant, rugged and built to withstand the elements. It even impressed a former Navy SEAL so much, he calls it: "The only flashlight you can trust in a life-threatening situation." [**Watch him give a live demonstration here.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj7FOwzAQhp_msiU6nx07GTIUogBCggUJmCrXjlvTmKSOS9S3R6mAifH-_9PddzpMg3eXBtQNEB28nYEI-AaITu9LiOeP8HiXL8-v-Uk-hXIt6RaI0mXq_8ifJUUftB_WVLWZbbizKLK-YQpFWTJeqezQaGuVUaVy3LHeWdtbhUwJro2umcE68w0hCWQomaBaYIGurOxOCFUx2VfGgMDrnUKHPnqj2ZwWHeM4hsKMIRuaQ0rTfBXrgDoxpXhkcu2AOjN4cwTepfjlLfCWcbF-JDfdQ7uOWJdAUju3nc-7Nag45r9C-YzIDBICyXMKW6PDpP3-E3h7__aS_89msbHT4ofBz1KBwP3V3YzhOwAA__-vt2yb) This ingenious tactical flashlight can make all the difference in an emergency with **its 9 lifesaving functions...**
* **A powerful LED flashlight.** At 200 Lumens, it's ultra-bright – so bright you'll need to use caution so you don't shine it in someone's eyes. See as far as 200 meters away. HaloXT has 3 settings to choose from – high, low and strobe.
* **Solar panel.** This is where the rubber hits the road. The built-in solar panel means you don't have to get batteries for it – ever. Just place HaloXT in sunlight and you're good to go.
* **Powers other devices.** HaloXT stores extra power inside so you can power your tablet, smartphone, radio, and more. This could be a critical lifesaver by keeping you in touch with emergency personnel or loved ones.
* **Red SOS light and strobe.** If you are stranded somewhere and need to visually signal for help, the handy SOS light will make you easy to spot for 1st responders.
* **Work light.** Need an extra bright light in your workshop or garage? What about if your car breaks down at night? The HaloXT has you covered.
* **Seatbelt cutter.** It's a fact... Your seatbelt could get stuck in an accident, trapping you inside your car. HaloXT eliminates that fear with its razor-sharp cutter.
* **Glass-breaking hammer.** The pointed steel tip of this glass breaker ensures you can shatter your vehicle's window in an emergency.
* **Compass.** If you find yourself stranded, becoming disoriented is a real threat. HaloXT's compass will always help you find your "true north."

name: Justin Amash
subject: January 6, 2024
body:
The other day I made an observation on X about how U.S. foreign policy continues to put American troops in harm's way without any clear mission or commitment from the American people and their representatives in Congress. While my post received overwhelmingly positive responses, there was predictable pushback from a few hawks who decried my view as "isolationism."

The other day [I made an observation on X](https://substack.com/redirect/77cee1f7-8aa9-43cb-862e-c3e734fc993b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about how U.S. foreign policy continues to put American troops in harm's way without any clear mission or commitment from the American people and their representatives in Congress.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/958b1c91-34e5-48f8-99e2-73cab527ec79?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
While my post received overwhelmingly positive responses, there was predictable pushback from a few hawks who decried my view as "isolationism."
Here's why that criticism is totally disingenuous.
First, if not stationing troops in dozens of countries around the world constitutes isolationism, then the vast majority of nations on earth are isolationist. But we don't call those countries isolationist, because that's not what isolationism is.
Similarly, if someone refrains from stationing armed guards at dozens of neighborhoods around the city, we don't call that person a loner. That's just not what it means to be a loner.
Isolationism is a policy of not engaging with other countries. A person can believe in robust engagement (trade, cultural exchange, and more) with individuals and organizations across the globe--including government-to-government engagement--while opposing an aggressive military posture, which usually serves to isolate people. In fact, this belief in expanding the scope of human cooperation and rejecting coercive force is the general position of millions of Americans who are most opposed to isolationism: classical liberals and libertarians.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1137026&post_id=140408963&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQwNDA4OTYzLCJpYXQiOjE3MDQ1NTE1MzMsImV4cCI6MTcwNzE0MzUzMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMzcwMjYiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.hS6sg-U2c2rvMw641bsfVX3ChivKyO4qc_IUEU6coRQ)
Second, the accusation of "isolationism" with respect to my post is really just a way to evade the constitutional argument. And evading the constitutional argument is an effort to evade the representational argument.
There's no getting around the fact that Congress hasn't authorized current U.S. hostilities in places like Iraq. As [I've noted previously on X](https://substack.com/redirect/831071ab-ab3b-4699-b402-721fbd16ebc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the 2002 Authorization for Use of Military Force doesn't authorize operations generically in Iraq for all time. It authorizes operations specifically against Saddam Hussein's regime in Iraq, a government that was defeated and dissolved a generation ago.
Likewise, as [I've pointed out](https://substack.com/redirect/59cbdeee-b6bd-4c26-9eb8-7edc15c0fecc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the 2001 Authorization for Use of Military Force doesn't authorize operations in or against Iraq, Syria, or Iran. It authorizes operations exclusively against the perpetrators of the 9/11 attacks and those who harbored them.
The response that all U.S. military actions in the region are simply defensive--and therefore don't require congressional approval--doesn't hold water when American troops, weapons, and resources are placed deliberately into fields of combat. When a president inserts U.S. forces into known conflict zones, he understands well that there will be any number of provocations, including attacks on American bases or troops, that might then be used to justify U.S. retaliation, with hostilities potentially escalating rapidly into a full-blown war.
The Framers of the Constitution recognized the enormous danger of placing the decision to go to war in the hands of the commander in chief of the Armed Forces, the president of the United States. So they didn't. Whether the United States enters war is a policy choice that the Constitution leaves to the legislative branch, Congress--the body whose membership is closest to the people.
There's a lot of talk these days about saving "our democracy." Is there a more important democratic decision than whether our fathers and mothers, our sons and daughters should have to risk their lives in hostilities overseas?
The bottom line is that even if one believes that bringing American troops home (or keeping them out of areas of high conflict) amounts to isolationism, it nonetheless remains a decision left to members of Congress, not the president. And congressional inaction on military authorizations--for any reason or no reason--can never justify unauthorized presidential action, because inaction, too, is Congress's prerogative.
