name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Three years ago today, Josh Hawley abandoned his duty and betrayed our country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
[1]Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate

Peter — three
years ago today, Josh Hawley abandoned his duty, betrayed our country, and
embarrassed our state. He proved that he’s just a fraud and a coward.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42283?refcode=em20240106-4547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=4547%2E614464%2Ewu8oVF ]On left: Photo of Josh Hawley raising his fist outside the Capitol on
January 6, 2021. On right: Screengrab of video of Josh Hawley fleeing
Capitol on January 6.

As a born-and-raised Missourian who joined the U.S. Marine Corps to honor
and serve the community that took care of my family after going bankrupt
from my little sister’s medical bills, I know those aren’t the values of
working people across our state.

But Josh Hawley will never be able to understand that. Please let me tell
you why:

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42283?refcode=em20240106-4547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=4547%2E614464%2Ewu8oVF ]DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42283?refcode=em20240106-4547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=4547%2E614464%2Ewu8oVF ]On left: Photo of Lucas and members of his family in his old
neighborhood. On right: Photo of young Joshua Hawley.

On the right is Joshua Hawley. While his banker daddy was sending him to a
fancy prep school miles from his hometown, my family and I were relying on
our friends and neighbors to survive bankruptcy and medical bills in
mid-Missouri — in a community where people took care of each other. That’s
us on the left.

When Hawley graduated from law school, he joined one of the world’s most
elite corporate law firms. I joined the Marine Corps to pay back the
community in Missouri that took care of me and my family. And when he was
climbing the ladder to become another corrupt politician, I was serving my
country — and then working to prevent the pointless overseas wars that
make us less safe.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42283?refcode=em20240106-4547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=4547%2E614464%2Ewu8oVF ]On left: Photo of Lucas during his service in the U.S. Marine Corps. On
right: Missouri Independent headline about Hawley's knowingly violating
transparency laws as during his time as Attorney General to benefit his
2018 Senate campaign.

While Josh Hawley aligned himself with the same giant corporations who’ve
spent decades attacking Missouri workers and shipping away our jobs, I’ve
been fighting to take back power for American workers and small
businesses.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42283?refcode=em20240106-4547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=4547%2E614464%2Ewu8oVF ]On left: HuffPost headline that reads 'Lucas Kunce, a crusader against
corporate consolidation.' On right: Labor Tribune headline that reads
'Hawley has been a vocal supporter of implementing Right-to-Work in
Missouri.

And when Hawley voted against relief for veterans like me who were exposed
to toxic burn pits, I stood up alongside thousands of veterans to hold him
accountable.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42283?refcode=em20240106-4547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=4547%2E614464%2Ewu8oVF ]On left: FoxNews headline that reads 'I was exposed to toxic burn pits
in Iraq; Republicans turned their backs on veterans like me.' On right:
YahooNews headline that reads 'Blunt, Hawley vote to stall bill expanding
health care for veterans exposed to burn pits.'

The Missouri I grew up in taught us to take care of one another. To do
your duty. To serve and sacrifice for your fellow Missourians.

Josh Hawley doesn’t know that Missouri — and three years ago today, he
showed us the only thing he’s learned is how to be a fraud and a coward.

Missourians deserve a US Senator who will stand up and fight for them —
and unlike Josh, I'm ready to serve. If you’re ready to help us make sure
every Missouri voter knows it before they vote on Election Day, I need
your help:

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42283?refcode=em20240106-4547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1007&akid=4547%2E614464%2Ewu8oVF ]Will you chip in any amount you can afford to our campaign right now so
we can get our message in front of voters? The only way we’ll be able to
flip this Senate seat is if we build a powerful grassroots movement, and
support from real people like you is the best way we can do it.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your
contribution instantly:

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42284?refcode=em20240106-4547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=1008&akid=4547%2E614464%2Ewu8oVF ]Contribute $10
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42284?refcode=em20240106-4547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=1009&akid=4547%2E614464%2Ewu8oVF ]Contribute $25
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42284?refcode=em20240106-4547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=1010&akid=4547%2E614464%2Ewu8oVF ]Contribute $30
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42284?refcode=em20240106-4547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=1011&akid=4547%2E614464%2Ewu8oVF ]Contribute $50
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42284?refcode=em20240106-4547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=1012&akid=4547%2E614464%2Ewu8oVF ]Contribute $100
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42284?refcode=em20240106-4547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=1013&akid=4547%2E614464%2Ewu8oVF ]Contribute $250
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42283?refcode=em20240106-4547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1014&akid=4547%2E614464%2Ewu8oVF ]Give another amount

If we keep working together, we can take back power for working
Missourians and everyday people all across the country.

Thanks for all your help,

— Lucas

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1015&akid=4547%2E614464%2Ewu8oVF

Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri.

name: Mike Johnson
subject: a dime a dozen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans – this is Mike Johnson.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/emsTxoaYAot0elpzDyZxlg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnfCUkP0TqaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90ZWFtLXNjYWxpc2UvY29vcmRpbmF0ZWQtYW5kLXByZXBsYW5uZWQtam9obnNvbi8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMTA3X1dHLVJPTi4xMTIyMzlfdDE0MzEzMDktMTc1NiZleF90aWQ9MjAyNDAxMDdfV0ctUk9OLjExMjIzOV90MTQzMTMwOS0xNzU2JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXR2LXJvbjItMjAyNDAxMDYmeHVudj10di1yb24yLTIwMjQwMTA2VwNzcGNCCmWYKHaZZdxHnudSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/emsTxoaYAot0elpzDyZxlg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnfCUkP0TqaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90ZWFtLXNjYWxpc2UvY29vcmRpbmF0ZWQtYW5kLXByZXBsYW5uZWQtam9obnNvbi8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMTA3X1dHLVJPTi4xMTIyMzlfdDE0MzEzMDktMTc1NiZleF90aWQ9MjAyNDAxMDdfV0ctUk9OLjExMjIzOV90MTQzMTMwOS0xNzU2JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXR2LXJvbjItMjAyNDAxMDYmeHVudj10di1yb24yLTIwMjQwMTA2VwNzcGNCCmWYKHaZZdxHnudSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not next month - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

name: Adam Schiff
subject: A day I won’t forget
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I remember feeling fear. Sadness. Hopelessness. And then, finally, once the fighting was over and we had fulfilled our oath of certifying the election, feeling hope.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4987%2E5257348%2EmgNMHp)
Derek —
Few days in our country’s history have made as big of an impact on me, and on our democracy as January 6, 2021.
I remember the January 6th attack on the Capitol like it was yesterday.
The sounds of yelling. Of insurrectionists storming the Capitol building and breaking doors and windows to get in. Of the whispers between members of Congress deciding how to protect ourselves.
The sight of Capitol police officers running toward danger. Of my colleagues crouched on the floor, clutching masks to protect themselves from tear gas. Of thousands of protestors assaulting Capitol Police and desecrating the hallowed halls of Congress.
You could sense the fear and the urgency. And the anger over what this mob was doing to overturn a free and fair election. And then, finally, once the fighting was over and we had fulfilled our duty to certify the election, the recognition that our democracy had survived, but barely.
**Derek, I will remember that day for a long time. But I will also remember what my GOP colleagues in Congress did.**
After the rioting and the mayhem, a majority of Republican members still voted to overturn the election. Still. 147 members of Congress — many of whom are still in office today.
_Insurrectionists, too. Albeit in suits and ties._
Since that day, we have seen nothing but continued threats to our Constitution and our democracy — by way of election deniers running for office, and members of Congress continuing to support Donald Trump, vowing to pardon him and try to erase history.
Our democracy was battered and bruised on January 6, 2021, and it has not yet recovered. **The number of Republicans who believe the election was stolen has been increasing since January 6, and that has only emboldened Trump and his MAGA followers even more.**
It’s going to take hard work by _everyone_ to move this country forward and finally relegate Trump to the dustbin of history. But we will. We must be a country that can have political disagreements without resorting to violence and insurrection.
**[If you agree that we _must_ take action now to preserve and protect our democracy for future generations, then I am respectfully asking you to add a contribution of $3 to my U.S. Senate campaign today to help me continue this important work.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240106_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=4&akid=4987%2E5257348%2EmgNMHp)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $3](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240106_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=5&akid=4987%2E5257348%2EmgNMHp)

---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240106_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=7&akid=4987%2E5257348%2EmgNMHp)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240106_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=8&akid=4987%2E5257348%2EmgNMHp)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240106_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=9&akid=4987%2E5257348%2EmgNMHp)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240106_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=10&akid=4987%2E5257348%2EmgNMHp)

We will get through this difficult time in our history. America is a deeply resilient country filled with patriotic citizens who love our democracy, and those who do, vastly outnumber those trying to tear it down.
Please take care of yourselves, and thank you for all your support during this pivotal time in our history.
— Adam

name: John Fetterman
subject: The threat of another Jan 6 hasn’t gone anywhere
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
It’s plain that the threat hasn’t gone anywhere.
#
This is still so important to remember, Derek.
Three years ago today, the incredibly dangerous period after the 2020 election culminated in an attack on the Capitol at Donald Trump’s urging and people tragically lost their lives.
Everything we’ve learned about the attack from congressional investigations, and everything we’ve seen happen since, has made it plain that the threat to our democracy hasn’t gone _anywhere_. That’s why we’ve got to stay vigilant.
**[I’m in the Senate to fight for democracy + hold insurrectionists accountable. If you’re with me, can you chip in today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240106-1?refcode=em20240106-1-8741&refcode2=8741_434096_Q2RAWp&akid=8741%2E434096%2EQ2RAWp)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240106-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240106-8741&refcode2=8741_434096_Q2RAWp&akid=8741%2E434096%2EQ2RAWp)**
On January 5, 2021 — the day before the attack on the Capitol -- the PA GOP ejected me from the Senate chamber so they could unlawfully stop a state senator from being sworn in. The very next day, dozens of GOP members of the U.S. House and Senate tried to stop the certification of the 2020 presidential election.
And now, in 2024, I couldn’t take the attacks on our democracy more seriously -- especially as the threats become even more vocal. **No matter your political beliefs, everybody I know was horrified about the events of three years ago -- as Americans.** We *have* to come together to prevent chaos like that from happening again this election year.
The threat isn’t gone. I’ve proven I’ll stand up to insurrectionists + I’ll do it again. 💯
**[Derek, I promise you this: I’ll take on anyone who comes for our democracy. Help me continue that work in the Senate with a contribution today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240106-1?refcode=em20240106-1-8741&refcode2=8741_434096_Q2RAWp&akid=8741%2E434096%2EQ2RAWp)**
Thank you for your support.
John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240106-8741-footer&t=1&refcode2=8741_434096_Q2RAWp&akid=8741%2E434096%2EQ2RAWp)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8741%2E434096%2EQ2RAWp)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8741%2E434096%2EQ2RAWp)

name: John Padora
subject: I’m running to defend our freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
Three years ago, a violent mob attacked the United States capitol in a coordinated attempt to overthrow our democracy and invalidate a free and fair election. The attack was egged on by then-president Donald Trump – but he wasn’t alone.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=dc208e0159054f16b3b690bf67dd8f7e&_e=G9m8vpd_TvR5-lGuOPfgVlYBqWl8yhqiZ7o_9lj-C7m_c6BTviP4DgmM5AkPSSswg92lazKTeRk_7ESSzRgHa_lcW9vxHg4JGOi9K4WqtnD1hoY3Lrb7V18OXM-8ngEeV8etSDouIWG83-Z5yRO4sSShDBNsm7zeJTGnyxgUVUpoQG9JxHCtVqxR8ZDXw3obJ60JqcR1m_8t1bYZcC98hpVASabsBG16RyNTLmHkHDptZWYwg-ShGqwjdlSf96C-Z6QFhLiLJNghQWlyFKcepK9zRtYIO1gGUnT7wAXUR6kZzF9MxPZduAbeEntZw6zjeCC40qQDYDBgy-7_jD5-VB4Z16nA_PsETMuQK2laPrezRYKk3TP_G51zBYAlOwpC8zMW8rQWUNoh8vfy3JGcgQ%3D%3D) Three years ago, a violent mob attacked the United States capitol in a coordinated attempt to overthrow our democracy and invalidate a free and fair election. The attack was egged on by then-president Donald Trump – but he wasn’t alone. As the mob began to make its way towards the Halls of Congress, Lauren Boebert tweeted that “today is 1776” – a reference that could only mean she was encouraging armed and violent rebellion against the government. Hi Peter,
Three years ago today, right-wing extremists, led by former President Trump, assaulted the U.S. Capitol in an attempt to disrupt our sacred democratic process and the peaceful transfer of power.
In fact, one of the folks who stormed the Capitol on January 6th is a Republican running to represent Arizona’s 3rd Congressional District. Yeah, seriously, we’re officially running against a January 6th insurrectionist.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_010624_jan6 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_010624_jan6]
Donald Trump and his MAGA extremist movement are still very much a threat to our democracy.
Let’s be clear: the January 6th Insurrection was a violent assault on the very foundation of our democracy; those who willingly participated in it should be held accountable, not sent to Congress.
The stakes in 2024 are clear. In our district, in Arizona, and throughout our entire country, the future of our democracy will be on the ballot. The good news is that I know if we come together for a common purpose and common cause, we will win.
I know this because we’ve done it before in 2020 and 2022. We can, we must, and we will do it again in 2024.
Join us today and chip in whatever you can so we can defeat our January 6th insurrectionist opponent. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_010624_jan6]
Sí se puede,
Raquel Terán

name: Sharice Davids
subject: Three years ago and today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| January 6th, 2021 was one of the darkest days in our nation’s history. Three years later, it’s still difficult to process the attack on our Capitol and on our democracy itself.

As we approach the 2024 elections, we cannot forget the day the lives of Congress members and our staff, Capitol Police, administrative and custodial staff, cafeteria workers, and many others were put in danger — leading to the tragic loss of life for several people.

The insurrection was an abhorrent event, but the threat of extremism exists throughout our country, and we must act to protect our democracy and those who serve it every day.

**It’s on all of us to stand unwavering in our demands to protect American democracy from present and future threats.**

Thank you,

Sharice

name: Courier
subject: There would be no January 6th without Fox News
body:
We have to hold Fox News and other right-wing propaganda outlets accountable, spread the truth about our elections, and protect our democracy in 2024.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76605853/447925252/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg3OGQyYzItYWNhYy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V_tj-iM77_BThiy0oml6ZYxcieU4GOPRXisQubwrtpk=&emci=230406bc-acac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3878d2c2-acac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=14016711)
On January 6, 2021, Donald Trump incited a mob of right-wing insurrectionists to attack the U.S. Capitol.
**Three years later, we can’t forget one ugly fact: There would be no January 6th without Fox News.** [**Will you donate now and help us counter-program Fox News’ lies and hate so we can stop them from hurting our democracy again in 2024?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76605857/447925255/1056436095?refcode=em20240106&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg3OGQyYzItYWNhYy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V_tj-iM77_BThiy0oml6ZYxcieU4GOPRXisQubwrtpk=)
We know now from court documents that Fox’s hosts, producers, and executives considered Trump’s election fraud claims “mind-blowingly nuts,” “really crazy stuff,” and “totally off the rails.”
Despite knowing what they were doing was wrong, Fox News kept pushing Trump’s election fraud because they were afraid of losing pro-Trump viewers.
**The awful reality is that Fox News inflicted unthinkable damage to our democracy just to boost ratings and stop viewers from going to other right-wing news outlets like One America News and Newsmax.**
**Peter, January 6th is a grave reminder of just how dangerous our political environment can become when disinformation is allowed to spread unchecked—and with Donald Trump almost certain to become the GOP presidential nominee and potentially facing jail time, we have to start fighting back now so we can protect our democracy in 2024.**
That’s why COURIER is mobilizing to expand our journalism’s reach to battleground states across the country—and it’s only possible because of supporters like you.
[**Will you make the commitment to fight back against disinformation by making a gift of $5 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76605861/447925257/1056436095?refcode=em20240106&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg3OGQyYzItYWNhYy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V_tj-iM77_BThiy0oml6ZYxcieU4GOPRXisQubwrtpk=)
**[Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76605865/447925266/1056436095?refcode=em20240106&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg3OGQyYzItYWNhYy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V_tj-iM77_BThiy0oml6ZYxcieU4GOPRXisQubwrtpk=)**
Thank you,
Courier

clean_body: We have to hold Fox News and other right-wing propaganda outlets accountable, spread the truth about our elections, and protect our democracy in 2024. On January 6, 2021, Donald Trump incited a mob of right-wing insurrectionists to attack the U.S. Capitol. Three years later, we can’t forget one ugly fact: There would be no January 6th without Fox News. = We know now from court documents that Fox’s hosts, producers, and executives considered Trump’s election fraud claims “mind-blowingly nuts,” “really crazy stuff,” and “totally off the rails.” Despite knowing what they were doing was wrong, Fox News kept pushing Trump’s election fraud because they were afraid of losing pro-Trump viewers. The awful reality is that Fox News inflicted unthinkable damage to our democracy just to boost ratings and stop viewers from going to other right-wing news outlets like One America News and Newsmax. Peter, January 6th is a grave reminder of just how dangerous our political environment can become when disinformation is allowed to spread unchecked—and with Donald Trump almost certain to become the GOP presidential nominee and potentially facing jail time, we have to start fighting back now so we can protect our democracy in 2024. That’s why COURIER is mobilizing to expand our journalism’s reach to battleground states across the country—and it’s only possible because of supporters like you. = = Thank you, Courier Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

name: GIFFORDS
subject: We can never allow January 6th to happen again
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Our democracy is on the line
#

Friends,
On this day three years ago, we watched in horror as an angry mob of insurrectionists stormed our nation’s Capitol.
The unfortunate truth is that many of the people who attacked the Capitol are the same people who have fallen prey to extremist rhetoric. For years, the NRA has used inflammatory language encouraging their supporters to take up arms against their own government. Meanwhile, Donald Trump only fanned the divisive flames.
On January 6th, Trump urged thousands to attack our democracy rather than peaceably accepting the results of the 2020 elections.
**We can never allow January 6th to happen again. That starts with continuing our work to stop political violence, and electing leaders who will prioritize safety over extremism.**
As we enter 2024, we have two options: We can work to reelect Joe Biden—the most effective gun safety president in modern history. Or, we can sit back and allow Donald Trump—who instigated the January 6th insurrection—to become president once again.
What will your choice be?
[**Will you join our fight against political violence and support our efforts to reelect President Biden in 2024 by making a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240106-1-30&t=1&akid=7312%2E3935704%2E377SBZ)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: FWD: UPDATE: Allred Refuses to Respond
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | Hi, I wanted to make sure you saw this shocking email re: my Democrat opponent... \- Ted
---
|
---
From: Ted CruzTo: All Supporters Date: Thursday, January 4, 2024 Subject: UPDATE: Allred Refuses to Respond
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz.-HfRMWgX-ztw)
---
Do you remember all this, Fellow Conservative? **Last fall, following the horrifying, barbaric terrorist attack on Israel by Hamas, we exposed the truth about Colin Allred’s anti-Israel extremism and seeming support for terroristic hate.**
* We highlighted how he has met in the past with Students for Justice in Palestine, a group of _hate-fueled radicals_ who organized an anti-Israel rally on October 12th.

* We let voters know how he voted “NO” on the package passed in the House to help Israel fight back against the Hamas terrorists, and how in the past he’s voted against a measure to condemn the anti-Israel (BDS) movement.

* And we didn’t let him off the hook when he lashed out at a citizen report who asked him pointed questions regarding his support for Hamas – __this guy even threatened to CALL THE CAPITOL POLICE in a cowardly attempt to dodge accountability__ _!_

It’s the New Year, and Colin Allred STILL refuses to retract his support for Hamas.

It is disturbing and absolutely inexplicable. This guy is wrong for the Lone Star State, period.
**[**Help us continue to EXPOSE THE TRUTH and KEEP TEXAS RED this November >>>**](http://trk.tedcruz.)[](http://trk.tedcruz.)[](http://trk.tedcruz.)**

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz
---
[**TAKE A STAND**](http://trk.tedcruz._Z1up1eiA)

name: Elect Gabe Evans
subject: Welcome to 2024! Let's Make it the Year of Republican Wins!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Gabe Evans
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://wayrap.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjYwMjExMCxcImxcIjoxMDk2MzcxNDQyOTU3Njk2MjksXCJyXCI6MTA5NjM3MTQ1NjMyNzA0Mjc2fSIsInMiOiJlN2E5OGM5YjkyZjRhZGE1In0)

---
| Hello, Happy New Year! I hope this message finds you well and that you had a joyful holiday season. As we step into 2024, I'm excited about the opportunities this year holds for positive change and making a real impact on our community. Now, more than ever, we need strong, principled leaders who are dedicated to representing our conservative values in Congress. That's why I want to take a moment to emphasize the importance of supporting our campaign, especially now that we have officially entered the election year. **Proven****, Conservative****Leadership:** Throughout my career as an Army Blackhawk pilot and police officer, I've demonstrated a commitment to conservative principles. I left law enforcement to run for the state legislature because I was so sickened by the consequences of far-left, "defund the police" policies and two-tier justice system. Everyday Coloradans now suffer under the 4th worst crime rate in the nation, while leftist politicians ban guns and assign themselves 24/7 police protection! I swore to uphold the Constitution and protect people's life, liberty, and property. I __ want to continue that fight in Congress. **Local Insight:** I understand the unique needs and concerns of our community. As your state representative, I have worked to address the issues that matter most to you and will continue to do so on the federal level. **A Vision for a Better Future:** Are you ready to stop Joe Biden and change Washington, D.C. in 2024? Together, we can end woke agendas in our classrooms, secure our Southern border, lower the cost of living, and restore the rule of law!

**Make a Difference in 2024:** To kick off the new year on the best foot, we are continuing our strong fundraising campaign, and I'm reaching out to you for your support. [**Your financial contribution will be instrumental in helping us reach voters, spread our message, and secure victory in this important election and maintain control of the House of Representatives.** ](https://wayrap.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjYwMjExMCxcImxcIjoxMDk2MzcxNDQzMTE0OTgyODAsXCJyXCI6MTA5NjM3MTQ1NjMyNzA0Mjc2fSIsInMiOiI0ZTkyMDdmNmExN2Y0NmNhIn0) **
**

Thank you for considering this important request. Together, we can make 2024 the year of positive, conservative change that shakes up Congress and Washington, D.C. name: David Hogg
subject: The second step for our generation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Let me tell you what I think, friend.
Young people are smart. We pay attention to the issues. We're showing up to vote.
But to me, this is only the first step for our generation. The second step?
We need young people on the ballot. We need young people in elected office.
That’s why I teamed up with Kevin Lata, the campaign manager who helped elect the first ever Gen-Z member of Congress last year, to launch Leaders We Deserve.
Friend, if you agree that we need more young, courageous leaders running for office, will you split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Serve America? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
As a generation, we grew up hearing that to survive a school shooting, we had to run, hide, and fight. I think our generation needs to reinterpret what that means.
*
We
need
to
run—for
office
.
Representation
won’t
happen
on
its
own.
*
We
need
to
stop
hiding
from
our
responsibility
to
our
country
and
planet.
*
We
need
to
fight
for
a
better
government
and
a
better
future
for
everyone.
That’s why Leaders We Deserve exists. We’re helping young people run for office and win—like Nadarius Clark, our endorsed candidate who just won in Virginia.
Leaders We Deserve was founded to recruit and support the next generation of leaders. Will you help us take the second step and split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Serve America? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
Thanks for everything you do for this movement,
David Hogg
Co-Founder, Leaders We Deserve

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: RE: BALLOT REMOVAL

name: (1) Ron DeSantis, me
subject: FWD:Illegal Immigrants are overwhelming us; I will control the border.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=ca644c1adfa51385e6fe045388aa958c9c12e078f5e76b6a60fb210646e76437d0dc7b9fb8cfb808b9ed6659d1e0161e784d32824d0c330e340999dd5ea2204f94bb3d23c4849a0742a8032d039c5088

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c4f1c23b5fa3af69876fe75c9d9ccdbd297d9cf732ff0c0f96265e62c6864809ccb892daea5ebc5959ca5b0e94fa2d1561208323a6d4b6da

Friend, Ron DeSantis is tired of the excuses. He's speaking up about the invasion we are facing at our southern border and the CRISIS it has led to for the American people.

This is too important to ignore. Please, read his message below.

- Team DeSantis

------------------------------------------Forwarded Message-----------------------------------------

Friend — We are at war, and in crisis.

The war is being waged on us by Mexican drug cartels, who are bringing Chinese-manufactured fentanyl across our southern border, killing our citizens. And they’re trafficking innocent children to be sexually abused.

The crisis is with the millions of illegal aliens pouring into our country, overwhelming local jurisdictions and escaping accountability. Without the ability to know who is coming into our country, we run the risk of terrorists entering through the southern border to perpetrate a horrific attack. And without the ability to control our border, we lose our sovereignty as a nation.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c4f1c23b5fa3af69876fe75c9d9ccdbd297d9cf732ff0c0f96265e62c6864809ccb892daea5ebc5959ca5b0e94fa2d1561208323a6d4b6da
Help me restore our sovereignty TODAY by donating what you can here to my campaign .

This crisis has reached unprecedented levels under President Joe Biden, who has failed to fulfill his constitutional oath to take care that the laws be faithfully executed. Biden would not have been able to get away with letting in 8 million illegal aliens if we had a border wall — something Donald Trump promised, but failed to deliver.

As president, I will end this chaos and reclaim our sovereignty.

On day one of my presidency, I will declare a national emergency and shut down all illegal entries. Phony asylum claims aimed at bypassing proper immigration processes will no longer be entertained. I will end the abuse of parole authority being used to usher in thousands of illegal immigrants monthly. And I will fully empower Border Patrol and Immigrations and Customs Enforcement (ICE) to deport those with no legitimate right to be here.

There will be consequences for other nations — like Mexico and those in Central America — that allow this travesty to continue. They will either stop enabling illegal immigration through their jurisdictions and into America or face diplomatic and economic retaliation.

Also, under my presidency, the influence of big corporations on our immigration system will end. Big companies spend millions lobbying for open borders to get cheap labor. They will have NO influence on my administration.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c4f1c23b5fa3af6914dc298ba62a9466243b67184b65c09ecc6ab1c082e3b34ddfe4e6717f7295ba6fe38df162126bddfedb43108dec9fef
Chip in $47 to support my campaign

I will build the wall, and I will make Mexico pay for it. Donald Trump promised this, and not only failed to deliver on this promise but has now backed away from the promise altogether. Here’s how I’ll get this done: Charge fees on remittances that foreign nationals working in the U.S. send abroad. We will collect those fees — totaling billions of dollars a year — and use them to finance the wall.

In addition, I will ensure that states have the authority to enforce immigration laws — something that will serve as a force multiplier for our efforts. I will work with states that want to be part of the solution and enforce penalties on those that do not. In opposition to the Biden administration’s willful neglect of our southern border, Florida, under my leadership, has been a bulwark of immigration enforcement. I sent the Florida National Guard to the border when Washington did nothing. I sent illegal aliens out of Florida’s communities and to so-called “sanctuary cities,” such as Martha’s Vineyard. And I signed the strongest anti-illegal immigration legislation in the country.

Finally, we will deport the millions of migrants released into every corner of this nation by empowering our ICE agents, streamlining the court process, and adamantly insisting our existing immigration laws are followed. The mistakes of the past will be rectified under the DeSantis administration.

The border has been a persistent problem my entire adult life, and that is unacceptable.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c4f1c23b5fa3af69876fe75c9d9ccdbd297d9cf732ff0c0f96265e62c6864809ccb892daea5ebc5959ca5b0e94fa2d1561208323a6d4b6da
I will bring this issue to a conclusion once and for all with your help . No excuses; I will get the job done, and I will not let you down.

Sincerely,

Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c4f1c23b5fa3af696c3a6cc473e55a011b6a734b35aab69ed7c6a2534cddc431433009bdd8ce281f21c38f8a53f81feb2104bfa3a6817d0f

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c4f1c23b5fa3af69384684a4c642b0dc30b2df7291466eaa6e3c70c671923ce7acf2dd616db3b6cdaac4690a824724095aba6c9139df4df2
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c4f1c23b5fa3af696020711223e1a4f123243708ad55c32b002bdfc9bfbb4fc8eb8b1258a4655c0a13c3023b299ed2623c8460ff9a58269b
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c4f1c23b5fa3af696c3a6cc473e55a011b6a734b35aab69ed7c6a2534cddc431433009bdd8ce281f21c38f8a53f81feb2104bfa3a6817d0f

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c4f1c23b5fa3af696c3a6cc473e55a011b6a734b35aab69ed7c6a2534cddc431433009bdd8ce281f21c38f8a53f81feb2104bfa3a6817d0f

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Team Kaptur
subject: Republicans are scrambling. Marcy is delivering.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAPTUR FOR CONGRESS
body:
While they fight among themselves, Marcy is delivering for our community.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76609974/447934243/1037629634?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=240106_team_scrambling&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTZkNTI4OC1iMWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n4-Gk7m9OQeztTq4JoP_AgLKhwsiG8_ekRr3juGOtL0=)
---
Team, This week, Politico called our race _**"one of the most highly watched House races"**_ in the nation — and it's only getting more competitive. National Republicans just recruited a** _third_** candidate to run in our district. If you want to know why they're scrambling, you just have to look at two candidates who were already in the race:
* One of our opponents misrepresented his military service, participated in the January 6th riot, and spread Q-Anon conspiracy theories.

name: Katie Porter
subject: the job of a blue state Senator is to hone a winning message that will help us build a durable majority all across the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I flipped a Republican-held seat blue in 2018, and I haven’t held this seat by running to the center or switching my position based on whatever I think will help me get elected next
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=36021%2E3422442%2E42NRRy)
**I’m running for the U.S. Senate not**** _just_****to be a policy leader and to fight for Californians, but to be an effective political leader for our party.[Can you chip in today to power our movement?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240106-1?refcode=EMAP24_1_BSS_20240106_V1_F&refcode2=36021_3422442_42NRRy&akid=36021%2E3422442%2E42NRRy)**
Derek, when I ask what the role of a blue state Senator is, I usually get crickets.
But I believe the job of a blue state Senator is to hone a winning message that will help us build a durable majority all across the country.
I flipped a Republican-held seat blue in 2018, and I haven’t held this seat by running to the center or switching my position based on whatever I think will help me get elected next. **I’m a proud progressive who has won because voters know that while we may not agree on every issue, I’m fighting for them, not a handful of corporate donors.**
We need new political leadership. Leadership that understands how to win in purple areas. Leadership that isn’t beholden to decades of corporate PAC cash.
**Grassroots supporters make this new type of leadership possible.[Can you chip in $5 today to help me win this competitive primary and help Democrats win for decades to come?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240106-1?refcode=EMAP24_1_BSS_20240106_V1_F&refcode2=36021_3422442_42NRRy&akid=36021%2E3422442%2E42NRRy)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240106-1?refcode=EMAP24_1_BSS_20240106_V1_F&refcode2=36021_3422442_42NRRy&akid=36021%2E3422442%2E42NRRy)
Onward,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAP24_1_BSS_20240106_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=36021_3422442_42NRRy&akid=36021%2E3422442%2E42NRRy)**

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Jan. 6
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Today, I want to ask you to do something important, a small act that will make a big difference in defending our democracy.

Friends -
Three years ago today — January 6th, 2021 — we watched an insurrectionist mob ransack the Capitol, violently clash with sworn officers upholding the rule of law, and attempt to overturn an election.
That day was decades in the makings, fomented by people who have a very different vision of America’s future.
But as history reminds us, each of us will be judged... and ultimately judge ourselves, to the extent we contribute, as Bobby Kennedy said, to the life of our cities, our state, our nation, and the world we are trying to build.
Today, I want to ask you to do something important, a small act that will make a big difference in defending our democracy from future attacks.
[**Please use this link to contribute $3 to Tammy Baldwin's re-election campaign to the United States Senate in Wisconsin. It will all add up when lots and lots of people chip-in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-baldwin?refcode=em240106-1-subs&refcode2=1759_4767699_W2YSiv&akid=1759%2E4767699%2EW2YSiv)
There may be no more important race and state in the 2024 election. So I am asking:
$3 for Tammy Baldwin because we do not hold the Senate and the White House unless we win in Wisconsin.
$3 because Republicans are going to spend obscene amounts of money to win this race and flip the state.
$3 because Tammy Baldwin's campaign is funded primarily from lots and lots of people making small donations.
I know it seems like $3 won't make a huge difference in an expensive race, but by the time you read this lots and lots of people have chipped-in their $3.
Now they're hoping you'll do the same. For Tammy. For our democracy.
[**Can I count on you to contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today, directly to Tammy Baldwin's campaign for Senate in Wisconsin? It's a small act that will make a HUGE difference in her race.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-baldwin?refcode=em240106-1-subs&refcode2=1759_4767699_W2YSiv&akid=1759%2E4767699%2EW2YSiv)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Eigel?=
subject: The Passing of Grassroots Legend, Brenda Webb
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eigel for Missouri, Thomas Hughes, Treasurer_
body:
We lost a beloved member of Team Eigel yesterday. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billeigel/cpac-ranks-eigel-1-conservative-in-mo-senate-12672187?e=c00a6982d2)
---
| |
---
| **The Passing of Grassroots Legend, Brenda Webb**
* * *
We lost an integral part of Team Eigel unexpectedly Friday morning. If you've been around Team Eigel very long, you got to meet our incredible Statewide Grassroots Coordinator, Brenda Webb. She has been on Team Eigel since the very beginning and had recently become Senator Eigel's legislative assistant.

He shared the following on social media yesterday:

"It is with deep sadness that I share news of the passing of our Legislative Assistant, Brenda Webb, this morning at her home in St Charles, Missouri.

Brenda began working in our official office in October, and this was her first session as a full member of the staff. I’m devastated that the Missouri Senate didn’t get the chance to get to know her as well as I have over the past decade. I’m heartbroken for her two sons, Cory and Scott Webb, both of whom I know are feeling the loss more acutely than anyone else.

I have known Brenda for nearly a decade. She was one of the first grassroots activists I met when I began my own political activism in 2014. Since then, we became great friends who shared a love for our Lord, Jesus Christ, the cause of liberty, and a calling to protect the country we have been blessed to live in.

But Brenda was far more than even the great addition she made to our Jefferson City office. She was a mother, grandmother, mentor, troublemaker, coordinator, coach, planner, friend, cookie-baker, caretaker, nurturer, smiling face, and optimist that every office and/or social group hopes to have. I speak for my whole team when I say that we will miss her endless enthusiasm for liberty.

Despite the grief, I want to say how happy I am for Brenda—tonight she is in the arms of our Savior, looking down on the rest of us smiling and waiting for the day we will see her again. This difficult day in Missouri is contrasting greatly with the party Brenda is enjoying upstairs.

Please join Amanda and I as we keep the Webb family in our prayers and celebrate Brenda’s life and accomplishments."

We don't yet have details on when there will be a gathering to celebrate Brenda's life, but we will make sure to let keep everyone updated. If you have photos of Brenda that you would like to share, please reply to this email.

**May we honor Brenda's commitment to liberty by carrying on her legacy. May we be happy warriors, unrelenting, full of hope in Christ, undaunted by the struggles of this life. **
---
| | | | | | | [](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=0aa1d3f3c2&e=c00a6982d2)
---
| | [](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=6cf24216d4&e=c00a6982d2)

Cottleville, MO 63338

subject: I’m running for Congress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
3 years ago today, I was defending the Capitol, the Constitution, the Members of Congress |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76611822/447936950/-664199346?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjhjOGFmZi1iMmFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nhsa05cFAZvSdk9Jo9CLLoVr3bOB5bppkf87-P9_4bo=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76611824/447936952/1441636268?refcode=em-1.06.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjhjOGFmZi1iMmFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nhsa05cFAZvSdk9Jo9CLLoVr3bOB5bppkf87-P9_4bo=) Hey there – Harry Dunn here.

3 years ago today, I was defending the Capitol, the Constitution, the Members of Congress who you and I both may not agree with, and my own life from MAGA insurrectionists. **[Now, I’m announcing my campaign to serve as the next Congressman in Maryland’s 3rd District.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76611826/447936954/1441636268?refcode=em-1.06.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjhjOGFmZi1iMmFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nhsa05cFAZvSdk9Jo9CLLoVr3bOB5bppkf87-P9_4bo=)**

On January 6, 2021, we were inches from watching democracy crumble right before our eyes.

It’s not an exaggeration to say that democracy is on the brink of extinction. We’re one administration from it. And if we lose it, we’ll never get it back.

body:
Donald Trump fomented an insurrection carried out by a mob of MAGA extremists who tried to overturn the will of the people.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76611883/447937092/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjgxZWQwYi1iM2FjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZfzaThaKZx-UOJL2YMijWmQLq3WNhMACg0hnJoctG9Y=&emci=7aa8d805-b3ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=2b81ed0b-b3ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=7731215)

| | Three years ago, on January 6, 2021, Donald Trump fomented an insurrection carried out by a mob of MAGA extremists who tried to overturn the will of the people. As we begin 2024, just 10 months away from an election with enormous consequences for the future of our country, **t****he assault on our democracy is still happening now.** MAGA extremists are already preparing for November by regurgitating the Big Lie, attacking elections officials, and filing spurious lawsuits to jam up our election system. Meanwhile, election-deniers in public office are abusing the public trust by restricting access to the ballot box and blocking attempts to hold insurrectionists accountable for their sedition. Donald Trump will likely be the Republican nominee for President, and **we have to fight harder than ever against MAGA extremism or 2025 will be the year Trump tries to finish what he started.** Our democracy survived three years ago because people like you stood up to protect it and have been safeguarding it ever since. This year, we need to do more to ensure it can repel every attack Trump and MAGA extremists hurl at it. That's why we have to elect Democrats to win back the House, hold onto the Senate and White House, and win decisively against MAGA extremism. We have a fight ahead of us, and I know that by working together, we can continue to reject hatred and extremism and build a democracy that represents the will of the people. clean_body: Donald Trump fomented an insurrection carried out by a mob of MAGA extremists who tried to overturn the will of the people. | | | | Three years ago, on January 6, 2021, Donald Trump fomented an insurrection carried out by a mob of MAGA extremists who tried to overturn the will of the people. As we begin 2024, just 10 months away from an election with enormous consequences for the future of our country, the assault on our democracy is still happening now. MAGA extremists are already preparing for November by regurgitating the Big Lie, attacking elections officials, and filing spurious lawsuits to jam up our election system. Meanwhile, election-deniers in public office are abusing the public trust by restricting access to the ballot box and blocking attempts to hold insurrectionists accountable for their sedition. Donald Trump will likely be the Republican nominee for President, and we have to fight harder than ever against MAGA extremism or 2025 will be the year Trump tries to finish what he started. Our democracy survived three years ago because people like you stood up to protect it and have been safeguarding it ever since. This year, we need to do more to ensure it can repel every attack Trump and MAGA extremists hurl at it. That's why we have to elect Democrats to win back the House, hold onto the Senate and White House, and win decisively against MAGA extremism. We have a fight ahead of us, and I know that by working together, we can continue to reject hatred and extremism and build a democracy that represents the will of the people. Onward! Jeff | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Ban Insurrectionists via Our Revolution
subject: Insurrectionists don't belong on the ballot — that includes Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, exactly
three years ago today Donald Trump and other far-right Republicans helped
incite an insurrection in the U.S. Capitol.

We must be ABSOLUTELY clear: Donald Trump can never return to White House.
With two states already taking the extraordinary step to kick Trump off
the presidential ballot in 2024, we must all come together immediately and
ensure more states ban insurrectionists from running for office.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13168?source=email-20240106&t=1014&akid=5151%2E5885482%2EJHOR4v ]ADD YOUR NAME: Kick Trump off the 2024 presidential election ballot!
Three years after the January 6 attack on democracy, we must ensure Trump
is barred from the ballot under Section 3 of the 14th Amendment to the
U.S. Constitution.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13168?source=email-20240106&t=1015&akid=5151%2E5885482%2EJHOR4v ]ADD YOUR NAME

In the U.S. Constitution, Section 3 of the 14th Amendment says officials
who’ve taken the oath of office and engaged in insurrection are barred
from holding office. When Trump tried to overturn the 2020 election
results and destroy our democracy, he broke his oath of office. Plain and
simple, he can’t be allowed to appear on the ballot as an insurrectionist.

BUT, there’s a lot of work left to do to ensure that states across the
country uphold the Constitution and kick Trump off the 2024 ballot. We
need as much action as possible before the start of the Republican
presidential primaries on January 15.

And the more states that bar Trump from the ballot NOW, the harder it will
be for the right-wing Supreme Court to save him.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13168?source=email-20240106&t=1016&akid=5151%2E5885482%2EJHOR4v ]This January 6, add your name to our call to STOP TRUMP from appearing
on the 2024 presidential election ballot. States must follow the
Constitution and bar insurrectionists from the ballot!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-20240106.oOppV_&t=1008&akid=5151%2E5885482%2EJHOR4v ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a

P.S. Read more about my election denying opponent in my message below and forward this email to your friends, family, and colleagues to share with them the importance of this race.

Begin Forwarded Email:

**My Republican opponent has rallied with and been endorsed by extremist election deniers.**
The job of the Attorney General is to defend the rule of law, but my opponent is working with the very people who want to *undermine* our democracy.

body:
[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/9?t=1001&akid=35140%2E120265%2EM7lLUw ]Qasim for Congress

Friend,

On this day 3 years ago we watched a mob of angry, MAGA-clad, far-right
extremists literally storm the Capitol building, vandalize the halls of
Congress, and threaten democracy as we know it.

Since then, we’ve seen the deterioration of common-sense legislating – the
very extremism and rhetoric that led us to January 6th is now propped up
on cable news and social media.

It’s no secret that January 6th was a turning point. That’s what makes it
so disheartening when Democrats, like our opponent Rep. Bill Foster,
indulge the very people who made the insurrection happen.

You heard that right: Rep. Bill Foster gladly takes campaign contributions
and support from corporations that support the insurrectionists in
Congress, and he doesn’t seem to care that accepting that support is
undermining the very democratic principles he claims to uphold.

I lead with morals, values and conviction – that’s why we find it so
shameful that our supposed representative cares more about funding his own
campaign than standing up for democracy. [ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5059?t=1002&akid=35140%2E120265%2EM7lLUw ]On the 3rd anniversary of the
insurrection, make a contribution right now to someone who has never
wavered in the face of defending our values →

If Bill Foster takes support from the folks who support insurrectionists,
then he isn’t fit to be a representative of our democracy.

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5059?t=1009&akid=35140%2E120265%2EM7lLUw ]Make a contribution right now to get him out of office, once and for
all.

Thanks for all you do,

Qasim

| Peter,

The Januaury 6th insurrection was, by all accounts, one of the darkest moments in our nation's history. **But just this week Donald Trump said that the insurrectionists were "hostages" and the insurrection was part of a plan by Antifa and the FBI. **This is INSANE and DANGEROUS.

[_**I’m running for Congress because our nation needs to stand up and protect the basic tenets of democracy. We can only do this if we work together and this next election is, truly, a fight for the soul of this nation. **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76613530/447940422/215821870?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230425-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmRjZmI3MDUtYjVhYy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZQi8ad4QvZOwGbx9qCGBmmJDq8KLH39xOy_UdTYFWEE=)

name: Wes Moore
subject: On the anniversary of the attack on our Capitol
body:
Friend,

On the anniversary of the attack of MAGA extremists on our nation’s Capitol, we have to remember that these radical right-wing attempts to undermine our democracy continue to this day.

Donald Trump still falsely claims the 2020 election was “stolen” from him and does not take accountability for his actions that led to January 6. He brags about an attack on our nation’s democracy. And now, he’s running again for President to continue his career built on fraud and lies.

During his four years in office, Donald Trump failed us, repeatedly. His series of failures has set our country back significantly. He put his own interests over the country’s, and his own petty grievances over people’s freedoms. And while Trump is fighting for his own power, he’ll work to take away our freedoms — abortion rights, health care, the freedom to vote. He is going to spend the next ten months looking at us in our eyes to elect him again to do nothing for us.

I’ll work every day to make sure he doesn’t get that chance again.

Here in the state of Maryland, we've created momentum for more opportunities. We have the lowest unemployment rate in the entire country, and we are beginning to systematically address the racial wealth gap through our partnership with the Biden administration.

I am proud to support President Biden, who has fought for our rights every step of the way. While Trump continues to spew lies, President Biden is rolling up his sleeves to fight for the American people. While he faces a critical election this year, I hope you’ll join in supporting our work to protect democracy, and help ensure free and fair elections that reflect our democratic values, for our future and for our childrens’ futures.
Today, please support President Biden and myself with a split contribution right now. Any support today will ensure we fight to protect the future of our democracy. Please make a split contribution today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20240106-1?refcode=em20240106]

Contribute » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20240106-1?refcode=em20240106]

Thank you for fighting to protect our democracy.

Elevate,
Wes

P.S. Check out this clip [https://x.com/iamwesmoore/status/1743013371127947592?s=20] where I talked on Morning Joe to support President Biden and denounce Trump’s lies to our country.
https://x.com/iamwesmoore/status/1743013371127947592?s=20 [https://x.com/iamwesmoore/status/1743013371127947592?s=20]

---

name: Free Thinker Daily
subject: Never eat almonds, spinach and peanut butter (Here's why)
body:
[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kLtuwjAUhp_meCOyj-04HTxQqOlCpQ5Qic3xhbh1IMqFKm9fkdKu5_L9n37bdjnFWYN6BsQm-QEQga8BcRr50R4O-35etfvTaiePeL4vcQOI49yF_8sHpAitTfk-VVvitUDLoiNBM0WFLKmUFWl07a3lwlW-rKOoWMWclVbxgDQg50KSpJGioIyWTFHkvHiy1GGsWfTRUsUZCLoEFbEPYWzS5Sv03qY8F-7akqybceyGRcwAmquvi8vkcpiG3y93bQHNQxnQ3ADN9vMjhM369vYC3Cwl8G3e51fcnd5Jr333nXJOQ6lA0PMf5ScAAP__hG1fUA)

If you've been led to believe that peanut butter, almonds and spinach are good for you, today's email might shock you and is important to read, because these 3 healthy foods could be contributing to health problems in your body.

Let's take a quick look at why...

**1\. Peanut butter**

While peanut butter does contain a small amount of protein and vitamins/minerals, the cons outweigh the pros on this food.

First of all, peanuts contain one of the highest concentrations of aflatoxin, which is a mold toxin that is created in peanuts due to storage in moist conditions.

Peanut butter is also very high in inflammatory omega-6 fats and due to the processing of peanut butter, those omega 6 fats are in a harmful oxidized state.

Most people already get too much omega 6 fats from vegetable oils (soy, corn, canola, etc), and this contributes to insulin resistance, heart disease, brain inflammation, cancer, and lots more health problems, since most people are currently eating 5-10x more omega-6 fats than we should be eating in a healthy diet.

Lastly, peanut butter also contains medium amounts of oxalates, which are plant-based antinutrients that when consumed in excess can contribute to kidney stones, thyroid and gut problems, joint problems and more.

We'll talk more about oxalates in the next food...

**2\. Spinach**

Spinach is promoted as a healthy green, but contains FAR more downsides than good sides. Spinach is one of the highest oxalate foods that's commonly eaten by modern humans (in addition to beet greens, beets, almonds, and other veggies and nuts).

The amount of oxalates in a serving of spinach is extremely high, up to 600 mg in a normal sized bowl.

The "safe" amount of oxalates in a daily diet according to world renowned oxalate expert Sally Norton should be between 100-200 mg per day total to avoid a lot of the health problems caused by high oxalate plants.

So, you can see how concerning spinach is with the extremely high oxalate levels.

As mentioned above, eating too much oxalates too frequently can cause serious issues such as kidney stones, thyroid problems, gut damage, skin issues, and joint pain.

In fact, some people have even gotten "oxalate poisoning" by eating green smoothies too often and had to go to the ER for kidney failure.

**3\. Almonds**

Although almonds and almond milk are marketed as healthy, they also contain many downsides, including all of the negatives mentioned above about too much omega 6 fats and too much oxalates.

They're probably ok in your diet occasionally, but I personally avoid eating almonds too often because of these issues with excess oxalates and omega 6 fats.

Now let's take a look at a fun little quiz below and a few more foods...

**Bananas vs oranges vs apples... (the #1 WORST fruit for your gut & energy)**
According to the best-selling author and world-renowned heart surgeon, Dr. Steven Gundry, there's one fruit people over 40 should never eat.

This fruit can **damage your gut and disrupt your hormones**. Both sapping you of energy and **forcing your body to create "sticky" fat cells that can NOT be "burned off" with normal diet and exercise. **

Do you know the fruit I'm talking about? Make sure you do by clicking the one below you think it is, and get the answer from Dr. Gundry himself on the next page:

[>> Bananas

>> Oranges

>> Apples

>> Grapes

](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jjFvgzAQRn-N2YLOZxuTwUPTiCyNVLVNKmU7jB2smASBI8S_r6BV1_ue3j3q-hj8bJjeMcQ2NCNDZOKFIT6TONPpdBzmTXe8bA7qjNdlxFeGmObe_ZN_ktx1FOJy1fusMRKJe5s5wzVIVYBSZdYarjVHj8rJgpQoa7nl1urCFaWDknvIgkFACRwKrgGFyLcEFn3NfeMJtOBMwvoo94NzqQ33mxsaCnHO7aPLomlT6sc1rGJYTdOUB0tpuC0zw-p9d_j4YlgJ_L58vqmFEtX4rDkTe3f9dTa9o_sz1eFR052WFpTZYJp-CjGGsdBMwnVtsI_uJwAA__-bDGBo)[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jjFvgzAQRn-N2YLOZxuTwUPTiCyNVLVNKmU7jB2smASBI8S_r6BV1_ue3j3q-hj8bJjeMcQ2NCNDZOKFIT6TONPpdBzmTXe8bA7qjNdlxFeGmObe_ZN_ktx1FOJy1fusMRKJe5s5wzVIVYBSZdYarjVHj8rJgpQoa7nl1urCFaWDknvIgkFACRwKrgGFyLcEFn3NfeMJtOBMwvoo94NzqQ33mxsaCnHO7aPLomlT6sc1rGJYTdOUB0tpuC0zw-p9d_j4YlgJ_L58vqmFEtX4rDkTe3f9dTa9o_sz1eFR052WFpTZYJp-CjGGsdBMwnVtsI_uJwAA__-bDGBo)

In fact, some people have even gotten "oxalate poisoning" by eating green smoothies too often and had to go to the ER for kidney failure. 3\. Almonds Although almonds and almond milk are marketed as healthy, they also contain many downsides, including all of the negatives mentioned above about too much omega 6 fats and too much oxalates. They're probably ok in your diet occasionally, but I personally avoid eating almonds too often because of these issues with excess oxalates and omega 6 fats. Now let's take a look at a fun little quiz below and a few more foods... Bananas vs oranges vs apples... (the #1 WORST fruit for your gut & energy) According to the best-selling author and world-renowned heart surgeon, Dr. Steven Gundry, there's one fruit people over 40 should never eat. This fruit can damage your gut and disrupt your hormones. Both sapping you of energy and forcing your body to create "sticky" fat cells that can NOT be "burned off" with normal diet and exercise. Do you know the fruit I'm talking about? Make sure you do by clicking the one below you think it is, and get the answer from Dr. Gundry himself on the next page:

name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: On the Anniversary of January 6th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Lee Jones, treasurer
body:
https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/ [https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/]
Hi Peter,
Today marks the three year anniversary of the Jannuary 6th insurrection, and we’re still fighting the good fight for Democracy in the state of Tennessee.
This past year, we saw unprecedented attacks on our fundamental rights and freedoms.
*
After
the
Covenant
shooting,
Republicans
passed
a
law
further
shielding
gun
manufacturers
from
lawsuits.
*
Hundreds
of
books
were
banned
in
schools.
*
Grieving
mothers
holding
paper
signs
were
dragged
out
of
committee
hearings.
But in these dark times, I’m drawn to the powerful light of the good work that so many are doing every day in Tennessee and it fills me with hope for the future.
*
Thousands
of
people
(many
for
the
first
time)
came
to
the
Capitol
to
demand
safer
gun
laws
in
our
state.
*
Nashville
continues
to
be
a
beacon
of
hope
in
the
fight
against
state
overreach.
We’ve
won
lawsuits
that
maintain
local
control
of
our
city
council
and
airport
authority.
*
A
Rutherford
County
judge
who
illegally
jailed
children
was
exposed
and
subsequently
pressured
to
retire
due
to
a
resolution
that
Representative
Gloria
Johnson
and
I
filed.
*
We
saved
the
most
biodiverse
river
in
the
country-
the
Duck
River-
from
being
polluted
by
a
toxic
waste
site.
*
I
worked
across
the
aisle
with
my
colleagues
to
prevent
the
clear-cutting
of
two
thousand
acres
of
hardwood
forest
in
White
County.
With the 2024 legislative session starting in just a few days, I’m more committed than ever to defending our freedom and to working to make life better for Tennessee families. Please consider making a donation to my campaign so we can continue bringing meaningful change to o ur state, inside and outside the legislature. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbellforsenate]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbellforsenate]
Warmly,
Heidi

name: Adam Schiff
subject: A day I won’t forget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
This is what a true grassroots movement looks like — fighting for truth, justice, and our democracy.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T32e64df3-3212-4b92-ab54-e0ffec8ee0d8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter — Few days in our country’s history have made as big of an impact on me, and on our democracy as January 6, 2021. I remember the January 6th attack on the Capitol like it was yesterday. The sounds of yelling. Of insurrectionists storming the Capitol building and breaking doors and windows to get in. Of the whispers between members of Congress deciding how to protect ourselves. The sight of Capitol police officers running toward danger. Of my colleagues crouched on the floor, clutching masks to protect themselves from tear gas. Of thousands of protestors assaulting Capitol Police and desecrating the hallowed halls of Congress. You could sense the fear and the urgency. And the anger over what this mob was doing to overturn a free and fair election. And then, finally, once the fighting was over and we had fulfilled our duty to certify the election, the recognition that our democracy had survived, but barely. **Peter, I will remember that day for a long time. But I will also remember what my GOP colleagues in Congress did.** After the rioting and the mayhem, a majority of Republican members still voted to overturn the election. Still. 147 members of Congress — many of whom are still in office today. _Insurrectionists, too. Albeit in suits and ties._ Since that day, we have seen nothing but continued threats to our Constitution and our democracy — by way of election deniers running for office, and members of Congress continuing to support Donald Trump, vowing to pardon him and try to erase history. Our democracy was battered and bruised on January 6, 2021, and it has not yet recovered. **The number of Republicans who believe the election was stolen has been increasing since January 6, and that has only emboldened Trump and his MAGA followers even more.** It’s going to take hard work by everyone to move this country forward and finally relegate Trump to the dustbin of history. But we will. We must be a country that can have political disagreements without resorting to violence and insurrection. [**If you agree that we must take action now to preserve and protect our democracy for future generations, then I am respectfully asking you to add a split contribution of $20 between Blue Amp Action and my U.S. Senate campaign today to help me continue this important work.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tda8c8474-3d1f-4663-a1e1-8081b603ab01/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T766e3523-0386-41b4-8485-0625a7de6289/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | We will get through this difficult time in our history. America is a deeply resilient country filled with patriotic citizens who love our democracy, and those who do, vastly outnumber those trying to tear it down. Please take care of yourselves, and thank you for all your support during this pivotal time in our history. — Adam
---
|
---
| | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1bdd33a4-d48d-4cf6-a4a6-d6d8bd2b4290/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
