| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/baa_em_fr_op_schiff24010614?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T025110d6-3ebd-41ea-b523-32901132beec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Callie Barr
subject: January 6, 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76614681/447943751/535718049?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20240106_na_insurrection_cand_kw_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmU4YjY1MTQtYjZhYy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cvt42y_lGqwB3N_z-Ld4lWA5GNiFqajzSqLp0jqgP9E=)
---
Dear Peter, Three years ago today, a violent mob stormed the U.S. Capitol to overturn the results of a democratic election. Thinking back to that cold January day in 2021, I'm reminded that our country cannot move forward unless we do it _together._ **Democracy isn't easy.** It requires people with opposing views to overcome their differences and craft a consensus that represents a diverse body of people. Through the Democratic process, we remember that **we are Americans first.** We're neighbors, not enemies, and anyone who tries to convince us otherwise does not have our best interests at heart. So today, we remember and honor the police officers that were injured and died in protection of the process of our democracy. I'm thinking about their sacrifice, the sacrifice of their families, the folded flags that were handed to their families, the last moments with each other they wish they had back. I'm thinking about this country that they loved more than their own safety, more than their own lives – and how we can honor their sacrifice to protect our sacred democracy. Because of them, I know America has more to give. **We aren't done yet.** Not with our democracy, our care for one another, our ability to lead the world into a new tomorrow. As they laid down the torch - we pick it up. **And we do it together.** Tuebor, Callie Callie Barr
Candidate for Congress in Michigan's First District
---
| Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. She’s running to take on extremism and do-nothing politicians in D.C. that are leaving rural America behind. Can you help send Callie to Congress by donating today?

Three years ago today, our nation was attacked by its own people.

The attacks were incited by a narcissistic President seeking to upend democracy.

The worst part about the Jan. 6 insurrection was that some lawmakers refused to hold the rioters accountable, putting themselves above the good of the country.

Young Kim is that incompetent lawmaker and it’s time for her to GO. Can you rush $25 to Allyson’s campaign for Congress so we can DEFEAT Young Kim?

RUSH $25 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2024q1?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.01.06_B2_Jan6_FriendsandFamilyList&amount=25]

We can’t have this kind of selfish leadership in Congress.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Fewer Americans believe that Trump bears responsibility for the January 6 attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1887%2E4032634%2EZttULx)
---
Some anniversaries are painful. Three years ago today, a violent mob of domestic terrorists — incited by Donald Trump — attacked the Capitol and tried to overturn the results of a presidential election. An election that Trump had lost, fair and square. I’m thinking of the families who lost loved ones who defended the Capitol, and I’m thinking about all the work we must continue to do to save our democracy. The coup attempt failed that day, but the threat is still prominent today. Instead of doing the right thing for our country and distancing themselves from the man who incited the insurrection, Republicans have still propped up and enabled Trump, and he’s now the GOP frontrunner for president once again. This is despite the fact that he has been criminally indicted for his efforts to overturn the 2020 election. His allies are spreading conspiracy theories and hoping that Americans will grow tired and move on — like any other news cycle — as a way to minimize the severity of this attack. According to Washington Post polling, today fewer Americans believe that Trump bears “a great deal” or “a good amount” of responsibility for the insurrection than they did in 2021. But we won't forget what happened, and we won't ignore what we're still up against. The attempt to undermine democracy didn’t begin, or end, on January 6, 2021. The attack on the Capitol was a piece of an ongoing scheme to defy the will of the American people — one that is still unfolding, and one that we must keep confronting. Let’s not forget: Mike Johnson — Kevin McCarthy’s replacement as Speaker of the House — was a firm supporter of the Big Lie. If Republicans maintain their majority in the House this year, the certification of presidential election results will be handled by a far-right, anti-democracy extremist. This is who the Republican party is now. We have a country where one of the two major parties clearly believes that the way they will get power, and hold on to power, is by keeping American citizens from voting through various voter suppression tactics. Or if they do vote, to gerrymander them to suppress their voices. And if voters do elect enough representatives to represent their values in our government, any progress on those values is blocked by the filibuster. Republicans are now quite open about how this is the way they can hold on to power. So, in 2024, we’ve got to hold the line against Donald Trump and his election-denying enablers. I’ll keep working to make sure the American people can cast their ballots and have those ballots counted — even if that means ending the filibuster to pass voting rights legislation. And I’m honored to work alongside you to protect and strengthen our democracy. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: My first three Wednesdays in Congress were an insurrection, an impeachment, and an inauguration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Sara Jacobs - Democrat, U.S. Congress [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89313/images/SDS/SJJ-emailheader1.png]
Friends,
On Sunday, January 3rd, 2021, I took my oath of office and officially became a Member of Congress.
Three days later, on Wednesday, January 6th, I hid under my seat in the House Gallery, wearing a gas mask and waiting for a chance to run to safety, hoping that insurrectionists wouldn’t break down the doors.
I came of age in the era of mass shootings. Like other millennials and kids today, I’m used to active shooter drills. And when I served at the State Department and the UN and traveled around the world for work, I was used to close calls and threats of violence. But January 6th – in the middle of the United States Capitol – I thought I was going to die.
In the immediate aftermath of the attack, we saw people from both sides of the aisle come together to denounce the violence and destruction. But it wasn’t long before Donald Trump was rewriting history, and his followers went right along with him.
That’s why it’s so important that we continue to tell the truth about what happened.
January 6th was a deadly and terrifying attack on Congress – incited by Donald Trump in an attempt to disrupt the peaceful transfer of power – and an assault on the pillars of our democracy.
On this anniversary I recommit to my role, as a Congresswoman, to protect and preserve our democracy.
I’m also more determined than ever before to ensure that Trump, and anyone else who attempts to spin the awful events of January 6th into their own un-American narrative, never gets re-elected.
The insurrection was my first Wednesday in Congress. On my second Wednesday, we voted to impeach President Trump. And on my third, we celebrated the inauguration of President Biden.
Now, three years later, after so many incredible accomplishments from the Biden-Harris Administration, we’re heading into an election year that represents an existential fight for our country. I'm proud to show up for that fight every day, and I’m so glad you’re here to fight with me.
Thanks for reading. Onward!
-Sara
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89313/images/SDS/SJJ-DigitalHeadshot-USE.png]

California’s 51st District

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Trump’s threat to our democracy is rampant.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Three years ago today, far-right extremists fueled by Trump attacked our nation's capitol and our democracy.
On the third anniversary of that horrendous attack that left three dead and hundreds injured, I wanted to share a few thoughts on the importance of protecting our democracy.
Let me be very clear: The question of protecting our democracy is not exclusively a Republican or Democratic issue. It is a question of respecting the fundamental values that our country was founded on — values that make our country great.
What the insurrectionists did three years ago was fueled by Trump's lies, conspiracies, and inability to accept defeat. As we enter the presidential election year — the first presidential election since the insurrection — it’s clear that Trump continues to pose a danger to our democracy as the front-runner for the Republican nomination.
Three years after the insurrection, loyalty to Trump is climbing. Fewer Republicans say Trump bears responsibility for the attack than ever before, and over a third of Americans have bought into his stolen election conspiracy theory.
Now, the Trump campaign has overtly embraced insurrectionists, praising their actions and promising them pardons.
This is dangerous. Trump’s threat to our democracy is rampant and apparent. Democracy will once again be on the ballot in 2024.
But we have the power to ensure Trump never sits in the Oval Office again and his puppets leave Congress — that power comes from electing pro-democracy candidates across the country who will respect our democratic process. But to do that, it is critical that our movement has your unwavering support.
[**If you are with us, please contribute $3 to our movement so we can continue supporting pro-democracy candidates nationwide.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jan24.Ibl7yb&refcode=em240106-1-t2&t=1&akid=5131%2E196590%2EhaL0ZU)
Today is an important day to show you are committed to protecting the future of our democracy. So thank you in advance for contributing to our movement to elect pro-democracy candidates.
Mandela Barnes
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jan24.Ibl7yb&refcode=em240106-1-t2&t=2&akid=5131%2E196590%2EhaL0ZU)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=5131%2E196590%2EhaL0ZU). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=5131%2E196590%2EhaL0ZU)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=5131_196590_haL0ZU&akid=5131%2E196590%2EhaL0ZU)

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Rick Scott chose Trump over our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
one of the darkest days in our history
| | |
---
Team, the Jan. 6 attack on the U.S. Capitol remains one of the darkest days in our country's history.
Let’s be clear: Donald Trump incited a deadly insurrection that shook the very foundations of our democracy. I can still remember the horror and fear I felt that day — and I'm sure that you can too. _But even this unprecedented, terrifying attack on our democracy wasn’t enough to convince Rick Scott to abandon Trump.__ _

**You see, Rick Scott is nothing more than Trump's MAGA puppet.**
He happily pushed Trump's dangerous agenda throughout his administration. And after Trump lost the 2020 election, Rick Scott supported his totally baseless claims of voter fraud that fueled this insurrection.___Even after Jan. 6, Rick Scott still refused to certify President Biden's victory.___**He chose Trump over our democracy — _and he'd do it again in a heartbeat._**
Rick Scott is a MAGA extremist through and through: He wants to raise taxes on working families while millionaires like himself get a tax cut. He wrote the plan to END Social Security and Medicare. He supports a nationwide ban on abortions – he even told _The Hill_ yesterday that people who support reproductive freedom are “radical,” despite _most_ Americans supporting it. He even built his massive fortune through shady business practices — just like Trump.
Scott was more than happy to ignore the 91 charges Trump is facing, forget about his deadly insurrection, and wholeheartedly endorse his reelection campaign. And now, Trump has fully thrown his support behind Scott, giving his campaign a major boost.
A man like Rick Scott has no place in the United States Senate. **And with polling data showing our race is tied, we have a real chance to defeat him.** But Scott spent $64 million to buy this seat the last time around, and he's ready to do it again. If we want to beat him, we have to hit _every single goal_ between now and Election Day.
**But I'm about to fall short of my critical $50,000 daily goal — and missing this goal could set us back for the whole quarter. Falling short this early on in 2024 would be handing Scott and Trump a HUGE advantage. With our Senate majority at stake, we cannot let that happen. Let’s be clear: Donald Trump incited a deadly insurrection that shook the very foundations of our democracy. I can still remember the horror and fear I felt that day — and I'm sure that you can too. But even this unprecedented, terrifying attack on our democracy wasn’t enough to convince Rick Scott to abandon Trump. You see, Rick Scott is nothing more than Trump's MAGA puppet. He happily pushed Trump's dangerous agenda throughout his administration. And after Trump lost the 2020 election, Rick Scott supported his totally baseless claims of voter fraud that fueled this insurrection.Even after Jan. 6, Rick Scott still refused to certify President Biden's victory.He chose Trump over our democracy — and he'd do it again in a heartbeat. Rick Scott is a MAGA extremist through and through: He wants to raise taxes on working families while millionaires like himself get a tax cut. He wrote the plan to END Social Security and Medicare. He supports a nationwide ban on abortions – he even told The Hill yesterday that people who support reproductive freedom are “radical,” despite most Americans supporting it. He even built his massive fortune through shady business practices — just like Trump. Scott was more than happy to ignore the 91 charges Trump is facing, forget about his deadly insurrection, and wholeheartedly endorse his reelection campaign. And now, Trump has fully thrown his support behind Scott, giving his campaign a major boost. A man like Rick Scott has no place in the United States Senate. And with polling data showing our race is tied, we have a real chance to defeat him. But Scott spent $64 million to buy this seat the last time around, and he's ready to do it again. If we want to beat him, we have to hit every single goal between now and Election Day. But I'm about to fall short of my critical $50,000 daily goal — and missing this goal could set us back for the whole quarter. Falling short this early on in 2024 would be handing Scott and Trump a HUGE advantage. With our Senate majority at stake, we cannot let that happen. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for all that you do, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Team Cori
subject: 3 years since the insurrection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
We need Cori’s leadership in Congress to combat white supremacy and right-wing extremism. | |
---
Peter, **** **** **** **** **Today marks 3 years since a white supremacist coup, instigated by Republican extremists, took place in our nation’s capital.** It was a stark reminder of the right wing extremism we still must overcome to defend our democracy. We need more leaders who are willing to stand up against this sort of violence. **Cori’s first ever legislative action as Congresswoman was introducing a resolution calling for the removal of the Members of Congress who had tried to invalidate the votes of millions of people, especially Black, brown, and Indigenous voters, and whose actions led to an attempted white supremacist coup that put thousands of lives in danger and left five people dead.** ****We need Cori’s leadership in Congress to combat white supremacy and right-wing extremism. clean_body: We need Cori’s leadership in Congress to combat white supremacy and right-wing extremism. | | Peter, ** Today marks 3 years since a white supremacist coup, instigated by Republican extremists, took place in our nation’s capital. It was a stark reminder of the right wing extremism we still must overcome to defend our democracy. We need more leaders who are willing to stand up against this sort of violence. Cori’s first ever legislative action as Congresswoman was introducing a resolution calling for the removal of the Members of Congress who had tried to invalidate the votes of millions of people, especially Black, brown, and Indigenous voters, and whose actions led to an attempted white supremacist coup that put thousands of lives in danger and left five people dead. We need Cori’s leadership in Congress to combat white supremacy and right-wing extremism. Cori leads with love and not violence, like the insurrectionists. Unfortunately three years after the insurrection, the same Members of Congress who were complicit in the assault on our country still walk the halls of Congress, introducing and promoting legislation supporting their fascist agendas. They have managed to dodge responsibility, ignore subpoenas, and avoid any and all accountability, but Cori refuses to allow racist, hateful attacks on our democracy and communities to go unchecked. The people of our country must be assured that no fringe group of white supremacists has the power to overthrow the government they fairly elected. They deserve to know that their political leaders unabashedly denounce white supremacy and oppose allowing those complicit in Congress. This is what Cori has been fighting for since that day, and it is what she will continue to fight for until we’ve removed white supremacists from all seats of power. Because Cori speaks truth to power, corporate and war-mongers super PACs, funded by GOP billionaires have put a target on her back. And they’re planning on spending millions against her. They may have the money, but we have the people. We have you. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | In this together, Team Cori ** Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress | | Sent via . name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Update: COVID is surging. How to protect yourself:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Keeping ourselves and our communities safe: | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvdCL2sB79pYirFRU0lLNCJ0kzt9_rlAUl0GcoT3WVSMK5u9JiYpyuADnjJaI29EF5xxjpI4FcrFfGc5BNg-nGBlp7CpaQkUmsnng-CQ2pgQwiLgI2dIqsw-XZzMiUpYXM2BmvnlMmjttp9p_yLA3pBZH3nxPMmwnuKRU-v5eC3n9i_NRL1_7DAS15Xmnyfy98kRm1iGr0tnG2O2sEySDp5A/42r/S2jo9WMtSjS6xQXsg4jhPw/h0/t2tOUhteAyOHaHDudiKE-A11Q7iG6-o1L9gEPPku8iw)
---
Friend, COVID cases are surging across the country right now, and there are multiple ways we can protect ourselves and our communities. Remember: COVID is an airborne virus, which is spread by people's breath. That’s why well-fitting masks provide important protection. People can be contagious without having symptoms, so testing regularly also helps prevent spread. **You can now order 4 or more COVID tests for free at**[**https://special.usps.com/testkits**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTPlIaTF4MbjAlJVPuv_zdNBv1D75BgSMBc41A2ybMxVPW4KlB-bNfgDaUXHJKjX-vV2mScsIj-YpLv5guPBe5h1b6IJxYbsJBro0dVok7d893-pSAtvPCTRqkMRy7e_CrnCuhzFph2qXdJvq6A7pPp6xfTUTQQJD9lFlv93t-p-xshIxzTr8mxeRNVGp05fwdfU8-Q6oQkY8F68RaxCriHv1iRcwb-Atvkw1dxA7y1LKLri-TzEoikzFJwjd0vX3T8MUUGGWFIXXaT3jg_9hmMSiaiBNn4L8wbm0odlzEXu_HqQFY1hHs0mY3LMfP2fIMQ/42r/S2jo9WMtSjS6xQXsg4jhPw/h1/6GVM4o0SjwATO0b-vrvKP-duUbNllgiu1B9sREqFExs)**.** **There are also updated COVID vaccines available:**
* Updated**Pfizer and Moderna vaccines** are now available for children and adults at healthcare providers and pharmacies like CVS and Walgreens.
* And you can find a **newer vaccine called Novovax** at Costco and CVS locations around the country.

**Call your local pharmacy to see which updated vaccines they have available.** If you need help, you can call 1-800-232-0233. Vaccines will likely be free for people with health insurance. If you do not have health insurance, or if your insurance provider doesn't fully cover vaccines, you can get free vaccines at locations participating in the Center for Disease Control’s (CDC) Bridge Access Program. Staying up-to-date with the latest vaccines helps to lower the chances of infection, as the virus continues to shift into new variants. If you get infected, being vaccinated can also reduce symptoms and protect you from some of the virus’s worst effects. However, vaccinated people can still spread COVID and develop disabling conditions known as long COVID. That's why it's important to use multiple methods to keep ourselves and our communities safe. Gathering outdoors is another way to reduce risk. When indoors, we can reduce the amount of time the virus stays in the air by filtering or ventilating indoor air (including by opening windows and using air purifiers). If you do test positive for COVID, you can reduce the risk of developing long COVID by resting as much as possible and checking with your healthcare provider about getting a prescription for Paxlovid. You may also be able to see a medical provider about COVID for free at [https://www.test2treat.org](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDKEIKHN8EmmUasKuwyz7ntBeBqncNoJYqZ8BcpvASy3smr0Z1i1ySNhLru61suEhAXTpAjRVIDp1x1tMKnQ2QCdJdQQpttuStpuDZtI-cB0705WqdnluD5bg9yxao7E_ZSLC0RYlnL2exlubu7RFFQdyhpnlLEkyAxD6LFTtnvukqAdNiayXGgmUCsSM6efE3W3D159jH8T41EO5Fl6Fv-AOlJwVSDgjDoLDI-a_8hNjfKGXa7AL2ENJaGEjRo2O91JIIb5Y891Kp5PTmpvSBCv2v9dOaxveautJzc4XlTSW/42r/S2jo9WMtSjS6xQXsg4jhPw/h2/VXffDRNDBCNERcdaYr4VwOSFnkBEFOr9qnMHUxNlhKs). I hope you and your loved ones can stay as safe and healthy as possible this winter. Community care is part of how we build a better and more just world. -Rashida [DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wXKobaCsGAH8p_GbEAOUhqdnmvXGr0JbFt6TVh4QwS7yUspJRtqNC-yCCF33rpfer7dXwYvYWETkP7RvUWWUn8CB1iWme43L_J5kAZXukIycr68bkNWk3jScrl49b0_mUHdp2oqDPWH8zIXf3xglIAdqZSFzbqOz07sPIrNOTk_G9Viguq6foGRB1IDkFzvjwcBFdyiqY3PXjkQfn2IMSGtgSliFvXRA-_izHUAzVpQtTPYBp3RjxHKkmPTImqOokiFK4w9xhJrrDWV6PZc8I6ARfemGH6s8xmL4e1urpegKOuXKOGh4f39-1EEuHJviT-i500SslvSmcq6vxaIs6J8YORm_uCBrRIbQVGplY2NIDrN08T-BQSjrarEUAAFOo/42r/S2jo9WMtSjS6xQXsg4jhPw/h3/qj3iS2_lsg7MWItHTVAJ_lc8PygQlZGk1kFS-o1yN60)

Where Congress fails to act, the state legislatures and direct democracy have picked up the pieces. | | Peter — Today marks the third anniversary of the attack on our Capitol, and that day, **our country faced one of the greatest attacks on democracy that we've ever seen**. Years after that insurrection, I can't say that much has changed. Our political system is still broken. People are still struggling, and **Congress is still failing to act and meet the urgent challenges that are hurting our communities.** We deserve better, and in Congress, I plan to take bold action. But, I can't get there without your help, Peter. body:
January 6th is our rallying call, and today is the flag drop. The campaign is on.
#
Derek: Here at VoteVets, we like to focus on action. We like getting things done. We don’t like wasting your time.
Today is the third anniversary of January 6th. While we cannot change the past, we can – and will – stop it from happening again.
We will never forget January 6th. We will never stop working to prevent attacks on our democracy. We swore an oath to defend our Constitution, and we aim to uphold that oath.
So for the next eleven months we will work, around the clock, to win.
We will defeat MAGA candidates from coast-to-coast. We will run up the score so far that every election denier shuts up for good. We will take back the U.S. House. We will hold the U.S. Senate. We will beat Trump like a drum. And all the way down the ballot, we’ll get the right people into office — from school boards to state houses.
January 6th is our rallying call, and today is the flag drop. The campaign is on — and we need you with us if we’re going to accomplish our objectives.

name: Susan Wild
subject: Three years ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
Now, it is up to us, the American people, to ensure the events of January 6th are not forgotten and never repeated.

---
| Peter,

Three years ago today, on January 6, 2021, a mob of right-wing domestic terrorists stormed the United States Capitol in a President Trump-orchestrated attempt to overturn the results of our free and fair election. I was stuck in the upper floor of the House Gallery that day. From that spot, I heard gunshots outside the House Chamber, and saw glass breaking in the doors at the rear of the chamber. I crouched below the balcony walls alongside Rep. Jason Crow (D-CO) as we hid from the rioters. I made what I thought might be my final call to my children, the most terrifying moment of my life as a mother.

On that day, both Democrats and Republicans were horrified. We had no idea what was happening outside the doors of the Chamber, relying on updates from social media and loved ones for information as we awkwardly put on our gas masks, eventually evacuated, and sought refuge in a nearby safe room. There, we were faced with some Republican members who refused to put on masks — even though we were at the peak of the COVID pandemic. Several of my Democratic colleagues tested positive for COVID shortly thereafter. It was just one more sign of the chaos and disrespect that had permeated the GOP in Washington.

**Frankly, seeing Republican lawmakers (some of the same Republicans I saw that day in fear for their lives) later deny the reality of what happened on January 6th — some referring to it as a “normal tourist visit” — only rubbed salt in the wound. Many of those same people are now part of the slim Republican majority in the House.**

The fear my colleagues and I felt that day, both for our personal safety and for the future of our democracy, left an indelible impact. I am tremendously grateful to the law enforcement officers who ensured our security. Now, it is up to us, the American people, to ensure the events of January 6th are not forgotten and never repeated.

At the same time that I want to see us move forward in a positive way, I hope and trust that you will stand with me, as you have always done, to ensure the story of that dark day is memorialized.

As we enter 2024, I wish for you, your family, and our country a year of peace and prosperity. May we come together as a country.

Sincerely,

Susan

clean_body: Now, it is up to us, the American people, to ensure the events of January 6th are not forgotten and never repeated. | Peter, Three years ago today, on January 6, 2021, a mob of right-wing domestic terrorists stormed the United States Capitol in a President Trump-orchestrated attempt to overturn the results of our free and fair election. I was stuck in the upper floor of the House Gallery that day. From that spot, I heard gunshots outside the House Chamber, and saw glass breaking in the doors at the rear of the chamber. I crouched below the balcony walls alongside Rep. Jason Crow (D-CO) as we hid from the rioters. I made what I thought might be my final call to my children, the most terrifying moment of my life as a mother. On that day, both Democrats and Republicans were horrified. We had no idea what was happening outside the doors of the Chamber, relying on updates from social media and loved ones for information as we awkwardly put on our gas masks, eventually evacuated, and sought refuge in a nearby safe room. There, we were faced with some Republican members who refused to put on masks — even though we were at the peak of the COVID pandemic. Several of my Democratic colleagues tested positive for COVID shortly thereafter. It was just one more sign of the chaos and disrespect that had permeated the GOP in Washington. Frankly, seeing Republican lawmakers (some of the same Republicans I saw that day in fear for their lives) later deny the reality of what happened on January 6th — some referring to it as a “normal tourist visit” — only rubbed salt in the wound. Many of those same people are now part of the slim Republican majority in the House. The fear my colleagues and I felt that day, both for our personal safety and for the future of our democracy, left an indelible impact. I am tremendously grateful to the law enforcement officers who ensured our security. Now, it is up to us, the American people, to ensure the events of January 6th are not forgotten and never repeated. At the same time that I want to see us move forward in a positive way, I hope and trust that you will stand with me, as you have always done, to ensure the story of that dark day is memorialized. As we enter 2024, I wish for you, your family, and our country a year of peace and prosperity. May we come together as a country. Sincerely, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States Susan Wild represents Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress. She believes we can grow overall economic prosperity while still caring for the vulnerable members of our community. And she knows, now more than ever, it's working-class families that deserve a break in this economy — not big city billionaires and wealthy corporations. But she needs your support today -- her campaign runs on grassroots donations since she's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. = | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, **. As I write this email to you, many extreme politicians are seeking to divide the American people, sow distrust in our elections, and destroy the very foundations of our democratic institutions.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76616413/447950455/1993432125?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-01-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjg2ZWRiNDUtYmRhYy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fJckLVm9Bbpnv-3OrSm-FG2th5uI2JgAFRmnxU0IbLk=)

| Peter,

Our democracy remains under attack. As I write this email to you, many extreme politicians are seeking to divide the American people, sow distrust in our elections, and destroy the very foundations of our democratic institutions.

Even three years after the violent and deadly insurrection of January 6, 2021, far too many leaders are risking the future of our republic for the sake of power and their own short-term political survival.

As a former federal law enforcement officer, former CIA case officer, and current Member of Congress, I have taken an oath multiple times to protect and defend the U.S. Constitution. I know what is at stake — and I know you do too.

With the 2024 election just around the corner and former President Trump running to once again become the Republican nominee, we cannot afford to be complacent when it comes to defending our values, our voting rights, and our democracy.

[_**As Governor, I promise to defend our democracy — but I can’t get there without your help. Will you join me today and contribute $5 or $10 to my campaign?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76616414/447950456/1993432125?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-01-06_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjg2ZWRiNDUtYmRhYy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fJckLVm9Bbpnv-3OrSm-FG2th5uI2JgAFRmnxU0IbLk=)

Domestic terror allies don’t belong on the bench.| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3422287c245e49b8873dfcd53e5bd167&_e=9VWfAKLH6KZVcgEBgh_AgbpGx9lGRb0bz6w9ZGvYUFGUF8tWLHttK5mbplLPUHYnIN-Ehn84w3T-Ncwe5b_rJWT0KiV29WZxQu3SGms3HwYjaeV7k3NQoU008_8N1VJz8UqzalmwaEmnP7x-B4qpzhRYDjZ95O_eKb_ugOFWNJ-cE-QuuWVrX14jlG56T-AdxViaN58PDYBMrEtLxkqhAcGwHnBpWNh7h5f-ooiYH95_JahjUGsw7kZpiab9GkHACg5PXltwAIBNZ6JJYWuy3I8kzH3PMkE9nxJ2em4UG4B2oLEu8EalsH-1arBasJDG_nQzjZLMhE0UgkvkrT7tOThEN1CxgB4Kwpec-g1oYB2gVyHVK6Q4qXGu_ndFIQYP)

Peter, The Left is hailing Biden’s latest judicial nominee as "historic," and they are right... for all the wrong reasons. Because what lies beneath the surface of Adeel Abdullah Mangi’s story as the first Muslim nominee to the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Third Circuit is deeply troubling... **You see, Mangi serves on the advisory board of an organization with extensive ties to radical activists and convicted cop killers.**
---
[DON’T LET HIM TAKE THE BENCH](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3422287c245e49b8873dfcd53e5bd167&_e=9VWfAKLH6KZVcgEBgh_AgbpGx9lGRb0bz6w9ZGvYUFGUF8tWLHttK5mbplLPUHYnIN-Ehn84w3T-Ncwe5b_rJWT0KiV29WZxQu3SGms3HwYjaeV7k3NQoU008_8N1VJz8UqzalmwaEmnP7x-B4qpzhRYDjZ95O_eKb_ugOFWNJ-cE-QuuWVrX14jlG56T-AdxViaN58PDYBMrEtLxkqhAcGwHnBpWNh7h5f-ooiYH965-mDDm5dQf2JGtNXTlu7siPFXLNU9kr1NASw-srkJ_fogWnkD9zF-rUBOOF71TNi2uTAQ2GOLucdiSjjXXByGZSokRswOPnrcP_GrwoXdwgTPLSc4TR1q4tIJpJjjAmRXMzKvHAah4Cc1rPgvbRWv)
---
Alliance of Families for Justice's founding director, Kathy Boudin, was a member of the domestic terror organization Weather Underground. She pleaded guilty to the murder of two police officers and a security guard during an armored truck robbery in 1981. While Mangi served on the board, the organization has also actively campaigned for the release of individuals convicted of murdering police officers—including Mumia Abu-Jamal. Here’s how the Washington Free Beacon described the event: _“The Alliance of Families for Justice, where Mangi has served since 2019, organized an event in 2021 to**urge the release of six Black Panther and Black Liberation Army members serving life in prison for murdering police officers.** The Alliance referred to the cop killers—including Black Panther members Mumia Abu-Jamal, H. Rap Brown, and others—as **‘freedom fighters’** and claimed they were illegally targeted by the FBI.”_
---

[**HELP FIGHT HIS NOMINATION**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3422287c245e49b8873dfcd53e5bd167&_e=9VWfAKLH6KZVcgEBgh_AgbpGx9lGRb0bz6w9ZGvYUFGUF8tWLHttK5mbplLPUHYnIN-Ehn84w3T-Ncwe5b_rJWT0KiV29WZxQu3SGms3HwYjaeV7k3NQoU008_8N1VJz8UqzalmwaEmnP7x-B4qpzhRYDjZ95O_eKb_ugOFWNJ-cE-QuuWVrX14jlG56T-AdxViaN58PDYBMrEtLxkqhAcGwHnBpWNh7h5f-ooiYH94pVJV5bGSiOrZPZt0c92lOaWO_0z-7P623QK4HU_E_TL4MniZUDaU9tZ1ufEUNefakdgZdxTAwLiJZfq9ZSAkoI3N59NXu1dyzPsZWxDC5qH-Wqwm5EQsY757PzYdDIpHUsvkbGW5JJ_2LF9g63WnM)
---
We must remain vigilant and ensure our judicial system is comprised of individuals who uphold the values and principles we hold dear. **_And supporting the murder of our first responders definitely does NOT fit that criteria._** **_[Fair Courts America](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3422287c245e49b8873dfcd53e5bd167&_e=9VWfAKLH6KZVcgEBgh_AgbpGx9lGRb0bz6w9ZGvYUFGUF8tWLHttK5mbplLPUHYnIN-Ehn84w3T-Ncwe5b_rJWT0KiV29WZxQu3SGms3HwYjaeV7k3NQoU008_8N1VJz8UqzalmwaEmnP7x-B4qpzhRYDjZ95O_eKb_ugOFWNJ-cE-QuuWVrX14jlG56T-AdxViaN58PDYBMrEtLxkqhAcGwHnBpWNh7h5f-ooiYH96a6MH72315cnH3X0L-QjedfyJHW3Xtob7_uP1yspYu_S2_RkXwastjrnX-xSGTpND9IEv41kPqNOl4d0AT9XyZzyK6YKmA2RcX55609Laz79SgMzCVArA358Rosah9ySn54Lt2J9GCpuyinj4seQFR)_** was founded to protect the freedom and fairness of our judicial system—**and that means keeping radicals like Adeel Abdullah Mangi away from our country's courts.** I’ll be blunt: If we lose the courts... we lose our country. body:
|
#
---
Friend, Today marks three years since right-wing insurrectionists stormed our Capitol in an attempt to stop the peaceful transfer of power. After months of President Trump undermining our democracy and spreading the lie that he won the 2020 election — a violent mob, incited by his hateful rhetoric, showed up at the Capitol to overturn the election by force. Over the last three years, many right-wing members of Congress have continued to delegitimize and attack our democracy by promoting Trump’s Big Lie and blocking legislation that would ensure equal protection at the ballot box for every American. That’s why I will give it my all to defend our democracy, but I can’t do it alone. As the election year begins, I need to know you're standing with me in this fight every step of the way. **[Will you sign on today to show the far-right that there is a strong grassroots movement standing with me in the fight to overcome GOP extremism and strengthen our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76616740/447951636/1106964172?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240106_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTQwM2Q4Ni1iZGFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ctO2GljpHEAy-J1LRgC-CRSfkLEzUYVbIwnRt6bwEZY=&emci=526d4f7f-bdac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=95403d86-bdac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=13891387)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76616742/447951639/1106964172?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240106_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTQwM2Q4Ni1iZGFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ctO2GljpHEAy-J1LRgC-CRSfkLEzUYVbIwnRt6bwEZY=&emci=526d4f7f-bdac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=95403d86-bdac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=13891387)

clean_body: | Friend, Today marks three years since right-wing insurrectionists stormed our Capitol in an attempt to stop the peaceful transfer of power. After months of President Trump undermining our democracy and spreading the lie that he won the 2020 election — a violent mob, incited by his hateful rhetoric, showed up at the Capitol to overturn the election by force. Over the last three years, many right-wing members of Congress have continued to delegitimize and attack our democracy by promoting Trump’s Big Lie and blocking legislation that would ensure equal protection at the ballot box for every American. That’s why I will give it my all to defend our democracy, but I can’t do it alone. As the election year begins, I need to know you're standing with me in this fight every step of the way. | With our democracy on the line, every bit of support matters. Thank you for standing with our team. — Nikki = Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States ** | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com | Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

3 years ago today, I was defending the Capitol, the Constitution, the Members of Congress who you and I both may not agree with, and my own life from MAGA insurrectionists. [_**Now, I’m announcing my campaign to serve as the next Congressman Maryland’s 3rd District.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76616985/447952353/-72447178?amount=10&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240106_1_4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0MWU2NmFiLWJkYWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GlEtEC04sKuI-PTdJnVU0d0sSxAcOwrCWWNoC_A3cEU=)

It’s not an exaggeration to say that democracy is on the brink of extinction. We’re one administration from it. And if we lose it, we’ll never get it back.
I refuse to stand by and watch. I’m prepared to fight to protect our rights, our fragile democracy – and to be honest, I’m prepared to win.
In Congress, I’ll be one of the loudest voices defending democracy – but I need your help to get there. It’s not an exaggeration to say that democracy is on the brink of extinction. We’re one administration from it. And if we lose it, we’ll never get it back. I refuse to stand by and watch. I’m prepared to fight to protect our rights, our fragile democracy – and to be honest, I’m prepared to win. In Congress, I’ll be one of the loudest voices defending democracy – but I need your help to get there. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Here’s the cold hard truth: All across our great nation, rights are being stripped-back one-by-one by Trump’s MAGA army who would rather oppress folks than treat them as human beings. name: Kamala Harris
subject: January 6, 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
| | |
---
Peter, certain dates echo throughout history. They remind all who have lived through them where they were and what they were doing when our democracy came under assault. Today, I am reflecting on where I was on this day in 2021, as I am sure you are too. I was not only Vice President-elect, I was also a United States senator. I was at the Capitol that morning. Hours later, _the gates of the Capitol were breached._ I immediately thought about not only my colleagues, but also my staff, who had been forced to seek refuge in our office, converting filing cabinets into barricades. The heroic law enforcement officers who answered the call that day and the American public watching on television from all corners of the nation. **On January 6, we all saw what our nation would look like if the forces who seek to dismantle our democracy are successful. The lawlessness, the violence, the chaos.** **_What was at stake then, and now, is the right to have our future decided the way the Constitution prescribes it: by we, the people -- all the people._** **The stakes of this election are high. The results could determine the survival of our very democracy**. [So, I have to ask: Will you make an investment today in this campaign so we can continue strengthening our democracy and protecting our personal freedoms for years to come?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZRof5tOr_McSDl340cJ372Kxf_4Tv9lJOAKPf8Y0XBoIGMa0ajQGj-jFCX4QE0Bcw5m3DXYpqcuNXEEQv_LJaE4PEBmOusSTZxX3ufwTyrWtahjGh0TsGSZMPhAeGHX79ynrQ8_fLqK1DkA8QqWNg6PdKpUbEmvl3kfaRnjW172PKTpBnH4VAD_Grn-rKh_cjoBHmi5LdMmUYjgu4lQBx0ZqC84Q4XZ4H2CfI3d-wZzKJiMmEDOxPuJfkgBcRMm9SYoEgvMJjycy00OpMVTG9YT2MjmApNlJi5OkzYbGvNMSA4j6CTbRn1shkrSmqTeUt9KJQ8oyFYSfQ1rWKzFyaq_TCx4cMChHWofQQLZTSWus/42r/3z6-g1raTA2ssdQdgO1eCQ/h0/A7lzoG63sRdjkMDMaPBVNLMpe5QK81v-OaJPDm-fa80) | | | [YES](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE2z9I3KlofRvG7PtPUh-EgHM0tp0t9BgvB8mV7uyYiKYKNogEJRCv1SL0COMZd12GykbbpNGKYOGgUUBtUq3Xxy0EUPkRus3yxwLU7KA-BNnZ1d_iV_-Qq5ov5UWTSEm3QL1GIioWU8Jv4yaq4p63Cn3j9OR7xjn7AsfrU7BM4nplWM2c2IdGpZqasgRSHBUoivug-Rsep2PmygjMI9OhsawRdcNfRTNuRn4lMCZEASPL34hyc2rsS6xnKBdaZ_j8OvYeXBSm32MUlKr0pr9iQn8Yr4CyVkbXEsCAQ0Tzq4pn3k2-zlUNB__6-HFZzn_nM5CcInj_GJWJ7ExL5wfCy4BGY5b42ktbD8tQODACmBz_YZkdx0WuZ5qR_86N0rnGlHWwgbi6NE-UJe34vjq9DzjV5pdRUDFgTavFnjzAUGF-gat7duKFUB0L72-pO0GQPK2U1JFBb3g-JBQM9cyfJe7g8CpTLSmHJx66YphdVkYg/42r/3z6-g1raTA2ssdQdgO1eCQ/h1/wtDJuNzQiyQ63mIIY0F4YvvwK71NIkTPbfX7YGd4vIw)

The extremists who roamed the halls of the Capitol were not only targeting the lives of elected leaders. They were assaulting the institutions, values, and ideals that generations of Americans have fought for. _That we cannot forget, Peter._
We cannot let our future be decided by those bent on silencing our voices, overturning our votes, and peddling lies and misinformation. This threat comes from a radical faction that may be newly resurgent but whose roots run old and deep.
**The work ahead will not be easy._But we cannot sit on the sidelines._** We must unite in defense of our democracy.
[If you’re ready to make a difference, please consider clicking here and making a donation of any amount today to help Joe and me win another four years in the White House.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZRof5tOr_McSDl340cJ372Kxf_4Tv9lJOAKPf8Y0XBoIGMa0ajQGj-jFCX4QE0Bcw5m3DXYpqcuNXEEQv_LJaE4PEBmOusSTZxX3ufwTyrWsxuBLeq6sgs5Fv8b7PweC5-m-FmMyCJyBH4OnsqGl22GXh4-FN8mzAA2GFzzaAfBBj03ceI6fgvKDJURfvZjorBqU5dZBkGvkxSb9ZNfSsQ-kAwp2BDmTDeoxfjXjJbPabD9NEW6K-z15xCVlJgnKMA9do4xzDpHCVfagKWuyv9L015AjT3tZmKJOD90AWC1PAUbfLSEvxngpdpQJ-opic39rrflvPu1vO93QXkZ_9xPmEPuon6lxH_NkwFcKdZrI/42r/3z6-g1raTA2ssdQdgO1eCQ/h2/r9UhBrYsoRkEzGqVMGqhwuivjcWo7_d-nZBmHOiUE_0)
Thank you for rising to this moment,
Kamala

If you’d like to only receive our most important emails, **[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk6gVFZ1bAZYY22mWHMkylxrCXInB9iTFNtbMmsdDMYnbCKr6iPHrkQcUiVDIm6qWUJhaZnCqQsfGbjGtvsRB2rnvS2Xy72OwtjZ6BG77nPV9aroV7367QW7F_tjbyTXLO7zMx-j7AmKYiv9elqMWNNCZRZ1bffr31HIadH_EPBgeyyvQkakpenQSjLQp_Ltuepjag6PGN-4xtoJ5pKjkOou15teR7J_Cbd3okRdorcYl0AFVqJgLLa1jl7OO2QMBc/42r/3z6-g1raTA2ssdQdgO1eCQ/h4/MUARWAn4nX0gF81hSJolpgQadf_1xgePWnPhdwYb33Q)** If you’d like to unsubscribe from all Biden for President emails, you can **[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWalZZNA-6Dgih5xl3OksS5iLi-uAnhayJjPQh6we-GTyc4BQhzb8JxCPOOhma092iYC6OECoTBsjTo7TDdAC_XerRJe6r9EnDlEWpqjFG1Ily9yanOpNIn9JEAsGR7gf9Aa__1quBhaI1trxkwdjgwI_iSOEyyPjNvYbrC0e2m_xljKZeHsq4eLUxmuP9bBWV53CeunyOqQzp-nlVJbkw-D3QIs8uLra5y8yi2rbcz-OLOcc0pQegkUmaPrSqeNc/42r/3z6-g1raTA2ssdQdgO1eCQ/h5/a79MpYL_uOXo3dhyzP98blJ703nZTBQhtAYYWm-wboQ)**

| | To: My loyal supporters From: President Donald J. Trump Re: 2023 -- a dark year for America
---
Dear Patriot,

---
With the door officially shut on 2023 and the first vote of the 2024 election set to be cast in just DAYS, I thought it was time I sent you a personal letter on my reflections of this past year - _one of the darkest years in American history_.
---
All I ever wanted was to make this country that we all hold so dear and love so much _GREAT AGAIN!_
---
But to the villainous forces in the Washington Swamp, to Crooked Joe and his accomplices, _that_ is the ultimate crime.
---
**In 2023, the Radical Democrats unlawfully ARRESTED the _leading_ 2024 presidential candidate (_yours truly_) four times, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me off the campaign trail and into the courtroom for SHAM TRIALS, unlawfully REMOVED my name from the ballot, GAGGED and CENSORED me, are attempting to JAIL me for life as an innocent man, and are even seeking the _" corporate death penalty"_ against me and my family. **
---
It might be hard to believe given what you've witnessed ever since I first rode down the golden escalator, but there was a point in time when I lived a pretty nice life...
---
_... Even the media said nice things about me! _
---
But then, I did something they couldn't possibly comprehend, something that undermined every globalist and radical left-wing instinct in their bones.
---
I chose _**YOU**_**** - the _PEOPLE!_
---
I chose to put _AMERICA_ FIRST.
---
I chose to give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, to fight back against the Washington ruling class that hates our country, to stop the warmongers, and to rout out the Deep State.
---
And if I could go back and do it all over again, _I wouldn 't have it any other way! _
---
**Remember, they 're not really coming after me, Patriot, they're coming after **_**YOU**_**. I 'm just standing in their way - ****_and I ALWAYS will, stand in their way._**
---
Which is why, in the most consequential election year of our lives, Crooked Joe and the Democrats will use every last bit of _**LEGAL**_****_**WARFARE**_ imaginable to try and stop us.
---
**But what these crooks, thugs, and fools fail to understand, just as they failed to understand all the way back in 2015, is that I will** _**NEVER**_**,**_**_EVER_**_****_**SURRENDER**_**our country to their tyranny!**
---
_And I know that patriots like YOU won 't either..._
---
[](http://links.swampdrainer.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3351f9dc803847678c3bf875d93e7ec4&_e=ksJ2sK677zYdvF_9dh4WMvmLYXMO5TKwt9OIofqaowfLUF4hJyFZhh3r0Vy2trneEBVTTICncTJQmqMY9J41Rovjg_d-rsFY27JoiQ7ACS9mLov99UqKRK0e4i9i0gflVKP23w_LgLxbBMRecwQdWfC2xCiwzRtS9TaGSvkiCVEQ-oqJ0O9BiC6vexoGULsWM21T7VSOVfEnp3gFGXXVe_iRcJEW6rWgdpr9gcX7XEnWjCmiZ12WGxu0bKmhR8GE9q_rw0XRUkowoBp3wNb4FanHlZQNWQ93iFbKr2iSAnqJf6-ew-vTXdPpw8YE48C3vQtLW-VP2Yv_Gqg-WyJls1zMx32Xg6QSbMv3U3Ik72C7xkxdWlIiHrBN-JAVLzZM-0dRh0suhTuT93e4Q-ipv1NjcIz8rwIr0oaqEVBA6JGlxZXzoaTEQ9DOgEL0ZF1h)

clean_body: Sharing my 2023 reflections with you... Sharing my 2023 reflections with you... | | | | | To: My loyal supporters From: President Donald J. Trump Re: 2023 -- a dark year for America Dear Patriot, With the door officially shut on 2023 and the first vote of the 2024 election set to be cast in just DAYS, I thought it was time I sent you a personal letter on my reflections of this past year - one of the darkest years in American history. All I ever wanted was to make this country that we all hold so dear and love so much GREAT AGAIN! But to the villainous forces in the Washington Swamp, to Crooked Joe and his accomplices, that is the ultimate crime. In 2023, the Radical Democrats unlawfully ARRESTED the leading 2024 presidential candidate (yours truly) four times, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me off the campaign trail and into the courtroom for SHAM TRIALS, unlawfully REMOVED my name from the ballot, GAGGED and CENSORED me, are attempting to JAIL me for life as an innocent man, and are even seeking the " corporate death penalty" against me and my family. It might be hard to believe given what you've witnessed ever since I first rode down the golden escalator, but there was a point in time when I lived a pretty nice life... ... Even the media said nice things about me! But then, I did something they couldn't possibly comprehend, something that undermined every globalist and radical left-wing instinct in their bones. I chose YOU** - the PEOPLE! I chose to put AMERICA FIRST. I chose to give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, to fight back against the Washington ruling class that hates our country, to stop the warmongers, and to rout out the Deep State. And if I could go back and do it all over again, I wouldn 't have it any other way! Remember, they 're not really coming after me, Patriot, they're coming after YOU. I 'm just standing in their way - **and I ALWAYS will, stand in their way. Which is why, in the most consequential election year of our lives, Crooked Joe and the Democrats will use every last bit of LEGAL**WARFARE imaginable to try and stop us. But what these crooks, thugs, and fools fail to understand, just as they failed to understand all the way back in 2015, is that I will NEVER,EVER_SURRENDERour country to their tyranny! And I know that patriots like YOU won 't either... | Come November 5, WE THE PEOPLE will PROVE that good and honest Americans had the courage to peacefully cast off the Radical Democrat regime that is destroying our country from within, and replace it with a government that serves and protects YOU. Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. Trump | | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: How we can move forward
body:
Folks, from starting in my role as House Majority Whip to passing a number of bills to serve Maryland’s working families, attending events throughout the district, and even knocking on doors in Virginia to help out some amazing Democrats there, 2023 was a year of progress. I know that by working together, we can make even more strides in 2024.

I don’t come from money, so our campaign relies on grassroots supporters like you to keep us going — and I need your help to kick off this year for progress. I need your help right away because once the legislative session begins, I won’t be able to fundraise. Will you pitch in what you can to my goal of 89 donations before the noon January 10 fundraising deadline so I can keep fighting for our families in the General Assembly?

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2024email?refcode=Janemails]

We can make big things happen. Empowering small businesses, strengthening the middle-class economy, ensuring police accountability and public safety, and making critical investments in our communities — we can accomplish these goals by pulling together to get them done.

If you’re able, can I count on you to pitch in right now to my pre-session grassroots fundraising goal so I can keep advocating for our families?

Thanks for being part of this work,
Jazz
As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Majority Whip of the Maryland House. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Bowie with his wife and two kids.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2024email?refcode=Janemails]
By AUthority Friends of Jazz Lewis, Treasurer Chris Taitt
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States

subject: #1 Worst fish for your heart 🐟💔
body:

Eating wild-caught fish is good
for your heart… right? WRONG.

According to Dr. Sam Walters -
one of America's #1 heart specialists - there's ONE fish you

This so-called "healthy fish" is

name: Greg Landsman
subject: The fight for our democracy continues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76617684/447954878/-1268629450?refcode=em_msg_2024.01.06_b1_gl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjZiMGZkZi1iZWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U3O9Xeg4a3kDtx9DjfGlcLnJe0Yicmw6twEWpDt30l4=&emci=6a3e32a7-b2ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=266b0fdf-beac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=10283101)
---
Dear team,

Today, I hope you will join me in reflecting on the attack on our Capitol that occurred three years ago today.

I’m reminded of the brave Capitol Police Officers and other first responders who risked their lives to defend the Capitol and the democratic processes happening inside. I’m reminded of the lies spread by many of my far-right Republican colleagues. _Today, more than ever, I’m reminded of how precious our democracy is, and how carefully it must be defended._

**In 2024, democracy is on the ballot again.** Extremist Republicans in Congress continue to spread dangerous misinformation about the 2020 election and the January 6th insurrection. They are trying to pass restrictive voting laws that could disenfranchise millions of voters. Instead of protecting our democratic institutions, the Chaos Caucus wants to tear them down.

It’s critical that we continue to fight for democracy, for fair elections, and for voting rights – **_together._**

Thank you for being part of my team.

Appreciate you,

_Greg_

www.landsmanforcongress.com

name: Staff Sgt. Aquilino Gonell
subject: Today marks three years since the insurrection at the Capitol
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We have to make sure that Ruben defeats Kari Lake in Arizona.
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240106-2-30&t=1&akid=1669%2E734936%2ELpuPUe)
---
Peter -
My name is Aquilino Gonell, former U.S. Capitol Police Sergeant, and I fought to defend the Capitol on January 6, 2021, three years ago today.
Ruben Gallego is running for Senate in Arizona to defeat Kari Lake — one of the most dangerous election deniers in the country. Lies like the ones she spreads caused January 6th, and they could cause worse in the future.
We have to make sure that Ruben defeats Kari Lake in Arizona.
[**So if you can, I’m asking you to please support Ruben’s campaign with a donation of $3 today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240106-2-30&t=2&akid=1669%2E734936%2ELpuPUe)
The people who attacked the Capitol that day attacked our democracy itself, and the Constitution that I swore an oath to protect when I joined the Army.
After what happened to me and my fellow officers on January 6th, it makes me sick that someone like Kari Lake can have a chance at serving in the Senate.
To this day, she does not accept the results of the 2020 election. She appears with insurrectionists, defends them, praises them as proud Americans.
To me, a proud American serves their country. A proud American upholds the values we all share. And a proud American should admit that January 6th was one of the darkest days in our country’s history.
That’s why I’m proud my friend Ruben is running against her.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240106-2-30&t=3&akid=1669%2E734936%2ELpuPUe)
He served in the Marines, he still serves in Congress. He’s fought for this country, he was ready to fight for it again on January 6th, and he’ll fight hard for the people of Arizona in the U.S. Senate.
We need more Ruben Gallegos leading this country — and way less Kari Lakes. So again, I’m humbly asking you:
[**Can you make a $3 donation to Ruben’s Senate campaign today? Use this link to give whatever you can afford to make sure he defeats Kari Lake and stops her before she gets any more power and influence.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240106-2-30&t=4&akid=1669%2E734936%2ELpuPUe)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Here’s why I got into public service:
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1819%2E35263%2ENP5A2c)
Peter — When I was a child, I was diagnosed with a serious illness and spent three months in the hospital. When I got better, my grandparents, who raised me, began looking for an insurance policy that would cover me in the future. But they couldn’t find such a policy because of my previous illness. Not from any insurer. Not at any price. They had to pay for my health care out of pocket — and they had to make enormous sacrifices to do so — all because I was a child labeled with those words: **"pre-existing condition."** Peter, I got into public service because I saw my grandparents stay up late at night, worried sick that I would fall ill again and that they wouldn't be able to afford my care. No one should ever have to go through that. **Like 133 million Americans, I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care — and before the _Affordable Care Act_ was passed, many of us could be denied coverage.** Today, insurance companies can no longer discriminate against someone based on their pre-existing condition. I championed health reform and fought to allow young people to stay on their parent’s insurance plan up to age 26. These policy changes have led to millions more Americans getting the health insurance they need. So, you can imagine my frustration whenever Republicans attack our health care or threaten protections for folks with pre-existing conditions — people like me. The GOP has spent years playing politics with people’s lives. And if Mitch McConnell and his Republican mega-donors flip my seat in Wisconsin and take hold of the Senate majority next election, countless Americans could find themselves in a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules. The people of Wisconsin did not send me to Washington to take people’s health care away, which is why I fought against Republican repeal efforts and why I will never back down. But I can’t defend the hard-fought progress we’ve made without your help, Peter. **[So today, I’m humbly asking: Will you make a donation to my reelection campaign to defend our Senate majority? That’s the only way we’ll prevent Republicans from rolling back the progress we’ve made expanding access to affordable health care.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3587?c0=tbe-em-jan24.9rGJ2t&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240106_PM1_V2_S1&t=14&akid=1819%2E35263%2ENP5A2c)** _Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3604?c0=tbe-em-jan24.7tZQlC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240106_PM1_V2_S1&t=15&akid=1819%2E35263%2ENP5A2c)
---
[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3605?c0=tbe-em-jan24.D99khk&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240106_PM1_V2_S1&t=16&akid=1819%2E35263%2ENP5A2c)
---
| [CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3606?c0=tbe-em-jan24.jWw7rr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240106_PM1_V2_S1&t=17&akid=1819%2E35263%2ENP5A2c)
---
[CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3607?c0=tbe-em-jan24.HOnTMP&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240106_PM1_V2_S1&t=18&akid=1819%2E35263%2ENP5A2c)
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3608?c0=tbe-em-jan24.JEwqBa&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240106_PM1_V2_S1&t=19&akid=1819%2E35263%2ENP5A2c)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3587?c0=tbe-em-jan24.9rGJ2t&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240106_PM1_V2_S1&t=20&akid=1819%2E35263%2ENP5A2c)
---
I am not going to let anyone make me forget where I came from or why I got into public service in the first place. My experience has always inspired my work to do everything I can to make sure that every American has quality, affordable health care coverage and stand up against those who want to take it away.
As long as you're with me, I know we can overcome any challenge we may face on the road ahead and stop the Republicans from taking away health insurance from millions of Americans once and for all. **[It starts by defending our Democratic Senate majority so please chip in, if you can, to help me keep Wisconsin’s Senate seat blue.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3587?c0=tbe-em-jan24.9rGJ2t&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240106_PM1_V2_S1&t=21&akid=1819%2E35263%2ENP5A2c)**
Thank you for standing with me.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=1819%2E35263%2ENP5A2c) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=1819%2E35263%2ENP5A2c)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---

subject: Ryan readies for the Iowa Caucus
body:
| |
---
| | |
# Campaign News and Views
---
| [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=4d296ad954&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Onward to Iowa!
The Iowa Caucus is just nine days away. Ryan is traveling across the state, sharing his message and _[praying](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=8e68f65b93&e=c1403f41d3)_ for America's restoration. You can be a part of that by _[signing up](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=9f79584e69&e=c1403f41d3)_ for the Iowa Caucus on January 15th.
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=21da53d6f9&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### 610 WIOD Interview
Ryan joins WIOD in Miami for a lively chat about America's inflation. He lays out his plans, built on honesty and a strong spiritual foundation. [_Listen here_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=f7c05452f8&e=c1403f41d3)
---
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=89db607a90&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### News Talk 1540 KXEL
Ryan returns to Waterloo for an in-studio discussion with Jeff Stein. They talk about the economy and Ryan stresses the importance of a balanced budget. _[Listen here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=f64af8de5d&e=c1403f41d3)_
---
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=82d612bcdf&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Free Soil Coalition
Ryan speaks out against the CO2 pipeline at a rally hosted by the Free Soil Coalition. He explains how it violates property rights and could damage farmers' health. [_Watch here_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=d8196fd313&e=c1403f41d3)
---
|
####
**Coming Up**

---
|
---
### Telephone Townhall
Dial in at (855) 756-7520 to hear Ryan take questions from the audience. Our campaign team will also share updates from the field in Iowa. The event begins at 7:00 PM CT on Sunday, January 7th.
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=9d173c48db&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Iowa Caucus Rally
The Binkley campaign is hosting a rally on the eve of the Iowa Caucus. The rally will begin at 6:00 PM on January 14th, at the Holiday Inn Des Moines Airport/Conference Center on 6111 Fleur Drive, Des Moines, IA. _[RSVP here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=278f6ac5ee&e=c1403f41d3)_
---
|
####
**How Can I Help?**
---
| [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=cee6208b3c&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Iowa Caucus Registration
The Iowa Caucus is the first presidential primary and it plays a pivotal role in election year politics. Can you join us in Iowa on January 15 to support Ryan at a local caucus meeting? [_Sign up here!_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=3f3919f885&e=c1403f41d3)
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=457cdf49f0&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### 90-Day Push to the Primaries
Will you help bolster our outreach to voters over the next 90 days? We're asking for dedicated volunteers to make calls to Iowa and New Hampshire voters. [_Sign up here_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=00f482b1e2&e=c1403f41d3)
---
|
---

He explains how it violates property rights and could damage farmers' health. | Coming Up | Telephone Townhall Dial in at (855) 756-7520 to hear Ryan take questions from the audience. Our campaign team will also share updates from the field in Iowa. The event begins at 7:00 PM CT on Sunday, January 7th. | | Iowa Caucus Rally The Binkley campaign is hosting a rally on the eve of the Iowa Caucus. The rally will begin at 6:00 PM on January 14th, at the Holiday Inn Des Moines Airport/Conference Center on 6111 Fleur Drive, Des Moines, IA. | How Can I Help? | Iowa Caucus Registration The Iowa Caucus is the first presidential primary and it plays a pivotal role in election year politics. Can you join us in Iowa on January 15 to support Ryan at a local caucus meeting? | | 90-Day Push to the Primaries Will you help bolster our outreach to voters over the next 90 days? We're asking for dedicated volunteers to make calls to Iowa and New Hampshire voters. | | "Contribute Today!" | • LIKE AND COMMENT on all social media posts • A simple "I support Ryan Binkley for President" goes a long way! • Ignore any argumentative comments that may follow • Lastly, DONATE & SHARE the link with everyone you know! | | | | Coming up: Click to stay up to date with events. | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2024 Binkley for President 2024, All rights reserved.

* * *
# [Congress' job for 2024](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2052568&post_id=140423976&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQwNDIzOTc2LCJpYXQiOjE3MDQ1Njc0NzQsImV4cCI6MTcwNzE1OTQ3NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNTI1NjgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.pSObmQ21vS4jyQkm73m-mJK5M8-eVWe60pZhDHe5OhY)

---
On Tuesday, I head back to DC for the first time in a few weeks. It has me thinking about Congress' job for the year.
First off, 2023, by every measure, was unproductive. Republicans' tiny majority and refusal to govern effectively meant:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/547b728e-5de3-48ae-acbb-12a8531ed58f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I hold out some hope that 2024 can be more fruitful. Of course, there's the big stuff we need to get done, like hammering out deals to keep the government funded and allocating aid abroad.
But amidst a divided government, I hope we can also pass the smaller, bipartisan bills that genuinely do affect people's lives. I've led several of these, including a bill to prevent another infant formula shortage. **It might be considered "small" by Congressional standards, but if you're the parent of a baby who can't find safe formula, Congress' failure to act is a BIG deal.**
* * *
I also want to take some time to answer one of the questions I got on my post asking what you all would like to see me cover here on Substack. More of these to come!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a1745b0c-e4a6-4010-a6ec-e7efde1512d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This is a great question. Unfortunately, people who are concerned about corruption are right to be concerned. From a reliance on big money to Members of Congress profiting off of stock trades, our system is broken. Whether the corruption is covert (fancy lobbyist weekend trips) or overt (Bob Menendez/George Santos style), it's a problem.
That's why I've tried to lead by example, and I don't take money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil, Big Pharma, and Big Bank CEOs. I've also led the fight to ban congressional stock trading and am the only Democrat to oppose earmarks, which are a way of funding pet projects and often lead to waste and fraud.
**But just because the system isn 't perfect does not mean we should disengage. It's imperative that the people who do see how rigged the rules can be engage with our political process.** If you just throw your hands up and refuse to vote, you're playing right into the special interest playbook--which wants voters to feel powerless against big corporations and the status quo.
I encourage people to support candidates who are doing things the right way, and to stay involved and continue pressing elected officials to act in the best interests of their constituents.
* * *
As always, thanks for reading!
Katie Porter
P.S. -- 60 days until our primary election! You can use this link to help us out: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kpsubstackq124&refcode=0106
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0e4bc1ed-5b99-4cd5-aaba-a9a0acbf98f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

name: Shane Wolfe
subject: did you see the news?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kristen for Michigan
body:
I’m Shane Wolfe, and I’m proud to be the campaign manager for Kristen McDonald Rivet in her bid for Congress in Michigan's 8th District.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76619151/447959592/1433120897?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTk1MjYxNy1jNWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XhLZRASFnNGcIT-cSnUhQBdWhhIk4NcYeRH5IuNvHWw=) Hey there, I’m Shane Wolfe, and I’m proud to be the campaign manager for Kristen McDonald Rivet in her bid for Congress in Michigan's 8th District. Our campaign had a _big_ first week, and I wanted to reach out with the recap:
1. Kristen held a fired-up launch event with over 200 supporters.
2. This coalition set a Michigan record with $250,000 raised in the first 24-hours of the race.
3. We rolled out endorsements from 23 key stakeholders across Michigan’s 8th District.
4. There are 20 news stories loudly amplifying Kristen’s message... what a first week!! Check out these headlines:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76619152/447959593/1433120897?refcode=email_010624_news&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTk1MjYxNy1jNWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XhLZRASFnNGcIT-cSnUhQBdWhhIk4NcYeRH5IuNvHWw=) Kristen is already making a huge impact in this race, and we couldn’t have done it without you. Our momentum is building, and Kristen’s message about restoring the Michigan Dream is resonating with folks all across mid-Michigan.

And our first week makes it clear: this race is going to be key to making sure we flip the House blue this November.

**We're thrilled by the outpouring of support we’ve received so far, but we know the real work lies ahead.**

**[Can you help us capitalize on this momentum by contributing to Kristen’s campaign? Whether it’s $5, $25, or more, every donation helps us reach more voters and build a campaign that can win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76619153/447959594/1433120897?refcode=email_010624_news&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTk1MjYxNy1jNWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XhLZRASFnNGcIT-cSnUhQBdWhhIk4NcYeRH5IuNvHWw=)** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76619154/447959595/1433120897?refcode=email_010624_news&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTk1MjYxNy1jNWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XhLZRASFnNGcIT-cSnUhQBdWhhIk4NcYeRH5IuNvHWw=)

Thank you for being a part of this journey and for believing in our vision. Let's keep it going!

With appreciation,

Shane Wolfe

_Kristen for Michigan
Campaign Manager_

name: Team Schrier
subject: Three years since our nation’s Capitol was stormed by insurrectionists
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
The Big Lie is alive; it's time to let it fall to the wayside [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76619241/447960188/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDFkODljOS1jNWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FrYeW7pc1UCqZWXQPLVyS7xb4JtYOLDtt0YrBq1IVzE=&emci=f6cc4b9f-e7ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=101d89c9-c5ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Three years ago today, a violent pro-Trump mob stormed our nation's Capitol building as Kim and her colleagues met to certify the results of the 2020 presidential election.
