**It was supposed to be a day of great pride.**

Our nation, despite its differences, would set aside the partisan fighting that is only natural in politics, and with grace, respect, and honor bear witness to the peaceful transfer of power.

**A privilege that so many Americans have fought for centuries to defend, was nearly erased in one afternoon.

Instead, they sat in horror while watching Donald Trump send a mob after me and my Democratic colleagues, after the Vice President for daring to follow the law, and after anyone who stood in the way of their attempted coup.**

In the months and years since, prosecutors and investigators have tried to piece back together what was torn apart on that day, fighting to bring accountability to insurrectionists, cop killers, and even Presidents.**I don’t have to tell you that the search for justice and accountability is far from over.**

Any words here that promise you that this kind of depravity is over would ring hollow. Our democracy is an experiment that demands our participation, demands that we fight to defend it against threats to liberty wherever they roam.

I’m honored to have you by my side in that fight. But our nation is still at risk. **[**This year, how our country votes goes beyond policy decisions and the direction we go, but strikes at the very core of our nation’s values and principles. Will we be ruled by the people, or dictators and mobs? I’m standing with democracy, friend. Can I count on you to join me? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76619272/447960223/-686654137?amount=10&refcode=RRFC_20240106_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTQxZDg5YzktYzVhYy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Dr1lyd5KjsEpCI3o5bmaQuzRzRX0BC5V1JTzTBWisBQ=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76619273/447960224/-686654137?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100&express_lane=true&refcode=RRFC_20240106_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTQxZDg5YzktYzVhYy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Dr1lyd5KjsEpCI3o5bmaQuzRzRX0BC5V1JTzTBWisBQ=)**

Our nation, despite its differences, would set aside the partisan fighting that is only natural in politics, and with grace, respect, and honor bear witness to the peaceful transfer of power. A privilege that so many Americans have fought for centuries to defend, was nearly erased in one afternoon. Instead, they sat in horror while watching Donald Trump send a mob after me and my Democratic colleagues, after the Vice President for daring to follow the law, and after anyone who stood in the way of their attempted coup. In the months and years since, prosecutors and investigators have tried to piece back together what was torn apart on that day, fighting to bring accountability to insurrectionists, cop killers, and even Presidents.I don’t have to tell you that the search for justice and accountability is far from over. Any words here that promise you that this kind of depravity is over would ring hollow. Our democracy is an experiment that demands our participation, demands that we fight to defend it against threats to liberty wherever they roam. I’m honored to have you by my side in that fight. But our nation is still at risk. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you, Congressman Raul Ruiz | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. Peter,
Today is a warning. It’s been exactly three years since the horrific Jan. 6 insurrection and the MAGA threat to our democracy remains. We can’t fail in our efforts to defeat Trump and MAGA candidates up and down the ballot in November.
Defending our democratic institutions, free and fair elections, and our essential rights is more important than ever. That’s why Emerge is ramping up our work to recruit, train, and empower bold Democratic women to run for office, win critical races, and fight the MAGA agenda in every state. Right now, Emerge alums Sec. Jena Griswold and Sec. Shenna Bellows are upholding the rule of law in Colorado and Maine. We need more principled candidates like them in office to defend our democracy.
**We’re counting on our community – and that includes you – to power this continued crucial fight to uphold the rule of law and secure the Democratic victories we need in 2024 and beyond.[So please: Donate $10 or more to Emerge now to help empower more Democratic women to fight the MAGA agenda, from school boards to the U.S. Congress. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76619769/447962002/-1986725772?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1404-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxY2M0ZjdjLWM2YWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=keE78zXpoh7zNssFwQNJ6ABtgehosmafVIxB1sDrpKs=)**

We can’t underestimate people like Donald Trump and the far-right Republicans who embrace his dangerous agenda. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Why we're on their list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Summer and I are unafraid to stand for justice, humanity, and peace — and our opposition will spend big against us.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240106-3357-footer&t=1&akid=3357%2E420207%2EWM3B0c)
Peter,
My friend and colleague Congresswoman Summer Lee and I are set to face major challenges this year, and we need your support now more than ever.
**AIPAC, funded by massive Republican megadonors, is set to spend $100 million this year against campaigns like ours**. This is an all-hands-on-deck moment. Summer and I need to start the year strong to hold back this onslaught.
Let’s be clear about what is happening here. AIPAC, which endorsed over 100 Republican members of Congress who defended the January 6 insurrection, routinely targets Black and Brown members of Congress with primary challenges. **So, it is no surprise that Summer and I are on their target list this year.**
But we won’t back down. Summer and I are unafraid to stand for justice, humanity, and peace in Washington — and our opposition is scared.**Simply put: we are being targeted because we are effective in changing the status quo.**
**Peter, it's imperative that we work together to fight back against the $100 million dollar smear campaign they’re planning against our movement — and the way we start this year will determine the scope and scale of our plans to fight back.**[**Can we count on you to split a contribution of any amount between our campaigns today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240106-SL-2.PRIoUR&refcode=em20240106-3357&t=2&akid=3357%2E420207%2EWM3B0c)
**Summer and I have chosen to prioritize people over corporate interests. And our commitment to equal rights, freedoms, and peace has made some powerful people _very_ uncomfortable.**
The same Republican billionaires who bribed Supreme Court justices are now threatening our campaigns and the movement we’ve worked so hard to sustain. **Now more than ever, we need a swell of support from the grassroots to fight back against this no-holds-barred conservative attack.**
**Let's finish this year with a strong message: We stand together, unwavering in our pursuit of a just and equitable society. [Please consider splitting a contribution of any amount between our two campaigns today and help us protect our progress in 2024 and beyond.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240106-SL-2.PRIoUR&refcode=em20240106-3357&t=3&akid=3357%2E420207%2EWM3B0c)**
Your support means everything to us, and together, we can and we will overcome the odds.
In solidarity,

Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20240106-3357-footer&t=4&refcode2=3357_420207_WM3B0c&akid=3357%2E420207%2EWM3B0c)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=3357%2E420207%2EWM3B0c)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=3357%2E420207%2EWM3B0c)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

| | Friend – some politicians (and I won’t name names, but he’s a MASSIVE CROOK) prefer to hide from voters.
---
Not me! Getting to speak directly with patriots like **YOU** is my favorite part of the job!
That’s why I’m out on the campaign trail today in the great state of Iowa – home to the FIRST-IN-THE-NATION CAUCUS less than 10 days from now.
But while I’m out on the trail ensuring we WRAP UP this primary ASAP so that we can shift ALL our attention to firing Crooked Joe and saving our country, I just got word of a nefarious plot brewing between the disloyal RINOs and... _Obama_.
Not only is Obama reportedly raising MILLIONS of dollars for Crooked Joe... _**his former campaign manager is now trying to INTERVENE in the Republican primary to SABOTAGE us and install a weak RINO nominee instead.**_
But I’m willing to bet voters like YOU aren’t about to allow Obama to pick _YOUR_ nominee.

Hi Peter, it’s Tom Suozzi. I’m the Democratic nominee in NY-03 to replace the expelled George Santos, and we have a special election coming up on February 13.

Peter, the implications of this election in just a few weeks are huge. There’s so much at stake for Nassau, Queens, and the whole country. Everyone is watching to see if we can finally break through the partisan gridlock in Congress to get things done and solve the critical problems our country faces. With George Santos gone, we have a chance to do just that.

**In short, Peter, we have to win. This special election will set the tone for all of 2024–including the general election in November.**

[_**So, Peter, I’m asking if you’ll split a contribution between Fight for Progress and I so we can win NY-03, finally get to solving the problems our country faces, and start off 2024 with a big win?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76620205/447963872/-349024561?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-01-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzOTAwYzBkLWM4YWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8sbW2RuFfHZ3niejc-H1XL0uGKGDlrj5ianxJCgI9tE=)

name: Rep. Eric Swalwell
subject: 3 years later and we’re still fighting for accountability
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2024-fr-january?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2024-fr-january?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
Friend, three years ago was one of the darkest days in American history.

In an effort to overturn the results of the 2020 Presidential election, Donald Trump used our nation’s highest office not to unite our country, but to tear it in two.

Galvanizing white supremacists and radical fringe groups, our former president incited the first breach in the United States Capitol since 1814.

But thanks to the Colorado Supreme Court, who found Trump did violate the insurrection clause of the 14th amendment (and is therefore ineligible to be on the state’s ballot this year), we have a precedent to keep him off the 2024 ballot for good.

Friend, The Colorado case is not a slam dunk for us. The Supreme Court will hear this case in February – where the fight for accountability will be an uphill battle.

But as we head into this new Presidential election year, I know we will keep fighting like hell to protect our country from bad actors who seek to destroy our democracy and divide our nation.

Onward,

Rep. Eric Swalwell

This is great news, team: President Biden's approval rating continues to increase as polls show him _statistically tied_ with Donald Trump!

President Biden is moving the country in the right direction by strengthening our economy, creating over 14 MILLION jobs, and reducing inflation -- _and**Americans are taking notice.**_

But to defend our incredible progress under the Biden-Harris administration, we need to confirm that Democrats are supporting President Biden and REJECTING a Trump comeback! **_So please, let us know your response before the midnight deadline:_**

**Supporter:[ dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.dscc.org/go/17113?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-ND-20240106-BidenApprovalAlert-BidenApprovalScrollingGIF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240106-BidenApprovalAlert-BidenApprovalScrollingGIF-Pros-sl1&akid=13102%2E9716520%2ER7RRFh)**

Team,

The race to win back the House majority is heating up, and we wanted to make sure you saw the latest updates:

First: Speaker Mike Johnson (R) recently hosted a massive right-wing fundraiser, where tickets sold for as much as $25,000 to help expand the GOP’s majority.

Then: House Republicans weaponized their majority to launch a baseless impeachment inquiry into President Biden.

Now: It’s time for a new generation of leadership. Republicans have controlled the House for the last 12 months — and every passing day shows they’re more interested in political games than delivering for the American people.

We have the opportunity to change course.

The House majority hinges on just 5 seats — the smallest margin in modern history. Jason is on the front lines fighting to uplift vulnerable Democrats and to defeat MAGA Republicans in the November elections. * * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76620511/447965104/1575385346?code=jtk4702-su-nd&refcode=jtk4702-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yjc1MmRhOS1jYWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YfCy5ELJlShXk9lHaOwBKQmMbQOIZ_mUEqhjwOngzBc=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: A dark day for America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear Peter,
While it has been three years since Donald Trump abused his position to stoke the flames of violence at the United States Capitol, our outrage and resolve to never let it happen again has not diminished. Donald Trump acted like a dictator when he encouraged his supporters to interfere with the peaceful transfer of power.
His actions on January 6, 2021 were disgraceful and undoubtedly criminal, as our justice system will now decide. As the campaigns switch into high gear, we hope this sad day in our history will serve as a reminder of Donald Trump’s disregard for our Constitution and the rule of law. Voters know President Biden and Vice President Harris are a team that will fight for our democracy and continue to lead for the American people.
This November isn't just about re-electing Democrats who will continue moving America in the right direction -- it is about protecting and preserving the very existence of democracy and freedom in our great nation. Let's get to work.
In solidarity,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Steve%20K%27s%20Signature.png]
Steve Kerrigan
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party

name: Tiernan Donohue
subject: This will be one of the most expensive and competitive races on the map.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1612%2E552475%2EN5s2K_)
Peter, I’m reaching out because we’re building a team of Election Year Founding Donors, and we still need 1,300 more people to chip in to hit our goal.
**[Become a 2024 Founding Donor ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240106-2?refcode=em20240106-2&recurring=1&refcode2=1612_552475_N5s2K_&akid=1612%2E552475%2EN5s2K_)**
Let me explain why this is so important. Pennsylvania has a long history of being the tipping point of U.S. elections, and 2024 will be no different. With an open seat in West Virginia, Mitch McConnell only needs to flip one more seat to retake the Senate, and he’s all in on PA. He even personally recruited a mega-millionaire from Connecticut to defeat Bob.
**To put it simply, if we don’t have the resources to fight back, it could be the difference between a red and blue Senate.**
As we head into one of the toughest environments for Democrats, we need to lay the groundwork for a victory. That means hitting our goal of 10,000 Founding Donors.
**[So, Peter, I hope you’ll take a minute to give $5, or whatever you can, to help us build the grassroots support necessary to win.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240106-2?refcode=em20240106-2&recurring=1&refcode2=1612_552475_N5s2K_&akid=1612%2E552475%2EN5s2K_)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240106-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240106-2-el&refcode2=1612_552475_N5s2K_&akid=1612%2E552475%2EN5s2K_) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240106-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240106-2-el&refcode2=1612_552475_N5s2K_&akid=1612%2E552475%2EN5s2K_) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240106-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240106-2-el&refcode2=1612_552475_N5s2K_&akid=1612%2E552475%2EN5s2K_) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240106-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240106-2-el&refcode2=1612_552475_N5s2K_&akid=1612%2E552475%2EN5s2K_) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240106-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240106-2-el&refcode2=1612_552475_N5s2K_&akid=1612%2E552475%2EN5s2K_) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240106-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240106-2&refcode2=1612_552475_N5s2K_&akid=1612%2E552475%2EN5s2K_)

Thank you for your support.

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: What January 6th should mean to all of us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Team,

This morning _LoHud_ published an op-ed I wrote sharing my firsthand account of the January 6th insurrection and calling on the Lower Hudson Valley to act to save our democracy. Please take a moment to read it below, and **[then share it with your friends:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76621035/447966954/-1157769536?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzJjMjgyOC1jZWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9Ed-tKzmWMowlrzOrP7j7ZrqJ4UQQAsDJW3CWpWQc4=&emci=98661ae4-f9ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=232c2828-ceac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=24719896)**
* * *
**[I was at the Capitol on Jan. 6. We cannot forget how fragile our Democracy was — and is](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76621036/447966955/-1157769536?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzJjMjgyOC1jZWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9Ed-tKzmWMowlrzOrP7j7ZrqJ4UQQAsDJW3CWpWQc4=&emci=98661ae4-f9ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=232c2828-ceac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=24719896)**

Three years ago today, I, along with hundreds of my colleagues in Congress, nearly died in the insurrection at the United States Capitol. This occurred just days after I was sworn in as the Representative for New York’s 17th Congressional District, covering parts of the Lower Hudson Valley. I was so excited to get to work, especially on behalf of a community that had elevated me from poverty all the way to the U.S. House. Readers will recall that as bad as the crises we face in America are today, they were much worse in early January of 2021. I entered Congress focused on crushing the COVID-19 pandemic, delivering hundreds of millions of dollars to my district, and getting our economy back on track.

While I accomplished those things and more, January 6th shaped my time in Congress and altered the course of American history. It also clarified the stakes for the future of our democracy. I will never forget how quickly the events of that day unfolded. How, from my vantage point seated on the House floor as the youngest member of Congressional leadership, Speaker Pelosi was whisked away by security before the rest of us in the chamber went into lockdown, only a handful of guards in the entire room to protect us from the hundreds of terrorists who had breached the Capitol complex and were roaming the halls searching for us—many of them armed with deadly weapons. I was prepared to fight alongside my colleagues Ruben Gallego of Arizona, a former Marine, and Colin Allred of Texas, who had been a linebacker in the NFL. But I also thought we would likely die. It was the first time I recalled feeling that way about a particular moment in my life.

The mob eventually found us, as evidenced by the loud banging on the locked doors behind me and the photos of security officials with guns drawn that later leaked to the press. Due to the creative thinking, and bravery, of the guards who barricaded what is known as the Speaker’s Hallway with a pile of wooden chairs, we were able to escape through underground tunnels to a more secure location. Our lives were saved—just in the nick of time.

I am writing this because our democracy is in crisis, and I fear too many Americans have forgotten what January 6th means about this new era in American politics and what the Republican Party has become in recent years. It is well established that then-President Donald Trump incited the violent mob that stormed the Capitol, looking to hang Vice President Mike Pence and assassinate members of Congress in an effort to overturn the free and fair 2020 presidential election that Joe Biden clearly won. Nevertheless, two-thirds of my House Republican colleagues voted to overturn that election just hours after nearly dying alongside me, afraid to stand up to the leader of their party.

Now, Donald Trump, twice impeached and indicted in four different jurisdictions with 91 felony charges against him, will almost certainly become the GOP’s nominee for President again. And he is more dangerous, and emboldened, than ever. He has pledged to pardon the insurrectionists who nearly took my life on January 6th, stack the FBI and Department of Justice with partisan hacks who will pursue baseless investigations into his opponents, and even jail his political enemies. In recent weeks, Trump has quoted from Nazi leader Adolf Hitler, calling his political adversaries “vermin” and claiming that immigrants are “poisoning the blood of our country.” He has stated that if he returns to the White House, he intends to be a dictator on Day One.

Overwhelmingly, Trump’s former cabinet officials and White House advisors have sounded the alarm, pleading with America to believe him when he says he will do these destructive things—and much more. Several have expressed skepticism that our democracy can survive another four years of Donald Trump as President.

As someone who narrowly survived January 6th, who voted for the second impeachment of Donald Trump, who has spent a lot of time crafting legislation to strengthen our democracy, and who knows what it’s like to actually serve with Republicans in Congress, I, too, worry our democracy cannot withstand another Trump presidency. And while it would be foolish for me to try to predict whether Donald Trump will defeat President Biden this November and return to 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, I know that what we do here in the Lower Hudson Valley matters. We will need a Democratic Congress that will fight like hell to keep Donald Trump in check, and that means defeating freshman Republican Congressman Mike Lawler, who currently occupies the seat I used to hold representing the 17th Congressional District.

I know we can still defeat fascism in this country, much like we did when we rejected Donald Trump and his enablers in Congress in the 2020 election. But only if we recognize that we are not yet out of the wilderness, and that this, too, will be the most important election of our lifetimes.

_Mondaire Jones represented New York's 17th Congressional District from 2021 to 2023. He is again seeking the seat this year, running as a Democrat._

| Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He’s ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he’s doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. [**Donate today to build our grassroots movement and send Mondaire Jones back to Congress and back to work.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76621037/447966956/-460793036?refcode=em24_240106_Jan6_enask_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240106_Jan6_enask_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=232c2828-ceac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzJjMjgyOC1jZWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9Ed-tKzmWMowlrzOrP7j7ZrqJ4UQQAsDJW3CWpWQc4=) [DONATE clean_body: Team, This morning LoHud published an op-ed I wrote sharing my firsthand account of the January 6th insurrection and calling on the Lower Hudson Valley to act to save our democracy. Please take a moment to read it below, and ** Three years ago today, I, along with hundreds of my colleagues in Congress, nearly died in the insurrection at the United States Capitol. This occurred just days after I was sworn in as the Representative for New York’s 17th Congressional District, covering parts of the Lower Hudson Valley. I was so excited to get to work, especially on behalf of a community that had elevated me from poverty all the way to the U.S. House. Readers will recall that as bad as the crises we face in America are today, they were much worse in early January of 2021. I entered Congress focused on crushing the COVID-19 pandemic, delivering hundreds of millions of dollars to my district, and getting our economy back on track. While I accomplished those things and more, January 6th shaped my time in Congress and altered the course of American history. It also clarified the stakes for the future of our democracy. I will never forget how quickly the events of that day unfolded. How, from my vantage point seated on the House floor as the youngest member of Congressional leadership, Speaker Pelosi was whisked away by security before the rest of us in the chamber went into lockdown, only a handful of guards in the entire room to protect us from the hundreds of terrorists who had breached the Capitol complex and were roaming the halls searching for us—many of them armed with deadly weapons. I was prepared to fight alongside my colleagues Ruben Gallego of Arizona, a former Marine, and Colin Allred of Texas, who had been a linebacker in the NFL. But I also thought we would likely die. It was the first time I recalled feeling that way about a particular moment in my life. The mob eventually found us, as evidenced by the loud banging on the locked doors behind me and the photos of security officials with guns drawn that later leaked to the press. Due to the creative thinking, and bravery, of the guards who barricaded what is known as the Speaker’s Hallway with a pile of wooden chairs, we were able to escape through underground tunnels to a more secure location. Our lives were saved—just in the nick of time. I am writing this because our democracy is in crisis, and I fear too many Americans have forgotten what January 6th means about this new era in American politics and what the Republican Party has become in recent years. It is well established that then-President Donald Trump incited the violent mob that stormed the Capitol, looking to hang Vice President Mike Pence and assassinate members of Congress in an effort to overturn the free and fair 2020 presidential election that Joe Biden clearly won. Nevertheless, two-thirds of my House Republican colleagues voted to overturn that election just hours after nearly dying alongside me, afraid to stand up to the leader of their party. Now, Donald Trump, twice impeached and indicted in four different jurisdictions with 91 felony charges against him, will almost certainly become the GOP’s nominee for President again. And he is more dangerous, and emboldened, than ever. He has pledged to pardon the insurrectionists who nearly took my life on January 6th, stack the FBI and Department of Justice with partisan hacks who will pursue baseless investigations into his opponents, and even jail his political enemies. In recent weeks, Trump has quoted from Nazi leader Adolf Hitler, calling his political adversaries “vermin” and claiming that immigrants are “poisoning the blood of our country.” He has stated that if he returns to the White House, he intends to be a dictator on Day One. Overwhelmingly, Trump’s former cabinet officials and White House advisors have sounded the alarm, pleading with America to believe him when he says he will do these destructive things—and much more. Several have expressed skepticism that our democracy can survive another four years of Donald Trump as President. As someone who narrowly survived January 6th, who voted for the second impeachment of Donald Trump, who has spent a lot of time crafting legislation to strengthen our democracy, and who knows what it’s like to actually serve with Republicans in Congress, I, too, worry our democracy cannot withstand another Trump presidency. And while it would be foolish for me to try to predict whether Donald Trump will defeat President Biden this November and return to 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, I know that what we do here in the Lower Hudson Valley matters. We will need a Democratic Congress that will fight like hell to keep Donald Trump in check, and that means defeating freshman Republican Congressman Mike Lawler, who currently occupies the seat I used to hold representing the 17th Congressional District. I know we can still defeat fascism in this country, much like we did when we rejected Donald Trump and his enablers in Congress in the 2020 election. But only if we recognize that we are not yet out of the wilderness, and that this, too, will be the most important election of our lifetimes. Mondaire Jones represented New York's 17th Congressional District from 2021 to 2023. He is again seeking the seat this year, running as a Democrat. | Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He’s ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he’s doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. = = = PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591

name: Ritchie Torres
subject: The lasting legacy of January 6
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
|
---
Peter,

Today marks three years since a violent mob of insurrectionists, fueled by President Trump’s lies and conspiracies, stormed the United States Capitol.

It was my third day as a Congressman, and a truly terrifying and devastating day that I will never forget.

This dangerous siege was an organized and targeted attack orchestrated by our American democracy’s greatest enemy – the far right.

And now two years later, the perpetrators of the insurrection have yet to be held fully accountable.

**We are living in a terrifying time when political violence has become a new normal — the legacy of January 6.**

So as we mourn the lives that were lost and reflect on this dark day, let this time also be a call to action to stop and condemn these repeated attacks on our democracy.

_Ritchie_
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Shamaine Daniels
subject: Do you remember January 5th?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Daniels For Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Dear Friend
Most Americans learned about Rep. Scott Perry and his participation in the January 6th insurrection during the January 6th Committee hearing conducted during the summer of 2022. But for those of us in the District, not only were we aware of his ineffectiveness as a Representative, we had already begun experiencing his violent side months earlier.
Starting on November 5th, 2020 when he and Rep. Jim Jordan from Ohio came to our Capitol steps to try to stop the counting of our votes, seeing Scott Perry anywhere near the PA Capitol was never good news.
Once we welcomed 2021, there were rumblings that Scott Perry would be escalating his efforts to help Donad Trump overturn the election. With a little over a month until I was due to deliver my daughter, I was very pregnant when we started to get news that there were bad actors coming into the City.
As an elected official, I had insight into what we were expecting while also reassuring Harrisburg residents that we could manage what was coming. Our City police, State Police and Capitol Police did amazing work making sure that we did. As tensions mounted, my blood pressure had risen to such a point that my doctors asked me to consider inducing labor right away. I asked them to wait for the protests to come to an end before we made the call about whether I was truly developing preeclampsia or whether the stress of keeping my constituents safe was elevating my blood pressure.
Before there was January 6th, there was the January 5th “hear us roar” rally in Harrisburg, a hell for residents and leaders in the District alike. Rioters shootings guns into the air , Confederate flags speeding through residential City streets, and the harassment of service workers were all a part of the show orchestrated by Perry and Jordan as the rioters terrorized PA-10 before continuing south to D.C.for the main event.
On January 6th, dictators around the world would mock American Democracy insisting that we did not in fact have one, or that whatever we did have was in no way more legitimate than what they had. On this January 5th please remember those of us in PA10 who experienced first hand the chaos and violence meted out by unscrupulous and self-serving individuals who claim to be leaders in our community and our country.
Alternate text [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99379/images/I%20like%20this%20one.jpg] A few days after January 6th my vitals would go back to normal, and I would soon deliver that precocious little girl many of you have come to love. The January 6th insurrection shook this country and this world, the events of January 5th highlighted how little Scott Perry cared about the safety of his own constituents, much less their votes.
In 2024 you get to choose between sending Scott Perry back to Congress or supporting the woman who has been standing up to him. I believe I know which one you choose, and that’s why I’m asking you to make a contribution to our campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
- Shamaine
Donate Now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Paid for by Daniels For Congress
Daniels For Congress
2018 North 3rd Street
Harrisburg, PA 17102
United States

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Three years ago, on this day, our country barely survived an insurrection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
|
---
Peter —

Few days in our country’s history have made as big of an impact on me, and on our democracy as January 6, 2021.

I remember the January 6th attack on the Capitol like it was yesterday.

The sounds of yelling. Of insurrectionists storming the Capitol building and breaking doors and windows to get in. Of the whispers between members of Congress deciding how to protect ourselves.

The sight of Capitol police officers running toward danger. Of my colleagues crouched on the floor, clutching masks to protect themselves from tear gas. Of thousands of protestors assaulting Capitol Police and desecrating the hallowed halls of Congress.

You could sense the fear and the urgency. And the anger over what this mob was doing to overturn a free and fair election. And then, finally, once the fighting was over and we had fulfilled our duty to certify the election, the recognition that our democracy had survived, but barely.

**Peter, I will remember that day for a long time. But I will also remember what my GOP colleagues in Congress did.**

After the rioting and the mayhem, a majority of Republican members still voted to overturn the election. Still. 147 members of Congress — many of whom are still in office today.

_Insurrectionists, too. Albeit in suits and ties._

Since that day, we have seen nothing but continued threats to our Constitution and our democracy — by way of election deniers running for office, and members of Congress continuing to support Donald Trump, vowing to pardon him and try to erase history.

Our democracy was battered and bruised on January 6, 2021, and it has not yet recovered. **The number of Republicans who believe the election was stolen has been increasing since January 6, and that has only emboldened Trump and his MAGA followers even more.**

It’s going to take hard work by everyone to move this country forward and finally relegate Trump to the dustbin of history. But we will. We must be a country that can have political disagreements without resorting to violence and insurrection.

[If you agree that we must take action now to preserve and protect our democracy for future generations, then I am respectfully asking you to add a split contribution of $15 between Defeat Republicans and my U.S. Senate campaign today to help me continue this important work. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76621727/447969639/1748686045?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240106_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxMGQ4MzQzLWQwYWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Pv0XSlhBD3p80GxGMRsX5kFWpB-c3m85F5NVBkTvlSI=)

clean_body: | Peter — Few days in our country’s history have made as big of an impact on me, and on our democracy as January 6, 2021. I remember the January 6th attack on the Capitol like it was yesterday. The sounds of yelling. Of insurrectionists storming the Capitol building and breaking doors and windows to get in. Of the whispers between members of Congress deciding how to protect ourselves. The sight of Capitol police officers running toward danger. Of my colleagues crouched on the floor, clutching masks to protect themselves from tear gas. Of thousands of protestors assaulting Capitol Police and desecrating the hallowed halls of Congress. You could sense the fear and the urgency. And the anger over what this mob was doing to overturn a free and fair election. And then, finally, once the fighting was over and we had fulfilled our duty to certify the election, the recognition that our democracy had survived, but barely. Peter, I will remember that day for a long time. But I will also remember what my GOP colleagues in Congress did. After the rioting and the mayhem, a majority of Republican members still voted to overturn the election. Still. 147 members of Congress — many of whom are still in office today. Insurrectionists, too. Albeit in suits and ties. Since that day, we have seen nothing but continued threats to our Constitution and our democracy — by way of election deniers running for office, and members of Congress continuing to support Donald Trump, vowing to pardon him and try to erase history. Our democracy was battered and bruised on January 6, 2021, and it has not yet recovered. The number of Republicans who believe the election was stolen has been increasing since January 6, and that has only emboldened Trump and his MAGA followers even more. It’s going to take hard work by everyone to move this country forward and finally relegate Trump to the dustbin of history. But we will. We must be a country that can have political disagreements without resorting to violence and insurrection. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. | = = = = = We will get through this difficult time in our history. America is a deeply resilient country filled with patriotic citizens who love our democracy, and those who do, vastly outnumber those trying to tear it down. Please take care of yourselves, and thank you for all your support during this pivotal time in our history. — Adam Defeat Republicans | Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www.DefeatRepublicans.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Fellow American,

It’s been over two weeks since Colorado tried removing President Trump from the primary ballot.

_**Now,**_ Maine’s Secretary of State has singularly decided to remove him from the primary as well.

**We’re living in unprecedented times and seeing unprecedented action from one party.** If our candidates are being arbitrarily removed from the ballot by the opposition party, then this is not a legitimate process and we should not treat it like one.

It is deeply unconstitutional and wrong for one individual Secretary of State or state Supreme Court, without any trial or procedure or anything else, just to decide and wake up one day Donald Trump’s not on the ballot. That’s wrong and dangerous.

[**I have pledged to withdraw from the Colorado and Maine GOP primary unless Trump is also allowed to be on the state’s ballot.**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=e340ce23dede4e8e92849ea6e9950c98&_e=9zW0JvBMqf-mKl6TW6gw9s-ml7u4MZNoVt7nF_l3Xt04GC_dBU6wZtLunFE4bTHk2W51N3lLsLPhNz6Qh3sUNxqd0bmX6oFYn2vjJyLeUhJaEGUXMa8yYp05cv3W9bIN8dX97y_7qAjy0OvWJ3bh903U5PlGntAQpxtwDlLLwfCIe9xIPD2zLBruOSkTGvo_sdSJ8i2w-t-b_3ERi0tNhmDnKUm-LfYev37zL0dLd5XsOF1wBzDnlms3EAJgDJpAyeq0jZLoHq3Hm--Q4rQZjiOwfBxH8aJ2ggjz4-BFmcRtiA9IfQwxDS9MVzkQ21S7OZOcNqAQIpc9jnP7i7h0hLJ_0kwa7AhaGfzyGkBhoSaQ6FhlgXPd9KFNlbYbD1msbG7LFQj-H1dN6qv4j4OjUQ%3D%3D)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Jane Fonda Climate PAC
subject: Mythbusters 👊
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Let’s set the record straight.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76621972/447970497/2105508926?refcode=ea.78812a5c-d2ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.78812a5c-d2ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4ODEyYTVjLWQyYWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jroXujclED2SY_ijscBZKTvLb0EfHFn5yZFJrtR6QjQ=)
---
| Hi there,

Trying to figure out what's true about climate change, especially with all the stories spread by big oil companies, can be tricky. We get it.

body:
Friend, Biden is maligning us as "dangerous" to our birthright nation while he overthrows the Border. Help me bring back calm and stability. | | | |

| | |
---
|
## Biden Speech 'Dangerous':

Famous Democrat Scholar Says Biden's Attacks on Republicans Could 'Destroy American Democracy.'
Yesterday, Joe Biden announced his candidacy for president saying "this is deadly serious.." ["...Republicans" and "Trump's candidacy"](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=09bdfcdacc&e=5bb5efcda7) (his opponent) are a "threat to American democracy" and that he pledges to "defend American democracy" from them both. Democrat constitutional attorney Professor Jonathan Turley [denounced this "theory" as the real threat to democracy](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=ae188aaecf&e=5bb5efcda7).
---
|
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TO HELP DAN COX COUNTER THE LEFT'S ATTACK ON REPUBLICANS AND WIN >>](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=2c15635e01&e=5bb5efcda7 "CONTRIBUTE TO HELP DAN COX COUNTER THE LEFT'S ATTACK ON REPUBLICANS AND WIN >>")
---
| Friend of America, You and I are "extremists who threaten democracy?" Biden once again channels dictators and extremist autocrats in his rhetoric towards Republicans, conservative Democrats and Independent Americans.

As he is badly losing public support including minorities (see [Hispanics disapprove of his Border policy](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=d5d1e167cf&e=5bb5efcda7)!), that's what bumbling, lying Biden [is saying to the world](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=8a0952bd2b&e=5bb5efcda7).

Yet, not a word from Biden for our country's real needs, like:
>> extremely burdensome housing, food and electricity costs because of the Left's anti-freedom policies.
>> extremely outrageous overthrow of the Border and our law.
>> extreme and rising taxation.

All this while the Bidens have [been exposed for receiving over $20 million from Ukraine,](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=b550cb627d&e=5bb5efcda7) Russia and other nations during his Vice Presidency under Obama!

No other world leader in such a position of democratic power has said the same towards their opponents in an election. But there are insane and evil dictators who speak like this. Consider:

>>[Communist Xi:](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=eeda5bec29&e=5bb5efcda7) "those [Chinese citizens such as Uyghurs] deemed terrorists and extremists are dealt with in a “precise” and “in-depth” manner" because of their "problematic ideas."

>>[Iranian Foreign Minister Zarif](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=ca068f1bac&e=5bb5efcda7): "U.S. hostility has led it to support dictators, butchers & extremists, who've only brought ruin to our region."

>>[North Korean Kim Jong-un](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=f6d8f78a9a&e=5bb5efcda7): "US extreme imperialist ideology" and South Korean president has a "trash-like brain."

Biden's words smack more of an announcement of his own planned continued tyranny against our fellow Americans, rather than a democratic election.

The remedy for our rights here in Maryland is to send me, a conservative, experienced fighter, to Congress to stand in the gap for our families and freedom. I have unified Maryland on issues such as fighting Child and Human Sex Trafficking and fixing the Maryland Code and Regulations to reduce the administrative state's ever-expansive power, passing my bills unanimously. While the deep-state messages lies that only their candidates with no experience in the public Arena can win in November, _**those are the voices of surrender**_ and appeasement. Those are the lies that are shown false by our majority in Congress today and by such patriots as Jim Jordan, Scott Perry, Rand Paul, Josh Hawley, Matt Gaetz and so many others who actually hold the deep state accountable. Remember, it's the deep state's candidates who support sending our children to die in foreign wars and the adding of states to our Union to cause a permanent Democrat majority in Congress. But that's not me.

I pledge to continue to hold the out-of-control deep state accountable while working for common sense solutions to lower taxes and inflation, expand jobs and stop the Border overthrow.

Don't let the RINOs and extremist Left out raise and out spend me in this election. This is your seat in Congress. This is how we fight tyranny under the Constitution. [Send me](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=80c2d439a6&e=5bb5efcda7). Thank you again for your help.
Freedom and victory,

Dan Cox

Biden's words smack more of an announcement of his own planned continued tyranny against our fellow Americans, rather than a democratic election. The remedy for our rights here in Maryland is to send me, a conservative, experienced fighter, to Congress to stand in the gap for our families and freedom. I have unified Maryland on issues such as fighting Child and Human Sex Trafficking and fixing the Maryland Code and Regulations to reduce the administrative state's ever-expansive power, passing my bills unanimously. While the deep-state messages lies that only their candidates with no experience in the public Arena can win in November, those are the voices of surrender and appeasement. Those are the lies that are shown false by our majority in Congress today and by such patriots as Jim Jordan, Scott Perry, Rand Paul, Josh Hawley, Matt Gaetz and so many others who actually hold the deep state accountable. Remember, it's the deep state's candidates who support sending our children to die in foreign wars and the adding of states to our Union to cause a permanent Democrat majority in Congress. But that's not me. I pledge to continue to hold the out-of-control deep state accountable while working for common sense solutions to lower taxes and inflation, expand jobs and stop the Border overthrow. Don't let the RINOs and extremist Left out raise and out spend me in this election. This is your seat in Congress. This is how we fight tyranny under the Constitution. . body:
[1]Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42312?refcode=em20240106-4548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=4548%2E614464%2Eolkpc1 ]Screengrab from Lucas Kunce's new ad: Skittering Josh Hawley.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42312?refcode=em20240106-4548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=4548%2E614464%2Eolkpc1 ]Watch our brand new ad holding Hawley accountable for his infamous
cowardice on January 6, 2021, then please rush a donation of any amount
toward our campaign so we can get this ad in front of Missouri voters »

Peter
— skittering out of the U.S. Capitol on
January 6 was hardly the first time we’ve seen Josh Hawley run away from
his duty to our country. Let me explain:

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42312?refcode=em20240106-4548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=4548%2E614464%2Eolkpc1 ]CHIP IN TO BEAT HAWLEY →

With the freedom to control our own lives and bodies under attack, Josh
Hawley has turned his Senate office into a family business dedicated to
corrupting our courts and criminalizing abortion nationwide.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42312?refcode=em20240106-4548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=4548%2E614464%2Eolkpc1 ]Excerpt from LifeSite: 'I would support any restriction on abortion...
And I would vigorously defend such laws in court, all the way to the
Supreme Court, if necessary.' - Josh Hawley. Vanity Fair headline: Erin
Morrow Hawley is leading the charge to ban abortion medication. She's also
Josh Hawley's wife. Federal judge overseeing the lawsuit made a past
donation to Josh Hawley's campaign. Fox News headline: Missouri
Republicans propose legislation to allow women who receive abortions to be
charged with murder.

When veterans like me who were exposed to toxic burn pits were counting on
Hawley to vote for the healthcare we’ve earned, he played politics.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42312?refcode=em20240106-4548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=4548%2E614464%2Eolkpc1 ]Yahoo News headline: Blunt, Hawley vote to stall bill expanding health
care for veterans exposed to burn pits. Fox News op-ed written by Lucas
Kunce: I was exposed to toxic burn pits in Iraq; Republicans turned their
backs on veterans like me.

And when Missouri’s working families and everyday communities were getting
gutted by outsourcing and corporate consolidation, Josh helped Wall Street
and Corporate America cut overtime pay for hundreds of thousands of
Missouri workers.

Now, Missourians are taking notice. They don’t like what they’ve seen from
Hawley. Even Donald Trump knows Josh is in trouble.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42312?refcode=em20240106-4548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=4548%2E614464%2Eolkpc1 ]Newsweek headline: Trump warns... Hawley may be in trouble. Excerpt
from Spectrum News article: A recent Morning Consult poll found Hawley was
the least popular Republican senator up for reelection... Former Missouri
secretary of state Jason Kander argued in a Kansas City Star op-ed this
week: 'Hawley is vulnerable, and he knows it.'

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42312?refcode=em20240106-4548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1007&akid=4548%2E614464%2Eolkpc1 ]CHIP IN TO BEAT HAWLEY →

Our state deserves a U.S. Senator who we can trust will stand up and fight
for working people, not for himself. That’s why I’m running against Hawley
this year — and it’s why our record-breaking, worker-led, and
people-powered movement has already made this a margin-of-error race in
multiple public polls.

I want to be a warrior for working people in the U.S. Senate, but I need
your help to make it happen,
Peter: [ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42312?refcode=em20240106-4548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1008&akid=4548%2E614464%2Eolkpc1 ]will you chip in $10 or
whatever you can toward my grassroots campaign today so we can defeat Josh
Hawley in November and take this Senate seat back for everyday
Missourians?

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your
contribution instantly:

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42330?refcode=em20240106-4548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=1009&akid=4548%2E614464%2Eolkpc1 ]Contribute $10

Over the last year, we’ve built a record-breaking grassroots movement to
defeat Josh Hawley and take this U.S. Senate seat back for Missouri’s
working families.

We’ve united organized labor behind our campaign. We’ve held events with
hundreds of supporters at a time across rural, urban, and suburban
Missouri. And we’ve raised more in the first year of a U.S. Senate race
than any other challenger has in Missouri history, with donations coming
from every single Missouri county — and without a cent from corporate
PACs.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42312?refcode=em20240106-4548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1016&akid=4548%2E614464%2Eolkpc1 ]Headline from the Labor Tribune: Missouri Fire Fighters endorse Lucas
Kunce. Excerpt: In the past, the Missouri State Council of Fire Fighters
has endorsed [Republican] Senators... This cycle, they have endorsed Lucas
Kunce for Senate [which] speaks to his unique ability to earn the votes of
independents and split-ticket voters. TIME Magazine headline: Lucas Kunce,
A clean-cut, populist Marine vet who could give Democrats a fighting
chance in Missouri.

Now we’re once again seeing Josh Hawley run scared.

Multiple polls show this race already within the margin of error. And on
top of that, a new poll from Morning Consult just weeks ago found Josh
Hawley has the lowest approval rating of any GOP U.S. Senator running for
re-election in 2024 — even worse than Ted Cruz in Texas and Rick Scott in
Florida.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42312?refcode=em20240106-4548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1017&akid=4548%2E614464%2Eolkpc1 ]St. Louis Post-Dispatch headline: New poll touts Lucas Kunce's chance
of upsetting Josh Hawley. Poll 1: Lucas Kunce 43%, Josh Hawley 44%, Margin
of Error +/- 3% | Poll 2: Lucas Kunce 42%, Josh Hawley 46%, Margin of
Error +/- 4.9%

This is our only chance to hold Hawley accountable — and it could be your
opportunity to make a real difference in this year’s election. [ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42312?refcode=em20240106-4548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1018&akid=4548%2E614464%2Eolkpc1 ]So
please, will you join our movement to flip
Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat by adding a donation of $10 or
whatever you think is best toward my campaign today? I’m not taking a cent
from corporate PACs in this race, so I mean it when I say anything you can
give will make a big impact.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your
contribution instantly:

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42330?refcode=em20240106-4548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=1019&akid=4548%2E614464%2Eolkpc1 ]Contribute $10

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42312?refcode=em20240106-4548&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=4548%2E614464%2Eolkpc1 ]Give another amount

Thank you so much,

Lucas Kunce

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1026&akid=4548%2E614464%2Eolkpc1

body:
Do you remember where you were on January 6? | | |
---
Do you remember where you were on January 6, 2021? It was a scary day for America. We saw horrific images of _violence and the desecration_ of one of our most sacred institutions. Do you remember where Donald Trump was? (Watching the deadly attacks unfold in the White House dining room and refusing to act.) [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZZCWz56ozW7N2gkK1r7t9ZMWF622F7UF5xeAAdCqM2KH7kppdkOPRjo6eZU5rB8qbomw-L_tucgLHhLM-qUviysICvF7S0eok86U1ZQ_NSxwDuTj8HB8jhphc-wfXgSNteXN8hHpkh38y0yqzCwcLfIjsSoyK0tgWH_j1kDm9hs7VgX24qqwlFpnFQHKN2v6Ho_4maN2MxVbuv8ZUJuNaFRFIsx_R9dMWtvKVx6oNyw7rEQ7px8l42kTY5Vhv9Dl9TAlcv_E_AK56nvKby-T8RvtcHeQcI_74pIeZ0rT9m_h2QhJO4rwLb6bziaOODKNmq71OA9ORDTD2MLmHvbMCdoxx1bPWggXszQTcat-w-aYWsen3tbfN9JPxvmECUj5JDHO7XYJpmPb4iXHp-wK9QryTIjFu8WFwEFpk-3obyqAhtQy3oS_BRhQHVy1-snq0qvGc2Mb2UWETDYgRrUt2UHc2Tt6plitbRdhDotog9HHB6jJOeosLxLYyKtK0POTAb4nyfBHbcEB0Oiu2K7kSN9DJkGjE8YB3iEweT6aWlcX1jjqAsWwWKhaMeh1D-zj5/42r/xzWzg_DBQR6jD-cknXVupg/h0/Cl7s_u3SBs4EZQB-RovuPYEZVf86z0CaW26l5Gsndqg) Trump’s actions on January 6 demonstrate that he is unfit for office plain and simple. President Biden and Vice President Harris believe in protecting our democratic institutions and free and fair elections. To strengthen our country, heal the divide, and give the American people peace of mind, we must secure four more years for Joe and Kamala in the White House. [So what do you say, Peter? name: Ambassador Susan E. Rice
subject: Andy was there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
I want to tell you a story about January 6, and it’s part of the reason why I’m supporting Andy Kim’s campaign for Senate.
|
---
| | I want to tell you a story about January 6, and it's part of the reason why I'm supporting Andy Kim's campaign for Senate. When our democracy was attacked on January 6, Andy was there picking up the trash left by Trump's mob. We've all seen the photo by now, but it's still powerful to this day. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76622075/447971058/-1197072038?refcode=2024-01-06-riceb&recurring=&amount=16&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=0e51d78c-d6ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTUxZDc4Yy1kNmFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vgj2O-uTAtfO8gnQJRXE9Ic7Kn8yEMIXAeJW7dxY5Cw=) Andy didn't pose for the camera. He got to work, put his hands on the floor, and sorted through the debris to fix the mess.**That's what Andy does best.** I was proud to work with Andy for two years at the White House when I was President Obama's National Security Advisor. I saw him serve our nation through incredibly difficult and stressful crises. Through those tough times, I also saw what his character is made of. When he sees something wrong — he rolls up his sleeves and works to fix it. Andy's in the race to be New Jersey's next Senator because we need to restore integrity to our politics and public service. **Years after the events of January 6, our democracy is still on the brink, and that's why Andy is running for Senate.** He's running to bring back trust in our democratic institutions. New Jerseyans deserve representatives who are committed to service, unity, and being caretakers for our democracy. clean_body: I want to tell you a story about January 6, and it’s part of the reason why I’m supporting Andy Kim’s campaign for Senate. | | | I want to tell you a story about January 6, and it's part of the reason why I'm supporting Andy Kim's campaign for Senate. When our democracy was attacked on January 6, Andy was there picking up the trash left by Trump's mob. We've all seen the photo by now, but it's still powerful to this day. = Andy didn't pose for the camera. He got to work, put his hands on the floor, and sorted through the debris to fix the mess.That's what Andy does best. I was proud to work with Andy for two years at the White House when I was President Obama's National Security Advisor. I saw him serve our nation through incredibly difficult and stressful crises. Through those tough times, I also saw what his character is made of. When he sees something wrong — he rolls up his sleeves and works to fix it. Andy's in the race to be New Jersey's next Senator because we need to restore integrity to our politics and public service. Years after the events of January 6, our democracy is still on the brink, and that's why Andy is running for Senate. He's running to bring back trust in our democratic institutions. New Jerseyans deserve representatives who are committed to service, unity, and being caretakers for our democracy. = = Thank you, Ambassador Susan E. Did you know that the ultra-rich can write off private planes and megayachts on their taxes.
Meanwhile, a public school teacher can only write-off $300 in school supplies, as they are buying things they need to teach our children.
[](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=38d6165353&e=b8ba94fd9b)

[**If you agree that there’s a better way, kick in $20.24 or more today and let’s build a better system that centers working families over the uber-rich.**](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=482a46582d&e=b8ba94fd9b)

name: Ron Wyden
subject: We can’t forget
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76622099/447971121/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjUxZDc4Yy1kNmFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0g0Fm9tb0enr1YFjCe4HP4UtD3Cfa_uDqJ01fxdo7T4=&emci=d5e933bd-c3ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=0b51d78c-d6ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Today marks the anniversary of the January 6th, 2021 attacks on the Capitol Building in Washington, D.C. – three years since insurrectionists stormed Congress with the explicit goal of preventing the certification of a free and fair election and seizing power by force for Donald Trump. **The Republican party – still under Trump's spell today – would sooner forget that this happened.** In the three years since this attack on our democracy, the Republican Establishment has gone from (briefly) sharing our deep anger and sadness that such an event could transpire on American soil, to making excuses for and even defending the insurrectionists. Let me be clear: there is nothing acceptable about what happened that day. The January 6th attacks were a direct affront to the values and ideas enshrined in our constitution and directly caused by the Republican Party's coddling and encouragement of anti-democracy extremists. Even though nearly 1,200 people have been prosecuted for their participation in the attacks, **the threat still remains**. Donald Trump is still giving speeches and holding rallies in which he fantasizes about "being a dictator on day one" and his supporters are as zealous as ever. On this somber occasion, it is vital that we remember exactly what is at stake in the upcoming election: our democracy. Our elections are the lifeblood of our democracy, and we cannot allow them to be mired in partisan gamesmanship. We are going to redouble our efforts in Congress to pass legislation that strengthens our democracy and ensures our elections remain free and fair. In the meantime, we have to organize hard, win in 2024, and hold Republicans accountable for their obstruction and extremism at the ballot box and beyond. Onward, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: | | | | Today marks the anniversary of the January 6th, 2021 attacks on the Capitol Building in Washington, D.C. – three years since insurrectionists stormed Congress with the explicit goal of preventing the certification of a free and fair election and seizing power by force for Donald Trump. The Republican party – still under Trump's spell today – would sooner forget that this happened. In the three years since this attack on our democracy, the Republican Establishment has gone from (briefly) sharing our deep anger and sadness that such an event could transpire on American soil, to making excuses for and even defending the insurrectionists. Let me be clear: there is nothing acceptable about what happened that day. The January 6th attacks were a direct affront to the values and ideas enshrined in our constitution and directly caused by the Republican Party's coddling and encouragement of anti-democracy extremists. Even though nearly 1,200 people have been prosecuted for their participation in the attacks, the threat still remains. Donald Trump is still giving speeches and holding rallies in which he fantasizes about "being a dictator on day one" and his supporters are as zealous as ever. On this somber occasion, it is vital that we remember exactly what is at stake in the upcoming election: our democracy. Our elections are the lifeblood of our democracy, and we cannot allow them to be mired in partisan gamesmanship. We are going to redouble our efforts in Congress to pass legislation that strengthens our democracy and ensures our elections remain free and fair. In the meantime, we have to organize hard, win in 2024, and hold Republicans accountable for their obstruction and extremism at the ballot box and beyond. body:
| | Peter — I’m running for Congress to defend our democracy from extremists determined to destroy it. Freedom isn’t free and we must work to preserve it. **The violent insurrection on January 6, 2021, is proof of that.**

As a democracy, our country's free and fair elections are the collective voices of the American people. As an Air Force officer, I took an oath to support and defend the Constitution from all enemies, foreign and domestic.

We need bold leaders in Congress working to empower voters and preserve our democracy for future generations. I’m committed to serve in Congress to honor and defend the ideals we value as Americans — but getting there requires the focused determination of all of us.

Stand with me to protect our democracy. name: Officer Harry Dunn (ret.)
subject: I'm running to defend democracy, just like I did on January 6
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dunn.SH4loA&refcode=em240106-4-30&refcode2=1655.734936.fyhJFk&t=1&akid=1655%2E734936%2EfyhJFk)
---
Hey Peter, it's Harry Dunn here, one of the Capitol police officers who defended the U.S. Capitol against MAGA insurrectionists just three years ago and testified in front of the January 6th Committee.
I've got an important announcement: **I'm hoping to make my return to DC – but not as a Capitol police officer. I'm officially running to serve Maryland's 3rd Congressional district in the U.S. House.**
[**I’m counting on your support to get there. Can you split $10 or more between me and Ruben Gallego to become a Founding Donor of my campaign?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dunn.SH4loA&refcode=em240106-4-30&t=2&akid=1655%2E734936%2EfyhJFk)
[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR: CHIP IN $10 >>](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dunn.SH4loA&refcode=em240106-4-30&t=3&akid=1655%2E734936%2EfyhJFk)
Here’s the thing Peter, I never thought I would run for office. Growing up, I wanted to be just like my dad, who was an athlete and a U.S. Air Force Veteran. I played football and earned an athletic scholarship that sent me to college. (_I was pretty good, but being 6-foot-7 sure didn’t hurt!_)
But wearing a football uniform taught me something special: it gave me purpose and made me feel a part of something bigger than myself.
So when I put on my Capitol police uniform for the first time over 15 years ago to protect our nation’s Capitol, _it felt right_.
But I never thought I’d see the day that our democracy would be attacked by Donald Trump and an army of insurrectionists that HE directed to the Capitol.
I couldn't have been any closer to the chaos of January 6. I put my life on the line during the violence and destruction that Trump encouraged. So trust and believe when I tell you: **we cannot allow our democracy to be in the hands of these MAGA-extremists.**
I fought for our democracy and our Capitol once as Officer Dunn, and I'll do it again as Congressman Dunn.
[**Please, can you split $10 or $25 between my campaign and Ruben Gallego's to become a Founding Donor of my campaign? I seriously appreciate any help you can give today >>**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dunn.SH4loA&refcode=em240106-4-30&t=4&akid=1655%2E734936%2EfyhJFk)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

**Their attacks are not only getting more creative, but they’re also getting more expensive as well. Our goal is to raise $5,000 so we can respond ASAP.**
[_**These attacks have already been running since Christmas, so we have to act quickly. Can we count on you to donate to our rapid response fund right now to fight back against this latest smear campaign against Josh?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76622468/447972500/753479076?&refcode=E5862-20241005-HolidayAttacks-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmY5NzAxODktZDhhYy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ruHJrc38H5Vx5jlIx-NdJd9H6O8HI0DjhbIvAx9COjw=)
\- Team Harder
