name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Another one bites the dust
body:
This is a step in the right direction but more work needs to be done
| **Two Down. One To Go.**
---
| [ ](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3b0cb5c13e9c490f871a2e8e6b076dd8&_e=JTgdS8WU1Vp7whQaywxlhU1dMymRP2okd-rwc7X4Kv4MxPVuMQZQqS8jV1PfSmALZfkFva7Soxnw8pu4zaQaX-2yYezQKzbqou4N1bUkgZjPs62dFNhk1atqzQBtLBWXmxERrtpsoFHh4QOpaVn__zRHAp9cRfi7qLzwth__FaT7NXfBjwVEVHk8-g95FLwHQo7dRcS0NfF7-fqzJiReoj49DYs2h8vrEt66E6YWChWVV7YC-1txTPKmGzVr5zP_hGVDXMjBcvc4Bq6Gi6jydctZreanwQOHDjpGBvX1ftsMd1jNa07j6XHSXtOgE-YCBLTJ8i1IoFAWXvyN5n_IYQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American, The removal of Havard's morally bankrupt president was long overdue. Claudine Gay's blatantly antisemitic remarks and ongoing plagiarism scandal are a stain on our nation's institutions of higher education. This is without a doubt a step in the right direction but more work must be done. Last month, when I questioned the woke university presidents of Penn, Harvard, and MIT about rising antisemitism on their campuses, all three of them refused to answer if calls on their campuses for the GENOCIDE of Jews constituted harrasment or even a violation of their schools' codes of conduct. _When I confronted them further about their morally depraved answers the best response they could give me was to say "It depends on the context"._ Fellow American, you and I both know that it does not depend on context. Calling for the Genocide of Jews on these campuses is without a doubt an act of harassment against their school's Jewish students and most definitely violates the standards for student conduct each one of these universities have created. The right answer is obvious, but it became clear as I was questioning them that all three women were completely unwilling to contradict the woke ideology of intersectionality and terrified to express views not completely in line with the Radical Leftists that have taken hold of their institutions. These acts of cowardice are why the resignation of all three university presidents is necessary! After a public pressure campaign led by me and those who share our resolve, Penn and Harvard finally did the right thing by forcing Liz Magill and Claudine Gay to resign. **But to this day the President of MIT has yet to be removed.** That is simply unacceptable. [**That 's why I am demanding the resignation of MIT President Sally Kornbluth****.**](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3b0cb5c13e9c490f871a2e8e6b076dd8&_e=JTgdS8WU1Vp7whQaywxlhU1dMymRP2okd-rwc7X4Kv4MxPVuMQZQqS8jV1PfSmALZfkFva7Soxnw8pu4zaQaX-2yYezQKzbqou4N1bUkgZjPs62dFNhk1atqzQBtLBWXmxERrtpsoFHh4QOpaVn__zRHAp9cRfi7qLzwth__FaTs7Z1axyGj7KwUkIeR3Em9hB6rq0C4q3Pg31QXfzeXOHnE4T3WbGpk_YLS1iZUHcwxE_Pkyx49d_N_vg05TRFreUXS2mGA4hs-pjBC7EP-XXbr7dwWJOMPgLTy3_-MfmoXHdYPZkLcAaXO851E5NvaEQ1VoM04WAGINV_ZjouPYw%3D%3D)
| [ **SIGN HOUSE GOP PETITION** ](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3b0cb5c13e9c490f871a2e8e6b076dd8&_e=JTgdS8WU1Vp7whQaywxlhU1dMymRP2okd-rwc7X4Kv4MxPVuMQZQqS8jV1PfSmALZfkFva7Soxnw8pu4zaQaX-2yYezQKzbqou4N1bUkgZjPs62dFNhk1atqzQBtLBWXmxERrtpsoFHh4QOpaVn__zRHAp9cRfi7qLzwth__FaR3VHqib4J8bVzYnxdu4hlZ7YxXTe4isRNrW6oYtKepp72hpW8HFVHOKRmnnj3aYC08bXS7ExtSgUx2Y0aHIlVVWqnB5VeNgOqZIFCvKXyuPoqDIY3y0wzDIVk6euxAMMpMmCWJAMO76c63EhvkSIJm5DdmTkXeBNMbJWcUyIypuA%3D%3D)
---
Please add your name to the House GOP petition and stand with me at this moment. The fight to expose and clean up the rot in America's universities does not end here, and I am proud to lead the charge with patriots like you at my side. _Your fellow patriot,_ Elise M. Stefanik
House GOP Chairwoman
| [ ](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3b0cb5c13e9c490f871a2e8e6b076dd8&_e=JTgdS8WU1Vp7whQaywxlhU1dMymRP2okd-rwc7X4Kv4MxPVuMQZQqS8jV1PfSmALZfkFva7Soxnw8pu4zaQaX-2yYezQKzbqou4N1bUkgZjPs62dFNhk1atqzQBtLBWXmxERrtpsoFHh4QOpaVn__zRHAp9cRfi7qLzwth__FaQNL7_C2nPZZPUqC6Gf2PaLqSg9uSs-kXXnLK465IMdByNhUWq6LeggAbvMaHl55v_W07CcnUOchlygBfNLHDKxILLGida7dKp2UAcxHVSRZ3HTSSlvbx_p5YabcgS0A2SIg5RY_8z96CI_vVaeqraKosjzwu74ZdEvQkwA-grzzA%3D%3D)

body:
Protect Free Speech!

| [ ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=45d3a2450a3749d8a7e79087287de43c&_e=q24X3Q_O6sQElFrCC65Kr3pEgbl7Ymn513O1MUxnoGmS-tmDhuGXfVUvLZE3Y2DxY7qxRLkevbfEFCBeuesq4B5nDALkUVYBQMsWv_SQ8OUkTYdY0nnWMK4E2FhZAvNgQf7nfLKWkkon7HSbaCsBJIAWzq_Htb-yAG84M8LBPF0UKbY00VKAn-bLm_UJCgrpZmqrLZVdb-3-zbZwRD8Mbyia9VKaS7M8-4mk-6TpbnOobgDkpgIpFvVnCetSoXvgA2_kghh2tDBSXHjCrOLg65z4ga421pWS_R4G04FqqmLhMhfybjfg9-DLvOSD-_2lxzWq9IKXxiTVj2WGNhTEopO_MDfFZS7W8LSC15xjVLif06qRynD_tYVDgIbheFUjgO503miGvKauIwqhtZoUUg%3D%3D)
---
The Left is panicking.

They went after Free Speech by trying to cancel Elon Musk and his platform, X, and I don’t think they expected us to fight back like we have.

[**I put my money where my mouth is and am willing to stand up against cancel culture and protect Free Speech, are you?**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=45d3a2450a3749d8a7e79087287de43c&_e=q24X3Q_O6sQElFrCC65Kr3pEgbl7Ymn513O1MUxnoGmS-tmDhuGXfVUvLZE3Y2DxY7qxRLkevbfEFCBeuesq4B5nDALkUVYBQMsWv_SQ8OUkTYdY0nnWMK4E2FhZAvNgQf7nfLKWkkon7HSbaCsBJIAWzq_Htb-yAG84M8LBPF0UKbY00VKAn-bLm_UJCgrpZmqrLZVdb-3-zbZwRD8Mbyia9VKaS7M8-4mk-6TpbnNk2NkJ56ow3fxPN0hLakbmqYeI_9djp05MRJKPpGzs0d4bgGJavz9B965N8CCGp2WKuRjI_fnbIjbQdWley1nVjimJKfqf9rfmLbtjICitSBUh0aCI7MVGvXgLob27rpnx1sn5ekohoTcis4XQt5DV2QB8c5zoSBBi5k_NJABqpg%3D%3D)

I’ve launched an ad highlighting the unAmerican agenda the left has for America. The Left wants this ad off the air AS SOON AS POSSIBLE and is doing everything they can to ensure it comes down.

The truth is they don’t want this country to know the truth about their cancel-culture-first crusade against our fundamental American liberties. The First Amendment is NON-NEGOTIABLE.

I launched this new ad because the American people deserve to hear the truth, NOT what the media wants you to see.

X is one of America’s last bastions of free speech; my campaign will continue to advertise on the platform so we can end the tyranny of Big Tech and keep one of this country’s last open forums up and running. [**Unfortunately, my ad is running out of money, and I’m asking if you can help me.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=45d3a2450a3749d8a7e79087287de43c&_e=q24X3Q_O6sQElFrCC65Kr3pEgbl7Ymn513O1MUxnoGmS-tmDhuGXfVUvLZE3Y2DxY7qxRLkevbfEFCBeuesq4B5nDALkUVYBQMsWv_SQ8OUkTYdY0nnWMK4E2FhZAvNgQf7nfLKWkkon7HSbaCsBJIAWzq_Htb-yAG84M8LBPF0UKbY00VKAn-bLm_UJCgrpZmqrLZVdb-3-zbZwRD8Mbyia9VKaS7M8-4mk-6TpbnObLBLvgrk1M4gqpXuHQSF-GJ3EHX7LW2HyX7YGxFRCcxdaNdexLDpbxIl5cdwPWw7VUsBU3Y5uwYa-dB42RXwwh5izwliX9rP65YCpO7smxj3bKFTqnngaoxciOgWxUhqR7J3X3JfEuh8nEdXe0OoFw-9OKWzPhERECK3qm9-qdw%3D%3D)

| [**CHIP IN NOW** ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=45d3a2450a3749d8a7e79087287de43c&_e=q24X3Q_O6sQElFrCC65Kr3pEgbl7Ymn513O1MUxnoGmS-tmDhuGXfVUvLZE3Y2DxY7qxRLkevbfEFCBeuesq4B5nDALkUVYBQMsWv_SQ8OUkTYdY0nnWMK4E2FhZAvNgQf7nfLKWkkon7HSbaCsBJIAWzq_Htb-yAG84M8LBPF0UKbY00VKAn-bLm_UJCgrpZmqrLZVdb-3-zbZwRD8Mbyia9VKaS7M8-4mk-6TpbnOI9CB8BCW80Kh-TMVeOBMticWeOmR2RYVuaQvDvqGtZvat69lhFFprFNa_2xXGsraaUeY06kqH97Pmr5nBoxpldSGJQEH5mOlqwEUQsKnAGJr98c3BR--eg9-sYstSEwSSdPk-IvE3KlDMRys-klHy1ueeWAeFFnXCto8f0o048A%3D%3D)
---
[**KEEP OUR AD RUNNING** ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=45d3a2450a3749d8a7e79087287de43c&_e=q24X3Q_O6sQElFrCC65Kr3pEgbl7Ymn513O1MUxnoGmS-tmDhuGXfVUvLZE3Y2DxY7qxRLkevbfEFCBeuesq4B5nDALkUVYBQMsWv_SQ8OUkTYdY0nnWMK4E2FhZAvNgQf7nfLKWkkon7HSbaCsBJIAWzq_Htb-yAG84M8LBPF0UKbY00VKAn-bLm_UJCgrpZmqrLZVdb-3-zbZwRD8Mbyia9VKaS7M8-4mk-6TpbnNDqTxaja0KDUII-_gJ5X3eeH06MfRiiYMCsKWbZxf1Tw3qaRGUYiz1qd0rHpZNztvxdIVFw8fUKhaxT4MWJ6JB0FxPxbUxlhZA-X-8hS-WUwgC6tMFp48l-6gq5vszH43Sct2zrl6jhL7gR-_9vXxPNMMSd342K2kv6xZb5M0JcQ%3D%3D)
---

**My ad will run out of funding SOON, and if you could rush ANYTHING by midnight, we can keep it up so the American people KNOW CONSERVATIVES STAND WITH FREE SPEECH.**

clean_body: Protect Free Speech! | The Left is panicking. They went after Free Speech by trying to cancel Elon Musk and his platform, X, and I don’t think they expected us to fight back like we have. I’ve launched an ad highlighting the unAmerican agenda the left has for America. The Left wants this ad off the air AS SOON AS POSSIBLE and is doing everything they can to ensure it comes down. The truth is they don’t want this country to know the truth about their cancel-culture-first crusade against our fundamental American liberties. The First Amendment is NON-NEGOTIABLE. I launched this new ad because the American people deserve to hear the truth, NOT what the media wants you to see. X is one of America’s last bastions of free speech; my campaign will continue to advertise on the platform so we can end the tyranny of Big Tech and keep one of this country’s last open forums up and running. | My ad will run out of funding SOON, and if you could rush ANYTHING by midnight, we can keep it up so the American people KNOW CONSERVATIVES STAND WITH FREE SPEECH. I’m counting on your support, Friend. Kari Lake Candidate for U.S. Senate in Arizona Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate

name: Andy Kim
subject: The suit I wore
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend,

Believe it or not, I found this suit on the sale rack at J. Crew, not long after the 2020 election. I liked the bold blue color and thought I might wear it to the inauguration a few weeks later.

When I donated it to the Smithsonian, the knees were dusted with dirt from the night I spent cleaning trash off of the Capitol’s rotunda floor on January 6. [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59391?t=6&akid=12370%2E878179%2EyKgZ05) _Holding my bright blue suit, perhaps for the last time, before I donated it to the Smithsonian._ Honestly, I had seriously considered throwing the suit away until the Smithsonian called. That day still brings such terrible memories for me; I knew I‘d never wear it again.

**But the story of January 6 isn’t just about violence, insurrection, and trauma.** Like our country’s story, that day ended full of hope, resilience, civility, and service. Even the simple step I took to help clean up that trash the insurrectionists left behind sparked something much more significant. In the weeks that followed, I received thousands of cards and letters from folks across the country who were inspired or comforted by what they saw.

I still cherish every single one. [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59391?t=7&akid=12370%2E878179%2EyKgZ05) _I never imagined that something as simple and reflexive as cleaning up a mess I saw could become inspirational to those like the artist who sent me this wonderful illustration._ Those cards remind me how strong this country is, and how strong we can be when we come together.

Right now, our partisan divide can seem so deep that it threatens to tear us apart. We saw it on full display on January 6, and we must ensure nothing like that ever happens again. That means working with Congress to protect our Capitol, but it also means all of us working together to find common ground.

That common ground is closer than you might realize.

I can clearly see the disconnect between the partisan wars being waged in DC, the in-fighting within the GOP’s own party, and the priorities of my friends and neighbors in New Jersey. We are honestly all just exhausted by the endless cycles of misinformation and outrage. It’s a mess, for sure -- and it’s all of ours to clean up together. [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59391?t=8&akid=12370%2E878179%2EyKgZ05) I’m raising my two Jersey boys in the same community that welcomed my parents from South Korea. Everything I have done in Congress is to keep the promise I made to help build them a better world than the one we inherited — **and now, I am running for U.S. Senate to bring that same integrity and an emphasis on putting people first.**

That’s why the movement we’re building is focused on civility and service, starting in the same New Jersey community that raised me and stretching out to every corner of our country.

[_I’m ready to help bring our country together and fix what’s broken. That’s why I’m running for Senate to restore integrity and honor to our government and I’m humbly asking you to join me in this cause. Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project?_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59391?t=9&akid=12370%2E878179%2EyKgZ05) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Andy Kim and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59392?t=10&akid=12370%2E878179%2EyKgZ05)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59393?t=11&akid=12370%2E878179%2EyKgZ05)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59394?t=12&akid=12370%2E878179%2EyKgZ05)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59395?t=13&akid=12370%2E878179%2EyKgZ05)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59396?t=14&akid=12370%2E878179%2EyKgZ05)
More soon,

_Andy_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12370%2E878179%2EyKgZ05). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12370%2E878179%2EyKgZ05).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=12370%2E878179%2EyKgZ05) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=12370%2E878179%2EyKgZ05). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=12370%2E878179%2EyKgZ05)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
Ashley defended our democracy on the battlefield. Brian Fitzpatrick let Trump try to overthrow it. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76623196/447974803/-394196604?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240106_fr_jan6_team_mf_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjBhYTkwMC1lMGFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yRhpl1Gk1Oa8aOMnnRpXdPf6YuONEBUKYUNdY1DstRg=)

Hi teammates, **3 years ago, Donald Trump stood by while violent protestors attacked our nation’s Capitol in an attempt to overthrow the results of a free and fair election.** Mobs busted down the doors to the sacred halls of our democracy, calling for the heads of our elected leaders. 174 police officers were injured, with one losing his life the following day. Four died by suicide within months after the attack. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76623197/447974804/-394196604?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240106_fr_jan6_team_mf_90da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjBhYTkwMC1lMGFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yRhpl1Gk1Oa8aOMnnRpXdPf6YuONEBUKYUNdY1DstRg=)
---
_Officer Hodges crushed in a doorway at the Capitol_
How did Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick respond to all of this?
First, Fitzpatrick voted to let Trump off the hook for the violence on January 6th. Then, Fitzpatrick voted for one of the key architects of Trump's plan to overthrow the election results – MAGA Mike Johnson – to be _Speaker of the House._
It is only now that Trump is finally facing some consequences. He's been indicted on 4 felony charges for the insurrection. Colorado and Maine have moved to bar Trump from appearing on their ballots for his role.
**But still, Trump is the Republican frontrunner for president. And it's because Brian Fitzpatrick joined with MAGA Republicans and refuses to hold Trump accountable.**
Ashley can be trusted to defend our democracy, our freedom to vote, and all that we hold dear as Americans – because that's exactly what she did on the battlefield as an Army helicopter pilot.
Now, she's running to put that same courage to work for us in the halls of Congress. But she can't get there without our help.
[Please pitch in your first donation of $10 or more to support Ashley. This year, it's not just about keeping Trump out of the White House. It's about making sure everyone who supports MAGA violence is kept far away from the levers of power.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76623198/447974805/-394196604?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240106_fr_jan6_team_mf_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjBhYTkwMC1lMGFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yRhpl1Gk1Oa8aOMnnRpXdPf6YuONEBUKYUNdY1DstRg=)

clean_body: Ashley defended our democracy on the battlefield. Brian Fitzpatrick let Trump try to overthrow it. | = Hi teammates, 3 years ago, Donald Trump stood by while violent protestors attacked our nation’s Capitol in an attempt to overthrow the results of a free and fair election. Mobs busted down the doors to the sacred halls of our democracy, calling for the heads of our elected leaders. 174 police officers were injured, with one losing his life the following day. Four died by suicide within months after the attack. | = Officer Hodges crushed in a doorway at the Capitol How did Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick respond to all of this? First, Fitzpatrick voted to let Trump off the hook for the violence on January 6th. Then, Fitzpatrick voted for one of the key architects of Trump's plan to overthrow the election results – MAGA Mike Johnson – to be Speaker of the House. It is only now that Trump is finally facing some consequences. He's been indicted on 4 felony charges for the insurrection. Colorado and Maine have moved to bar Trump from appearing on their ballots for his role. But still, Trump is the Republican frontrunner for president. And it's because Brian Fitzpatrick joined with MAGA Republicans and refuses to hold Trump accountable. Ashley can be trusted to defend our democracy, our freedom to vote, and all that we hold dear as Americans – because that's exactly what she did on the battlefield as an Army helicopter pilot. Now, she's running to put that same courage to work for us in the halls of Congress. We don’t want the Chinese Communist party in our country| | |

Friend, Americans have had enough. Enough of China stealing our jobs. Enough of selling out our country to hostile foreign interests. Enough of elected officials who put the needs of other countries over the needs of Americans. That’s why Michiganders voted to recall a township board who voted to give tax breaks to a Chinese company. This is Mike Rogers, and whether it was in the Army, the FBI, or as Chairman of the House Intelligence Committee, I’ve dedicated my entire career to protecting our country and standing up to those who want to do us harm. From petty criminals to terrorist threats to Chinese Communist officials, I’ve taken them all head-on, and now **[I’m running for the U.S. Senate to do it again.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=845a5ac589464e699973e352080dcb4c&_e=2HUkxHwlapWzrvm0HQVfszgdrJUnHWNmmIqtxN3jX87tndJlowUmbuW_xtS1eb-Ptbn_k_Jx8gll25erVI-a0lYUyJaFhciL-aVzA4PM1V0advOXY1xcjzNojwYgqD0gSRfDmwM_OdrWLL4pu_Wm6RDq7dr2jT_q10RXWdTVn32eMj8yN8aqR9SPWNoboAUcrkQPObNPhLFYEIAIeUSMIeS8gj7-Kymb3QJumtHNFFVDy8TvrwAOdzicXizpqPojswNiUF32et2Kdu6bji3aFQJC2V12g74fVj2P5xboFYsYPFuxaoShsB03kS0WBsY_WNW4pFnmtFFYjMBOfxYWnJmO5bZjy_-XsgEvQRVrBCxtGJ8PAAw9JIzJdDtlBhXKJqpWWXw_tLAprMss1oHFpA%3D%3D)** You don’t need me to tell you that Joe Biden has abandoned the American people. Every single day, Biden makes the conscious decision to sell us out to our enemies. Enough is enough, Friend. I’m taking on Joe Biden and his hand-picked China-tied candidate, but the Democrats have already pledged **MILLIONS** of dollars to oppose me. If you think it’s high time to stop playing footsies with our enemies and bring back American strength, **[I’d be honored if you could lend me a hand.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=845a5ac589464e699973e352080dcb4c&_e=2HUkxHwlapWzrvm0HQVfszgdrJUnHWNmmIqtxN3jX87tndJlowUmbuW_xtS1eb-Ptbn_k_Jx8gll25erVI-a0lYUyJaFhciL-aVzA4PM1V0advOXY1xcjzNojwYgqD0gSRfDmwM_OdrWLL4pu_Wm6RDq7dr2jT_q10RXWdTVn32eMj8yN8aqR9SPWNoboAUcrkQPObNPhLFYEIAIeUSMIeS8gj7-Kymb3QJumtHNFFXBZrTU6EraI5zwbooRjTxqYzet3kyi_O57yCewWc7u1qPG-HzDNASvAVvwAbeuyZGlBfZXDNkoka9yoMkjTZoA20allrLJcOoiN7W1EDKFmikgrKGfHplQljA-k5DhlCf9CQ4iVsU3Zj6bN-kmUy99lZ_klFiq56kyGdHln940sg%3D%3D)** Sincerely,

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Three years since January 6th
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
#

Friend,
It’s been three years since the day that our very democracy was threatened by the January 6th attack on the United States Capitol, a day that is so firmly planted in our collective memory. It was one of those rare generational events, where many Americans know what they were doing or who they were with when they heard the Capitol had been stormed. This wasn’t an attack conducted by foreign entities, it was an act of insurrection carried out by citizens of this country, and encouraged by the then-leader of the country.
I was in the Capitol that day. After I heard a gunshot that I would later learn killed one of the rioters, I ran from the tunnels underneath the Capitol back to my office. Myself and another member barricaded ourselves inside. The rest of my day was spent on calls with defense officials, pushing for some kind of backup as we waited for the all-clear to return to the Floor. Later that night, we confirmed Joe Biden won the presidency.
The acts of heroism carried out by Capitol Police officers, National Guard, and federal law enforcement are something I’ll never forget. Big acts, like putting their own bodies against a wall of rioters, to small acts, like escorting members quietly to safety. They saved countless lives that day. I am so grateful for their bravery in the face of an attack they never thought they’d have to face: one carried out by their fellow Americans.
We shouldn’t forget what has come out of those events: 5 officers dead, 4 rioters dead, 749 rioters convicted, 1,265 rioters arrested.
We are still feeling the reverberations here in Michigan now. Over the last few weeks, we have seen report after report about how Trump tried to use fake electors to overturn the presidential election and undermine the will of Michigan voters. When Trump and his allies couldn’t convince statewide elections officials to illegally overturn the elections in their states, they began to recruit fake electors to sign false certificates claiming that he won the election. Recently released recordings and emails have revealed that Trump and his campaign’s lawyers even went as far as flying fake electors from Michigan to DC, carrying the falsified election results.
The domestic extremism we saw that day hasn’t vanished from our society, and it is up to all of us to ensure the ideals this country was founded on are protected. If you use or incite violence, especially violence meant to disrupt democracy, you should be held accountable. It is my fervent hope that we carry the lessons from that day with us as we look towards November.
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=1001%2E135344%2E0WC7Vw).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: Tamie
subject: Jim Jordan betrayed America on January 6, 2021
body:
| |
---
He has refused to comply with the January 6th Committee and is implicated in Trump’s many crimes. | [View in browser](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMDk2NjE2NzkyMjMwNDgwMjUsXCJyXCI6MTA5NjYxNzE1ODE0MTU1ODAwfSIsInMiOiI1N2I1OWMxOTJmZjJiNGJjIn0)

---
| [ ](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMDk2NjE2NzkyMzAzODgwNjIsXCJyXCI6MTA5NjYxNzE1ODE0MTU1ODAwfSIsInMiOiJkMjY5YzA0ZDQ0OTg4NjUxIn0)
---
|
---

Friend,

Three years ago today, we witnessed the unthinkable: a violent, destructive mob attacking the United States Capitol, targeting the lawmakers, staff, and police officers inside of it discharging their Constitutional duties.
The object of the rioters was to disrupt the congressional certification of the 2020 election, which Joe Biden had won with a massive majority of the popular vote as well as the Electoral College. Ultimately, the violent MAGA mob was aiming to stop the election results from being certified in order to keep Donald Trump in power so that he could declare martial law or otherwise refuse to leave the White House and transfer power to Biden.
Jordan was a principal mastermind of this unconstitutional and un-American effort to thwart the will of the people and keep Trump in power.

Jordan has also, for over 500 days, defied a lawfully-issued congressional subpoena for information into his role in planning Team Trump’s illegal coup attempt and the resulting violent and deadly January 6th insurrection.

He betrayed America and sought to undermine, if not destroy, democracy and the rule of law and he must be held accountable for his actions.

I am here to defeat Jim Jordan, but my election is about so much more than him—it is about the opposite of what happened three years ago on that fateful day: winning through the power of the people, fighting hate with hope, and transferring power peacefully through democracy, not lies and violence.

We will emerge victorious in this contest for the soul of America if we stick together and stay true to our values and ideals.

I am so proud to be standing with you here making a difference and never giving up on the task of making this country better. Thank you for your love and support.
-_Tamie_
[**P.S. If you can send in some financial support to help me beat the insurrectionist Jim Jordan, anything you can give helps me and my team win this crucial battle:**](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMDk2NjE2NzkyMzU2MzA5NDYsXCJyXCI6MTA5NjYxNzE1ODE0MTU1ODAwfSIsInMiOiI5NmE5MTI2MjI3ZDBlZTg2In0) [](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMDk2NjE2NzkyNDA4NzM4MzAsXCJyXCI6MTA5NjYxNzE1ODE0MTU1ODAwfSIsInMiOiJlNGUyNzA2NmZjYWY0ZDdlIn0)

**Former Navy SEAL Reveals NEW King of All Flashlights!** [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj81uqzAQhZ9m2IHG4x9g4UXuRbRVpa66aFaRY0ziBhdinKK8fQVqu-pyzvk0840J0-D7u4byHxCdfTcDEfAdEF33S4i39_D8kO8Xl1_VS5BrSf-BKN0n90t-LylcMH5Y07LJOs37DkXmNCtRyIpYVWdnLaRUiqGgCsmyY-1cb5kTSE4hV4plXhOSQIaKOJKsCllWlnVYWl7z2pkjCNzuFCa46K1hc1pMjOMYCjuGbNDnlKZ5E2uBWjGleGFq7YBaO3h7Ad6m-Ok74A3jYv1I7dqnZh2xlkDK9P1hvh3XoOKY_wjlMyKzSAikbikcrAmT8acP4M3j22v-N5tF3U2LHwY_qxIEnjZ3O4avAAAA__8_Amsk) **Demand Is Surging – 428,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...** The secret is out... Police officers, emergency responders, everyday civilians... They're all raving about THIS breakthrough 9-in-1 tactical **"King of Flashlights"** that's powered by the sun. This super-survival "bad-a**" flashlight is unlike anything you've ever seen, and it's so versatile, you'll literally find a use for it every day AND during emergencies. It's super bright and solar-powered **(so it doesn't need batteries – ever).** And it can power your cellphone or tablet right up, keeping a vital lifeline of communication open when you need it most. It's water-resistant, rugged and built to withstand the elements. It even impressed a former Navy SEAL so much, he calls it: "The only flashlight you can trust in a life-threatening situation." [**Watch him give a live demonstration here.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj81uqzAQhZ9m2IHG4x9g4UXuRbRVpa66aFaRY0ziBhdinKK8fQVqu-pyzvk0840J0-D7u4byHxCdfTcDEfAdEF33S4i39_D8kO8Xl1_VS5BrSf-BKN0n90t-LylcMH5Y07LJOs37DkXmNCtRyIpYVWdnLaRUiqGgCsmyY-1cb5kTSE4hV4plXhOSQIaKOJKsCllWlnVYWl7z2pkjCNzuFCa46K1hc1pMjOMYCjuGbNDnlKZ5E2uBWjGleGFq7YBaO3h7Ad6m-Ok74A3jYv1I7dqnZh2xlkDK9P1hvh3XoOKY_wjlMyKzSAikbikcrAmT8acP4M3j22v-N5tF3U2LHwY_qxIEnjZ3O4avAAAA__8_Amsk) This ingenious tactical flashlight can make all the difference in an emergency with **its 9 lifesaving functions...**
* **A powerful LED flashlight.** At 200 Lumens, it's ultra-bright – so bright you'll need to use caution so you don't shine it in someone's eyes. See as far as 200 meters away. HaloXT has 3 settings to choose from – high, low and strobe.
* **Solar panel.** This is where the rubber hits the road. The built-in solar panel means you don't have to get batteries for it – ever. Just place HaloXT in sunlight and you're good to go.
* **Powers other devices.** HaloXT stores extra power inside so you can power your tablet, smartphone, radio, and more. This could be a critical lifesaver by keeping you in touch with emergency personnel or loved ones.
* **Red SOS light and strobe.** If you are stranded somewhere and need to visually signal for help, the handy SOS light will make you easy to spot for 1st responders.
* **Work light.** Need an extra bright light in your workshop or garage? What about if your car breaks down at night? The HaloXT has you covered.
* **Seatbelt cutter.** It's a fact... Your seatbelt could get stuck in an accident, trapping you inside your car. HaloXT eliminates that fear with its razor-sharp cutter.
* **Glass-breaking hammer.** The pointed steel tip of this glass breaker ensures you can shatter your vehicle's window in an emergency.
* **Compass.** If you find yourself stranded, becoming disoriented is a real threat. HaloXT's compass will always help you find your "true north."
* **Magnet.** Need both hands free? HaloXT will adhere to any metal surface with its powerful magnet.

That's why the HaloXT makes the perfect year-round gift for everyone you care about. **SPECIAL BONUS! Get the 4-Pack Best Deal today and you'll also get 7 FREE Bonus Gifts worth $75!** [**YES! I Want The Life-Saving Power Of The HaloXT For Myself & My Family Today!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj81uqzAQhZ9m2IHG4x9g4UXuRbRVpa66aFaRY0ziBhdinKK8fQVqu-pyzvk0840J0-D7u4byHxCdfTcDEfAdEF33S4i39_D8kO8Xl1_VS5BrSf-BKN0n90t-LylcMH5Y07LJOs37DkXmNCtRyIpYVWdnLaRUiqGgCsmyY-1cb5kTSE4hV4plXhOSQIaKOJKsCllWlnVYWl7z2pkjCNzuFCa46K1hc1pMjOMYCjuGbNDnlKZ5E2uBWjGleGFq7YBaO3h7Ad6m-Ok74A3jYv1I7dqnZh2xlkDK9P1hvh3XoOKY_wjlMyKzSAikbikcrAmT8acP4M3j22v-N5tF3U2LHwY_qxIEnjZ3O4avAAAA__8_Amsk) [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj81uqzAQhZ9m2IHG4x9g4UXuRbRVpa66aFaRY0ziBhdinKK8fQVqu-pyzvk0840J0-D7u4byHxCdfTcDEfAdEF33S4i39_D8kO8Xl1_VS5BrSf-BKN0n90t-LylcMH5Y07LJOs37DkXmNCtRyIpYVWdnLaRUiqGgCsmyY-1cb5kTSE4hV4plXhOSQIaKOJKsCllWlnVYWl7z2pkjCNzuFCa46K1hc1pMjOMYCjuGbNDnlKZ5E2uBWjGleGFq7YBaO3h7Ad6m-Ok74A3jYv1I7dqnZh2xlkDK9P1hvh3XoOKY_wjlMyKzSAikbikcrAmT8acP4M3j22v-N5tF3U2LHwY_qxIEnjZ3O4avAAAA__8_Amsk) [**Get yours here >>>**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj81uqzAQhZ9m2IHG4x9g4UXuRbRVpa66aFaRY0ziBhdinKK8fQVqu-pyzvk0840J0-D7u4byHxCdfTcDEfAdEF33S4i39_D8kO8Xl1_VS5BrSf-BKN0n90t-LylcMH5Y07LJOs37DkXmNCtRyIpYVWdnLaRUiqGgCsmyY-1cb5kTSE4hV4plXhOSQIaKOJKsCllWlnVYWl7z2pkjCNzuFCa46K1hc1pMjOMYCjuGbNDnlKZ5E2uBWjGleGFq7YBaO3h7Ad6m-Ok74A3jYv1I7dqnZh2xlkDK9P1hvh3XoOKY_wjlMyKzSAikbikcrAmT8acP4M3j22v-N5tF3U2LHwY_qxIEnjZ3O4avAAAA__8_Amsk) Besides its 9 lifesaving uses, **this miracle flashlight can be drained and recharged thousands of times!** It's the survival essential no family should be without. In fact, demand for this new survival must-have has gotten so big, we might have to start rationing how many of them people can get! [**YES! I Want The Life-Saving Power Of The HaloXT For Myself & My Family Today!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj81uqzAQhZ9m2IHG4x9g4UXuRbRVpa66aFaRY0ziBhdinKK8fQVqu-pyzvk0840J0-D7u4byHxCdfTcDEfAdEF33S4i39_D8kO8Xl1_VS5BrSf-BKN0n90t-LylcMH5Y07LJOs37DkXmNCtRyIpYVWdnLaRUiqGgCsmyY-1cb5kTSE4hV4plXhOSQIaKOJKsCllWlnVYWl7z2pkjCNzuFCa46K1hc1pMjOMYCjuGbNDnlKZ5E2uBWjGleGFq7YBaO3h7Ad6m-Ok74A3jYv1I7dqnZh2xlkDK9P1hvh3XoOKY_wjlMyKzSAikbikcrAmT8acP4M3j22v-N5tF3U2LHwY_qxIEnjZ3O4avAAAA__8_Amsk) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews!** **James R.**
"So Impressed... I Bought 52 HaloXT Flashlights! My wife and I are both 89. We have 5 children, 19 grandchildren and 25 great-grandchildren. So for Christmas we decided to give everyone the HaloXT Multi-Use Flashlight. We gave two to each child for them and their spouse. Because the flashlight was needed not just for use in an automobile, but to use at home. And some of the wives were so thrilled that they had a flashlight at home as well as in their vehicles. In total, we purchased 52 flashlights! We're just thrilled about these flashlights and are grateful that they were available because we find great uses for them." **Tony L.**
"I went ahead and bought four of the flashlights to give to all of my sisters and my girlfriend. Now I just need another one for myself. For any 1st responders out there like myself, it's a very heavy and sturdy material – I really liked that. With the solar panels, you're able to set it on your dash and it'll charge up. And you can use the magnet to have it stick to your car if you're doing work. I make sure to have my family keep one in their car." **Emily C.**
"I bought 8 for my family. They all loved them. Everyone is just thrilled with them. Everyone has a light in their vehicle. My brother in law loves his too. My sister is in a search and rescue group so she wants to get them to order some for the group. Would be very useful for them." **Andrew G.**
"We have all either been in a bad accident or have happened upon one while driving. Last year I stopped to offer some assistance to a young lady who was in an accident. I knocked on her window and she was dazed from the airbag. I opened her door and noticed flames coming from under the hood. My HaloXT allowed me to get her out of the car before it went up in flames. Now, everyone in my family has one in their car. Maybe the life you save will be your own!" **David B.**
"I received mine as a bonus with another product. I didn't expect it to be much, but when it arrived, I was very surprised. Heavy-duty, well constructed. Has glass breaker, seat belt cutter, can also be used to charge your phone or something else. Actually took about 1 hour to charge my phone from being about 12%. You won't regret your purchase. **Bobby M.**
"I ended up getting four of them. I'm a security guard in a building, and this thing is perfect. I mean, it's got everything a security guard needs. You can break out a big thick window if you need to. It's got a compass in case there's a catastrophe and you're collapsed in a building or something, you'd know which way to go. I'm just overwhelmed with it. I love it." [**YES! I Want The Life-Saving Power Of The HaloXT For Myself & My Family Today!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj81uqzAQhZ9m2IHG4x9g4UXuRbRVpa66aFaRY0ziBhdinKK8fQVqu-pyzvk0840J0-D7u4byHxCdfTcDEfAdEF33S4i39_D8kO8Xl1_VS5BrSf-BKN0n90t-LylcMH5Y07LJOs37DkXmNCtRyIpYVWdnLaRUiqGgCsmyY-1cb5kTSE4hV4plXhOSQIaKOJKsCllWlnVYWl7z2pkjCNzuFCa46K1hc1pMjOMYCjuGbNDnlKZ5E2uBWjGleGFq7YBaO3h7Ad6m-Ok74A3jYv1I7dqnZh2xlkDK9P1hvh3XoOKY_wjlMyKzSAikbikcrAmT8acP4M3j22v-N5tF3U2LHwY_qxIEnjZ3O4avAAAA__8_Amsk)

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1047f09781f3434da4a40c4a38d09515&_e=X_-1SMWGsxFJKK6D38ub9mxB5jdS9iWUYcSICzoH6q1jdq2gWgE58l6S_-r4SdRaUINAixA_JPGAkJHLkAi0pKV9ir9nISnL19x-PivP9wc_7AaUfsLrsy9bVcFbRxyZtqPSo5bam7vG6Q3Z_PlIyljvYl6UYw-WzMxsK3Vdkbc2emhjrDqV2NM3fI-cEqr3agKtV4CFI-b3EW1m8B8Nt4AXYlWKjjLbcgwqyKrwdvwxJpTbxfwZQCrWVO5pwwpv5gnhwg2IXqjTAcsjJLGm7gMUA3mSDMg79GYgxRlXQ67peyC0Hk-8LVtifqLGVjFUD13Kw6zP8o6hUO97klaiR9U7SHTFp7ncTy6QF58Qm-A7holrnAL0N2VHwEkB7YHjSpAj5tL9DEqaBbs1uHqTD67edhccOcOvrMD0ZBzOBkzjEJrMzRaLAtglQohBVuUV)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1047f09781f3434da4a40c4a38d09515&_e=X_-1SMWGsxFJKK6D38ub9mxB5jdS9iWUYcSICzoH6q1jdq2gWgE58l6S_-r4SdRaUINAixA_JPGAkJHLkAi0pKV9ir9nISnL19x-PivP9wc_7AaUfsLrsy9bVcFbRxyZtqPSo5bam7vG6Q3Z_PlIyljvYl6UYw-WzMxsK3Vdkbc2emhjrDqV2NM3fI-cEqr3agKtV4CFI-b3EW1m8B8Nt4AXYlWKjjLbcgwqyKrwdvwxJpTbxfwZQCrWVO5pwwpv5gnhwg2IXqjTAcsjJLGm7gMUA3mSDMg79GYgxRlXQ641DdcdQ6Meo-58zEDLXkFzSyw2SHkr3mIbV_GXODeyuoeA9Qa4HlaI-o2paFiEKGmaFH_scCgcwMOJQLrvI_EgcrUMfzJpH0V4Av_lYFn9UMew4Zn6JE4-HVJyfB1iYgo1wzOvjYCIUUZrbdiUeaQc)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. | On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315

body:
Democrats face an uphill battle to hold the Senate Majority. Pitch in NOW to help Republicans take back the Senate.
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a4c1f11458aa4b8d906b231b7b1c0b75&_e=Gj25lqhg-Dlzun-888_MTdjFxZaU338roXlBy5C9_odRc7q5RRu46ev1DvSAN_S1CqoC5HsYE9mwh_2cMXK97cLk0y0ICAtuTGoGCVemAOp74PDO1uFI-56-LZM4O5X6VkbycA2xXPcXgMdnE-BEIFcym0K_XBp6iFuYg3JzvuqDlp5lOudqDSikQOFVzYIi5ieo8Ce0nuSGwQRRWzvOXPs-fFOwABLF2XtnKYjp12L1BB3LnzK9qLtGj9vEpTWVKRQCeDXJ5T3kCcgV0i9iaNv89KQjNfR7PdtbTD6xK-Z6K9dWlF7P4evus50uUxB_dXegNtOyhc4Lh3EN7z2fFt0TwSKdpVgOIji9Gek6r6dV6z55R5yhojD-Weyl0vGSEJGTxcNQZSTJm_o-il6FzOzLi5b8YIOfE7Yn4X30rSg481HF3MF22oPstKmFd9N3t8dDWFhMu0YtgXH0B7881Q%3D%3D)

Fellow American - Democrats are trying to repeat what they did in 2022.

Even though the odds were against them, they were able to pull off some unexpected wins – because they flooded states with millions of dollars **_from wealthy donors who want to disrupt democracy and deprive you of your vote._**

**Do the Democrats hold onto their razor-thin margin, or do Republicans take back the Majority for America?**

**_With Joe Manchin of West Virginia retiring, Republicans are one seat closer to the majority. **It will all come down to Montana.**_**

But that won’t happen if we lack the critical funds for our programs. Those funds come from you and millions more grassroots patriots just like you. Without your help, our efforts would not add up to much.

[**Please offer your most generous contribution of $15, $25, $50, or even more to support our campaign for a new Republican Majority in the United States Senate and help is FLIP MONTANA.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a4c1f11458aa4b8d906b231b7b1c0b75&_e=Gj25lqhg-Dlzun-888_MTdjFxZaU338roXlBy5C9_odRc7q5RRu46ev1DvSAN_S1CqoC5HsYE9mwh_2cMXK97cLk0y0ICAtuTGoGCVemAOp74PDO1uFI-56-LZM4O5X6VkbycA2xXPcXgMdnE-BEIFcym0K_XBp6iFuYg3JzvuqDlp5lOudqDSikQOFVzYIi5ieo8Ce0nuSGwQRRWzvOXPs-fFOwABLF2XtnKYjp12L1BB3LnzK9qLtGj9vEpTWVKRQCeDXJ5T3kCcgV0i9iaNv89KQjNfR7PdtbTD6xK-Y_PjOQ1D9JzEPe-NvGK54hvwpPLkDabHF_3i_VbXr6RMPG1ZWHY0rmMf9VAYGlc21U4SwHeGBJWw-qvD0aDLtaxlDGvtVN8rPnZVvpB_oWuhFAF9zGabvVUbxkero4EK2RvVwPPDd-6KB9FY-U_kij2XyTXLCjQtiiYDc_e7l4vQ%3D%3D)

**This is urgent.** Chuck Schumer and other Democrats have already sent over $3 million into this race to prop up liberal Jon Tester.

The Left’s millions are a problem. They will only send more and more money to try and hold onto this seat for Democrats. And they will play dirty, running millions of dollars of attack ads to try and tear down our Republican nominee in Montana and paint him as someone he is not. They may even target his family and friends with their smear campaign. We don’t know how low they will go, but we do know they have a TON of money to work with.

We must be prepared with our funds to fight back. That mission is underway, and we need your help to reach our goal.

[**Offer your most generous contribution of $15, $25, $50, or even more to support our campaign for a new Republican Majority in the United States Senate.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a4c1f11458aa4b8d906b231b7b1c0b75&_e=Gj25lqhg-Dlzun-888_MTdjFxZaU338roXlBy5C9_odRc7q5RRu46ev1DvSAN_S1CqoC5HsYE9mwh_2cMXK97cLk0y0ICAtuTGoGCVemAOp74PDO1uFI-56-LZM4O5X6VkbycA2xXPcXgMdnE-BEIFcym0K_XBp6iFuYg3JzvuqDlp5lOudqDSikQOFVzYIi5ieo8Ce0nuSGwQRRWzvOXPs-fFOwABLF2XtnKYjp12L1BB3LnzK9qLtGj9vEpTWVKRQCeDXJ5T3kCcgV0i9iaNv89KQjNfR7PdtbTD6xK-bHxztEVWIZFPuf48cZrYeuVPX3TyNLCQR-nvBuzlSr_Kdx35CFJO4aOLLHUYJ3FYqwrh47H2vUwU9SdNSaxYDrM6vJkg2EhM3gl6GXo8TnTnmtYfOIUP3yCh09b1ppTbMjr1VWSzEjsJiDDOUJ0uCJC-3lPUVk3LbANbifULAYUQ%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Kellyanne Conway

name: Katie Porter
subject: Less than a month until ballots go out!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=36037%2E3422442%2EWFJ6mY)
Derek,
Ballots will be mailed to Californians less than one month from today...I’m not going to lie...that makes me nervous.
There are more than a dozen candidates running to be California’s next Senator. Only the top two, regardless of party, move on to the general election in November. **Recent polls show me slipping to third place.**
**Polls show a wealthy Republican pushing us out of the general. We can’t let him be the reason we fail to advance.**
This is the most critical time for our campaign. Can you chip in any amount today?
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240106-2?refcode=EMAP24_2_BAL_20240106_V1_F&refcode2=36037_3422442_WFJ6mY&akid=36037%2E3422442%2EWFJ6mY)
I am the only candidate in this race who doesn’t accept corporate PAC or federal lobbyist money, so every dollar I raise comes from supporters like you.
Anything you can give today will ensure I have the opportunity to build momentum and communicate with undecided voters across California before the competitive March primary.
Thank you for your past and continued support! You’re an important part of Team Porter, and I am grateful you’re on my side.
Katie
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240106-2?refcode=EMAP24_2_BAL_20240106_V1_F&refcode2=36037_3422442_WFJ6mY&akid=36037%2E3422442%2EWFJ6mY)

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAP24_2_BAL_20240106_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=36037_3422442_WFJ6mY&akid=36037%2E3422442%2EWFJ6mY)**

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate

Irvine, CA 92616

name: John Fetterman
subject: My friend Bob
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Hi there Peter, it’s John.
It’s hard to believe it’s already 2024. That means there are just months left in the fight to re-elect my friend Bob Casey — in one of the *most important races in the country*. 🗳️
**[Before I get into it, can you make a contribution to Bob’s campaign so he can start 2024 off strong? PA will make or break control of the Senate this year, just like we did in 2022.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240106-3?recurring=1&refcode=em20240106-3&refcode2=1613_552475_lH2fie&akid=1613%2E552475%2ElH2fie)**
[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240106-3?recurring=1&refcode=em20240106-3&refcode2=1613_552475_lH2fie&akid=1613%2E552475%2ElH2fie)
Pennsylvania is a battleground this year and every year — and **the GOP’s road to winning back the Senate runs right through the Commonwealth.** National Republicans know this and are going to do everything in their power to flip PA red 🔴 – and you can count on Mitch McConnell and shady billionaires spending million$ upon million$ to attack Bob and take back the Senate.
This is going to be a *seriously* tough race. After our win in 2022, I know Bob is going to need a strong team to stand up to the tsunami of money the GOP will spend attacking him. But I also know that we can win this thing because of people like you, Peter.
**We can defend PA’s Senate seat, as long as we remember how high the stakes are.**[By chipping in $5, 25, or more, you can join the team to help my friend Bob Casey defend the Senate this year.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240106-3?recurring=1&refcode=em20240106-3&refcode2=1613_552475_lH2fie&akid=1613%2E552475%2ElH2fie)****
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240106-3?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240106-3-el&refcode2=1613_552475_lH2fie&akid=1613%2E552475%2ElH2fie) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240106-3?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240106-3-el&refcode2=1613_552475_lH2fie&akid=1613%2E552475%2ElH2fie) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240106-3?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240106-3-el&refcode2=1613_552475_lH2fie&akid=1613%2E552475%2ElH2fie) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240106-3?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240106-3-el&refcode2=1613_552475_lH2fie&akid=1613%2E552475%2ElH2fie) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240106-3?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240106-3-el&refcode2=1613_552475_lH2fie&akid=1613%2E552475%2ElH2fie) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240106-3?recurring=1&refcode=em20240106-3&refcode2=1613_552475_lH2fie&akid=1613%2E552475%2ElH2fie)
---
We won in 2022, and we can do it again this year, TOGETHER. And just like Bob was there for me last election, I’ll be there for him every step of the way.
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania
